She took money for better **training** , better **equipment** , and better **resources** _AWAY_ from the local law enforcement of Washington’s 8th District. **[_Will YOU join me and step up to REFUND our police today? >>>_](http://links.jessejensen4congress.com/u/click?_t=786fb8edbf8a46a08085e4b6fadd3f18&_m=0cc099ea488240ac90cc28ef2cd2e1d5&_e=AGGDK0qXJu-xIt0v_hx2-X_R7Wllm8dcSoLeud4KEBtAcMB3yod3nQk3CX5D_sLJe075zWOH0IOqf3mzNDMoxTzYXedCMINbE5qyM-Q1pV_4EWV8lH40q8Qg3snLtNSdpDY2EqAkjyku6GpTPpIePbbMonggQIEjIUxlnCaz2mzRD9bk1s6YqbTIfdLXJ48DthZyTS7MDoiopsRoLTk62hlg11ziffAkY2loRH6KlyAXwhKkSc99-zh0NY7DKmPaWhcctgqpfFttylIKqQXB6iMC8-KqRa5dxs7G6AG_sc61lOYcZ-IyN-BvUbCVv-eQyyVn6Fw5RyoX1yTqXec2lQuXVCCbxVs_2kwCpLfPptvpFsXYYHg8_pPtDy8a1E2W_QsYPVWEmjp1K3VKBUqUagKcOrs8czWcC1iWjDGUjoew-UetskKELiAC1pCRXDy6LpmegQwTy9XjhbLIJ6FX0A%3D%3D)** Let me be clear about one thing: **_this isn’t about pitting two sides against each other._** This is about **funding the men and women who put their lives on the line to keep our communities safe**. Peter,

You’ve might’ve heard, but McMullin claims to be a “moderate.” He’s NO moderate. Make no mistake, Peter, we can win this race and help Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority, but it will take your help right now. Democrats have used their power to tear our country apart by opening our borders, taking away our guns, and dismantling our military. And remember – McMullin helped elect their leader, Joe Biden. name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob=20Astorino?=
subject: Self-inflicted crisis
body:
Hochul is doing more harm than good. | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=4f18b66734&e=3ca66fc65a)
---
| Friend,

Hospitals all across the state are facing capacity issues that are forcing operating rooms, emergency rooms, and hospitals to close.

Governor Kathy Hochul even admits, “It’s not a shortage of beds, _it’s a shortage of health care workers to staff the beds._ ”

That’s because Hochul ordered the firing of **33,982 nurses, doctors and other health care professionals** over her COVID vaccine mandate (scientific studies show the shots don’t prevent infection or transmission but do decrease the severity of COVID).
---
| [ ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=c4c3415bad&e=3ca66fc65a)
---
| [ ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=d813da463f&e=3ca66fc65a)
---
| The COVID shot should be encouraged but not mandated and natural immunity and regular testing should be options. These are our frontline heroes that bravely went into hospitals every day — often lacking adequate PPE — to battle COVID and care for the sick when far less was known about the virus.

To discard them now over a personal medical decision is heartless, wrong and dangerous.

Hochul’s answer to the capacity crisis is to cancel elective surgeries and ration health care.
_**[](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=7ee45d2b37&e=3ca66fc65a)

She is every bit as stubborn and arrogant as her former political partner Andrew Cuomo.**_
And just like with their intransigence over the nursing home executive order that killed more than 15,000 people, mostly seniors, Hochul's refusal to budge here will also cause unnecessary deaths.

We need elected leaders who follow the science and adjust to new information — not just double-down on failed policies to try and score political points.

Thank you,

[](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=66cdf112e9&e=3ca66fc65a)
Rob Astorino
Republican for NY Governor
---

[ JOIN TEAM ASTORINO ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=a0e01c6be9&e=3ca66fc65a)

---
|

---
| _Rob Astorino is running for governor of New York. A former two-term Westchester County Executive who currently works as a business and media consultant, and serves as an independent director on two company boards. In 2014, Astorino was the Republican nominee for Governor of New York. Astorino stunned everyone by holding Andrew Cuomo to only 54%, the closest election of Cuomo’s career. Astorino is a lifelong resident of Westchester. He and his wife, Sheila, are the parents of three children.
You can learn more by visiting [robastorino.com](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=ef8d50aa88&e=3ca66fc65a)._
---
| | | | | | [](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=8dc33b34cf&e=3ca66fc65a)
---
| | [](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=089d107cc1&e=3ca66fc65a)
---
| | [](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=d99726dbb8&e=3ca66fc65a)

body:

| | | **BREAKING:** CNN warns to “prepare for a post-_Roe v. Wade_ reality,” but **Justice Sotomayor isn’t backing down:**

---

_Roe v. Wade_ is in **extreme peril**.

**The Supreme Court is deliberating right now on whether to OVERTURN _50 years_ of precedent on abortion rights.** Justice Sonia Sotomayor is speaking out to defend millions of Americans' constitutional rights -- and we MUST stand with her.

A ruling will happen soon and we MUST demonstrate that the American people support _Roe v. Wade_. We're waiting for your response in this pivotal moment -- and we’re still 9,029 signatures short of our goal!

**[Sign our Democratic petition calling on the Supreme Court to DEFEND reproductive rights and SAVE _Roe v. Wade_!](https://go.dscc.org/go/3368?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211209-RoeUpdate-SotomayorQuoteRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211209-RoeUpdate-SotomayorQuoteRef-Pros-sl1&akid=2252%2E9716520%2EIMe27T)

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Over the last ten days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Hello from Galveston, Texas.

This morning I took a nice run from my hotel to the eastern end of the
island at the old Fort San Jacinto. Cloudy and misty but the sun peeked
through every now and then.

Looking out over the Inner Bar Channel, with the seagulls calling out to
each other, and stray cats slinking around the rocks and seawall, I
watched a massive container ship cruise into the bay on its way to
Seabrook where it will unload and reload at the Bayport Container
Terminal.

We visited Bayport yesterday, getting a chance to meet and listen to the
longshoremen and women who literally keep our economy going. The ports
along the Houston Ship Channel handle hundreds of millions of tons of
cargo and the men and women who work them help make this region the leader
in exports nationally. This is how so much of what we manufacture and
produce in Texas reaches the rest of the world.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50414?refcode=ema20211209-166194&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=166194%2E444211%2ENAjzv5 ]Beto meeting longshoremen and women

Bayport

Prior to that, I had a chance to meet with Houston entrepreneurs about how
we can make it easier for people to start and grow their businesses and
create more high-paying jobs in Texas. In Fort Bend, I met with health
care professionals and small business owners about the high price we’ve
paid over the course of this pandemic — and how we can be prepared for the
next one.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50414?refcode=ema20211209-166194&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=166194%2E444211%2ENAjzv5 ]Beto listens at small business roundtable

Houston

I also talked with area educators about improving the quality of education
at our schools so that more young Texans are ready to work the jobs and
start the businesses that will allow us to really grow an economy that
works for everyone. We talked about class size, special education, the
bureaucracy of public schools, high stakes tests, student-to-counselor
ratios as well as salary and working conditions — all factors in producing
better outcomes in our classrooms.

Before I left Houston I had a chance to connect with some of Texas’
foremost innovators in climate technology at Greentown Labs. It made me
confident that we can continue to be the energy capital of the world —
building on a proud tradition of oil and gas and quickly expanding into
renewable technologies like geothermal, hydrogen, battery storage, and
others that will allow us to create more jobs and meet our obligations to
each other and the future of this planet.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50414?refcode=ema20211209-166194&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=166194%2E444211%2ENAjzv5 ]Beto at Greentown Labs

Houston

And those are just some of the meetings we’ve had in the Gulf Coast!

Over the last ten days, we’ve also met with military retirees and veterans
in Harker Heights and Killeen; we’ve met with law enforcement in
Rosenberg; we rallied with Opal Lee in Fort Worth; we listened to oil and
gas leaders in Midland; and we spent time in communities where you might
not expect to see a Democrat.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50414?refcode=ema20211209-166194&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=166194%2E444211%2ENAjzv5 ]Beto with a veteran in Harker Heights

Harker Heights

In Stamford, for example, we met with the extraordinary mayor of this
small town in Jones County and learned about his community’s many
successes in the face of some pretty tough challenges. Half the county
doesn’t have access to broadband. The water system needs a major overhaul.
Two of the county’s hospitals have closed down. And a city that had more
than 6,000 residents in 1960 now only has 3,000.

But Mayor Decker isn’t letting any of that deter him. He’s fiercely
focused on the future of Stamford — on making the investments that will
attract and retain young people in the community, on improving the quality
of life for his constituents, and on making sure that we get past the
culture war BS that dominates so much of our state’s politics today and
get back to doing the big work in front of us. He’s looking for a partner
in state government, and I told him that whether it’s expanding Medicaid,
investing in Stamford’s infrastructure, or rolling out broadband to all of
rural Texas, I will have his back.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50414?refcode=ema20211209-166194&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=166194%2E444211%2ENAjzv5 ]Beto with Mayor Decker

Stamford

Last night we had a chance to meet with supporters and volunteers here in
downtown Galveston. We talked about the unique opportunity we have to come
together and get the job done for everyone — school teachers,
longshoremen, veterans and law enforcement, small towns, big cities,
business owners and employees, energy workers and environmentalists — all
of us.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50414?refcode=ema20211209-166194&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&akid=166194%2E444211%2ENAjzv5 ]Beto holding a rally in Galveston

Galveston

But it will take all of us doing our part right now to make it possible.
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50414?refcode=ema20211209-166194&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1007&akid=166194%2E444211%2ENAjzv5 ]As I head off to Beaumont, Nacogdoches, Marshall, and Texarkana to
continue meeting with our fellow Texans, I hope you’ll make a donation to
keep us going and on the road.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50414?refcode=ema20211209-166194&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1026&akid=166194%2E444211%2ENAjzv5 ]Contribute $3

I’m grateful to you and grateful to be doing this work with you!

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=166194%2E444211%2ENAjzv5

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.
clean_body: Hello from Galveston, Texas. This morning I took a nice run from my hotel to the eastern end of the island at the old Fort San Jacinto. Cloudy and misty but the sun peeked through every now and then. Looking out over the Inner Bar Channel, with the seagulls calling out to each other, and stray cats slinking around the rocks and seawall, I watched a massive container ship cruise into the bay on its way to Seabrook where it will unload and reload at the Bayport Container Terminal. We visited Bayport yesterday, getting a chance to meet and listen to the longshoremen and women who literally keep our economy going. The ports along the Houston Ship Channel handle hundreds of millions of tons of cargo and the men and women who work them help make this region the leader in exports nationally. This is how so much of what we manufacture and produce in Texas reaches the rest of the world. clean_body: Give just $1 to help me win re-election. | Peter, I’m starting to think you no longer support me and the conservative values I’m fighting for. While hundreds more of your fellow conservatives stepped up to support my re-election campaign after my last email, you still haven’t taken action. The stakes couldn’t be higher. We MUST WIN this toss-up race next year to take back the House majority from Nancy Pelosi. For less than the cost of a cup of coffee, you can make a meaningful difference in one of the most important races in the country and help usher in the red wave that will save America. Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar Florida's 27th Congressional District \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Maria Elvira Salazar Date: Fri, Dec 3, 2021 Subject: RE: Peter's membership. To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, Thousands of patriots, including your friends, neighbors, and fellow conservatives, have stepped up to support my re-election campaign this year. But I was just going over a list of all of our 2021 Founding Members, and I noticed you haven’t accepted your membership or supported my campaign at all this year. I hate to think that I’d lost your support. You were one of my biggest grassroots champions in 2020, and you played a critical role in our upset victory over my radical Democrat opponent. With 2022 around the corner, I wanted to reach out and you personally to ask you to join my campaign one more time before the end of the year. This next month is going to make or break my re-election chances next November. We’ve got to stay on budget and finish the year in the strongest position we possibly can so we’re ready for whatever Pelosi and the Left throw at us in 2022. And we can’t do that without the support of grassroots Americans like you, Peter. $5 may not seem like a lot compared to Pelosi’s millions, but when every conservative does their part, it adds up quickly. The fate of my bellwether congressional district -- and the House majority -- is in your hands. I hope that you’ll come through for me like you did in 2020. Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar Florida's 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Incredible What Happened Last Night
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_happened_last_night&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Walz, the Radical Left Democrats and RINOs in St. Paul are all conspiring to spend the massive [10 BILLION DOLLAR surplus.](https://www.action4liberty.com/minnesota_gov_t_overtaxed_us_by_10_billion_give_it_back?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_happened_last_night&n=2) If you're like me, that infuriates you. **That's our money and it all should be GIVEN BACK.** Last night's Christmas event was a HUGE success. We packed the room with patriots from all across the state with people who agree to Give It Back. And that means patriots demanding liberty are mobilized - BIG TIME. I'm sure the Political Class is sweating seeing how huge we've become fighting against the Swampy politicians in St Paul. Last night was full of fun stuff that included:
* Samantha Schwartz winning the Activist of the Year Award
* Our King Walz sign auctioning off for $3,100
* One lucky guest walked away with a non-Biden approved AR-15!

**I was also proud to introduce everyone to our growing team of field staff. These are young liberty professionals we've hired from California to Texas and Alabama to South Carolina.** But here's the deal, as I stated last night, we have a real threat facing us in this state. The Radical Left is hellbent on destroying our system of government. And tyrannical politicians like Tim Walz are going to continue coming after our liberties. **And spend the surplus on more wasteful government programs - GIVE IT BACK!** Many get frustrated and believe this battle can't be won. And I get it, we're up against tremendous odds. However, our organization was able to End Walz' Emergency Powers with Democrats in control of the Minnesota House. Politicians told you that wasn't possible. **We CAN win in Minnesota. Stopping vaccine mandates, passing the Never Again Bill and Giving It Back are within reach, but only with your support.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_happened_last_night&n=3 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_happened_last_night&n=3)
---
As you remember, when we came together as patriots last year and this spring, we were able to fund out 55,000 calls, 40,000 door knocks and countless other efforts to pressure these politicians.
## And it worked.
Action 4 Liberty is committed to protecting your health freedom and fighting against tyrannical overreach.
But I have to level with you.
With running our State Fair program, this awesome Christmas Event and all of our field activities, our coffers have been drained.
I'm asking you patriot-to-patriot, PLEASE, pitch in whatever you can to help us build a war chest for 2022 to put these politicians on their heels.
I'm counting on YOU to make this a success.
[**Make a donation of $100, $50 or even $25 to build our ranks of activism and make sure our army is equipped for battle!**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_happened_last_night&n=4)
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_happened_last_night&n=5).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_happened_last_night&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_happened_last_night&n=7), software for leaders.

name: Republican Party of Wisconsin
subject: Democrats Embrace Abortion Radicalism
body:
| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_embrace_abortion_3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Friend \-- Democrats continue to embrace radical abortion policies that are completely detached from the American mainstream. Just last week, **Tony Evers vetoed FIVE anti-abortion bills that aimed to protect the lives of the unborn.** Not only are Democrats[ refusing to back](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TiV2ExMvy-B9xlTsmD5RGJqhla2mJT2kUxXWM9eS6hTHyV7lB8QjoZR-asQOUz0sgw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_embrace_abortion_3&n=2) any limitations on abortion, including up to the moment of birth [and after](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=O8ZuEYCjB2-mhscrWEtUQoMveZh5XSbrpWqUZaFpC9D_kiVkD0_CyCOuFtq6RRDjnuZsAC9W4nz-ospxfaZTNZNVnRKzwSgE-vfCxD4wqw0-BqGslO5eOK8941l6NXVwp6lnnPTKwoCogMlmKRMXlwKIGvD3lVnWzdRAOesBty4lJSmBAAR8F69iIbojzqJi_7TH-88q0yqziRjKQ1xxV0WzQXQA3t43pfIM38cmOk1cJcVfqKXsPPmWtB25AaHL9M39P0V_3U8FgS44BeVBAttYW2h_tyuM4nmmwD5MPXiW0525WLI3UDvCF9f99KF_8vwihij3S1YpDqmaR-n5tjaBYYu4hcNRzld2L3eibtXseLq9apgc6bUgXBT-w2lzlrNqk6OS4bB1KXPKgVGkzPAq4g6tRta0uB6gxgzjaJGAg8e--DTCZ9lm0RlallbsANwgRhfIopVfqrqYBPtju6CdbBeQkC_7jrseHhjKHJV3oEfC9nFwMFQ4zx2lP0EwFdMnBgscOUH6c7sVYWomkyUB_HI3K6k8O1VgDf_OYgoLjgYd9e_j2iXm-hIHWHu5etcbZ9Aq1OquKbqXCmVcM58mvUQcVo9L_zN6DLFqhy3tIxgmI-frnQ2-HpuNUFsGn1a0pAOTsTR9vrv7rtKgHDDk4ao2R6g4LuTLRrIpVpmTuTLiTtZkxCSQBPIx_5HzKSWKAoGq0wjjUb9oWnpfMA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_embrace_abortion_3&n=3), they are also insisting your taxpayer dollars fund these abortions. Joe Biden’s latest budget proposal went as far as[ eliminating](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=oGkNRIpNU-65tzHrfmdwr8M2D0a2f_eL4al4zlVz1dwmdMJ0FGsvMq33TdEhMxbO1Bz-PE_akg9D0cKc2PMvE3o4lTFyw1Z96TetsxXvU3q_c-Bb01PTlTTYylL6NxG1-YqWCrWV0xkzzy29KwuJzki_954BRzI1V_nUeMjATeo&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_embrace_abortion_3&n=4) the Hyde Amendment, which prohibits taxpayer dollars from funding abortion. Polls show that[ 58% of Americans](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=KVYzWTFUuJ0SsyVZLAg-7KhgymeBWCJ5z6VS6DGe2fJNWLZ5GIZ6e7u8jToQz2WzHRPLyjSmE0gmOUxqUAz942tiyW0EORl_GD4X_uTmvBxV0Xlk-C0Ukxwc_3Q8Aicf&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_embrace_abortion_3&n=5), including 65% of Independents and 31% of Democrats, do not want taxpayer dollars to fund abortion. [Tony Evers](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=ez1BnRg01gPGR4qyG5PO2LV_3pMbUHIlFBrsZcCPouNBHja3sfdY8_xeAgIvnS9TJRwMUIzRwx_T-g9R1rLQxoFqlKLdKidOIJqZSbiHB0aeUeeTd8lCqinF18D7zbNkHADj4fBr_GyjltuB1Vkz2s2U3MEWtsiBgApP6MI_9hA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_embrace_abortion_3&n=6) and[ Joe Biden](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=PiInCVHjZg_Lhb0RQ-dhd9FuO00iWBlT7ly6FaNsObofDdFhfZL7Atf2C-_lk7QSpZkb82H1WxT4jhAPBnMRbkFtqldJ9DlzdMFSuJTu7XM&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_embrace_abortion_3&n=7) have both said they intend the use the complete power of their office to prevent pro-life and anti-abortion bills from every being passed. **We need to stop them, Friend.** **Life is precious and worth defending**. Tony Evers and Democrats are fighting to force their radical abortion agenda on all Americans – Republicans are fighting to stop them. \- Team WisGOP -
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVbYrz-EeNP5EokvSW_Ho-OC0WutYVac_I1HhR9pqIAsU&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_embrace_abortion_3&n=8 "CONTRIBUTE") [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVbYrz-EeNP5EokvSW_Ho-OC0WutYVac_I1HhR9pqIAsU&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_embrace_abortion_3&n=8)
|
Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States
This email was sent to [Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com](mailto:Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://act.wisgop.org/unsubscribe?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_embrace_abortion_3&n=9).
You can also keep up with Republican Party of Wisconsin on [Twitter](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNIcJvVL3dAKuw8klLyGLeGg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_embrace_abortion_3&n=10) or [Facebook](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iVbepFGB501pMHJjXBPeT95kNZEWPezdnkYYctpRqhH&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_embrace_abortion_3&n=11).

name: Mike Lee
subject: Evan McMullin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc
body:
Recently, Evan McMullin entered the U.S. Senate race in Utah against me.
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a0b8738c1c4543e0abcec870546d63bc&_e=oZ7_lE5QhIlGxwHneJ76jmjseb0uPvldr8uQsNJaT36yqpOouFxRE8EQdKY0chUwH1ckT02fmpYFHh9G0L6UtXvUPg7EAwNz8skcAuLtQeMDo9SofSAAo8jhUzTSHqlQrqLljASJajIzguSAA4Wu42IfUPlHxmwBkriYzcawDvPCk1reXebmspOdOINDlxpmiKDtLtStfGXT8fmrQhtXYXegafBtIPAxtMZRN77qetvqJWnUcXxltfkcoepY0TK3P3VOlDc6SxIHNU8ryyj5SK-WFxgADdQSJIX2PToL7s1ZzHp-gYMv0cmKW0vpJ-13p6_97dywolJ8-pucsYf_fNb3m34hbNsw-GnFKH7hzaixG3nTPLKBvqsGYfvFvXSl8-pM5VzN4rFJpCKAMB7mLg%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

Recently, Evan McMullin entered the U.S. Senate race in Utah against me.

You’ve might’ve heard, but McMullin claims to be a “moderate.” He’s NO moderate. He worked to elect President Joe Biden and has called for the replacement of the Republican Party.

subject: Traditional Values
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate
body:
Bettering America and standing for our values needs to be a priority. If not, then we’re no better than ancient Rome. |
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=90c9e5235bed4a3c8087db31acf8a2d0&_e=JN3-9NQjopyBf_g9NFmuU5DQpkYx0g_OC8H7yRc-jYaBowhfbWd7bsP8_ySXXbFUMqRRQ-9a9X5f-qaBR-NMWF4GHdEQj6gSOvOdvtk0VV5Pil_FI1dEoh-6-XCH1czM2DH-RAwj3qKf4v9m-geUryrCPPeLwJDWEogyM1DCq8QQLrmtPon6rY7GttY2bUWG5hxTxg8Y2ssAjqG10A-i9x1XFJRLvwy4AJ_JLTkQiUHqor-3yT_RIVZTMGK-XKr5RdUc7V-0MOyycBXVG1V1nVjPbOsYFnYi4mBRz7iOMva40OZfoTYeHM7ahLh0vsqH5yqNyVxTBdd1T5GN1gmj9Jg93zUiOx84_Sx2vXNTdrfFAMtW0ecpGew9iKoi3-4NDeL8QN1-Ndy1GpDqjySGtJjIOVyd6YpnG0JcsLKoEiQ4cWbTHOWDmglj3fC1qH4625SVR2MI24qbQO5QsCHK7hLv0--eLDBRGx5I2xseeZLgottGrHiB7VdhIl9HCpXgKqnDfBy_f88ciztNKGqC_jZRxatiegULZYkiTr0COPA%3D)

Peter,

The same place where Christianity and Judaism came to life, is the same place where I was born, Israel. **As the only Israeli-American running for the U.S. Senate, I know where my allegiances lie, and that’s why I stand against radical liberals like Ilhan Omar who openly encourage anti-American and anti-Semitic policies.**

**Peter, we have a duty to this nation that has given us so much.** We are free in the greatest nation on earth, and we cannot take that for granted by ignoring our God-given obligation to protect our Judeo-Christian values from the radical liberals who want total control over our lives.

**We have to fight for the America we love, because they won’t stop eroding away at our values until they’re completely gone. It’s a doomsday of biblical portions and we cannot allow this to happen under our watch.** [**Can I count on your support?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=90c9e5235bed4a3c8087db31acf8a2d0&_e=JN3-9NQjopyBf_g9NFmuU5DQpkYx0g_OC8H7yRc-jYaBowhfbWd7bsP8_ySXXbFUMqRRQ-9a9X5f-qaBR-NMWF4GHdEQj6gSOvOdvtk0VV5Pil_FI1dEoh-6-XCH1czM2DH-RAwj3qKf4v9m-geUryrCPPeLwJDWEogyM1DCq8QQLrmtPon6rY7GttY2bUWG5hxTxg8Y2ssAjqG10A-i9x1XFJRLvwy4AJ_JLTkQiUHqor-3yT_RIVZTMGK-XKr5RdUc7V-0MOyycBXVG1V1nVjPbOsYFnYi4mBRz7iOMva40OZfoTYeHM7ahLh0vsqH5yqNyVxTBdd1T5GN1gmj9AZAGbZwWzxaDC9FZkt1uRVTd0Q82lxryJwBq3xlLNwpPer6s7X7itPnF5b3jVFGWw2sB0F-xp4pIltUoSc1JlY_Wri9fTegcnPKppKbzFR_EE-3P7UIGz2GCk0UhRwtGpbTIpl9oDrQWzlqg5MeiLQqKr-HczqOttdyd_5ts9wc4lBUdy-yBysU6kDyZ73DKCWK3W6XjYZHgJc4dV_HMNk%3D)

[** STAND WITH JAMES TARANTIN >> FIGHT FOR AMERICA **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=90c9e5235bed4a3c8087db31acf8a2d0&_e=JN3-9NQjopyBf_g9NFmuU5DQpkYx0g_OC8H7yRc-jYaBowhfbWd7bsP8_ySXXbFUMqRRQ-9a9X5f-qaBR-NMWF4GHdEQj6gSOvOdvtk0VV5Pil_FI1dEoh-6-XCH1czM2DH-RAwj3qKf4v9m-geUryrCPPeLwJDWEogyM1DCq8QQLrmtPon6rY7GttY2bUWG5hxTxg8Y2ssAjqG10A-i9x1XFJRLvwy4AJ_JLTkQiUHqor-3yT_RIVZTMGK-XKr5RdUc7V-0MOyycBXVG1V1nVjPbOsYFnYi4mBRz7iOMva40OZfoTYeHM7ahLh0vsqH5yqNyVxTBdd1T5GN1gmj9FLsNvlF2VIC24YhIOPlfUsdDQ_uLJr_55q9tkFFnJ39DKh6ee_opqvtRJDY7K3F_rJQq2zYtyXgk1r6uSXnpwAuTrE1oQGTcbIv_-rDEjcUTWcZKLhvFHZur2yo6iGbR_2aARWYNNmOMz_n5Upau0YKCqnED-kFBdFM_BO1Bld7B9ZY4eAms9Ru49vkwP0pl8Jns21zD5j1mS9qxYdhCqI%3D)
We’ve seen what happens when politicians use religion as a talking point instead of their core values. [**That’s why we have to take a stand and fight for America.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=90c9e5235bed4a3c8087db31acf8a2d0&_e=JN3-9NQjopyBf_g9NFmuU5DQpkYx0g_OC8H7yRc-jYaBowhfbWd7bsP8_ySXXbFUMqRRQ-9a9X5f-qaBR-NMWF4GHdEQj6gSOvOdvtk0VV5Pil_FI1dEoh-6-XCH1czM2DH-RAwj3qKf4v9m-geUryrCPPeLwJDWEogyM1DCq8QQLrmtPon6rY7GttY2bUWG5hxTxg8Y2ssAjqG10A-i9x1XFJRLvwy4AJ_JLTkQiUHqor-3yT_RIVZTMGK-XKr5RdUc7V-0MOyycBXVG1V1nVjPbOsYFnYi4mBRz7iOMva40OZfoTYeHM7ahLh0vsqH5yqNyVxTBdd1T5GN1gmj9DmcCf1ufsLxhmwUoYGaeJ-hUwjFWIN6wUADDt4HqPE6IMrHCdouwrhuyXCXXFt5O4ZeuCHG3q2V04h4aTdrpl4U2e65z4A4IFpMle0jVB3dZ0n8RvPoyRQ_RaTLBzGCbFVrlJicheCpiRTm4wMdJXrQNJ1hlH7Y86xG6vEPfORXHmpfbdCcasbwtnylZZp0XA34gg47ac6dblWzfkKEyBM%3D)

_**There’s a reason Christ casted out the money merchants from the Temple.**_ **Shouldn’t we learn from that example and vote out these radical politicians who are telling us to abandon Jerusalem as the capital of Israel, while trying to IMPEACH our traditional values along with anyone who tries to defend those values.**

I don’t know about you, but I’m not going to stand by while these radical liberals and career politicians walk all over the values that made this nation great to begin with. **I’m running for the U.S. Senate because it’s time to return America to its glorious days, and winning a Republican Majority in the Senate can make that happen.**

**If you’re willing to support me then know this: I am pro-America, Pro-Israel, and I know full well that our nation was founded on Judeo-Christian values. I believe that God comes before government, and Christ comes before Congressmen.**

[**If you feel the same way I do, then please help me be the reason we win back the Senate, and together we can help restore the America we know and love.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=90c9e5235bed4a3c8087db31acf8a2d0&_e=JN3-9NQjopyBf_g9NFmuU5DQpkYx0g_OC8H7yRc-jYaBowhfbWd7bsP8_ySXXbFUMqRRQ-9a9X5f-qaBR-NMWF4GHdEQj6gSOvOdvtk0VV5Pil_FI1dEoh-6-XCH1czM2DH-RAwj3qKf4v9m-geUryrCPPeLwJDWEogyM1DCq8QQLrmtPon6rY7GttY2bUWG5hxTxg8Y2ssAjqG10A-i9x1XFJRLvwy4AJ_JLTkQiUHqor-3yT_RIVZTMGK-XKr5RdUc7V-0MOyycBXVG1V1nVjPbOsYFnYi4mBRz7iOMva40OZfoTYeHM7ahLh0vsqH5yqNyVxTBdd1T5GN1gmj9CH8h-yO7HT7bDH9AiEN87F8gS15nGAp3eezTnCVxub_DHFZGi_IRproF7uTSCCghnHub5pttbOsX8F3e8lK_09ycXFlPeR_UiFq_LWVg28ERyo5ZzdaaNrgYtYKhXQL6B9CoqO7C9-Nhuqlh598G81xUg9McBiy73rJgHNNAXLJyCI05foYuPC0zChvrmJShE_gVwsYZF4oJaBkqRoW7lg%3D)

Thank you for your time Peter, and God bless.

clean_body: Bettering America and standing for our values needs to be a priority. If not, then we’re no better than ancient Rome. | Peter, The same place where Christianity and Judaism came to life, is the same place where I was born, Israel. As the only Israeli-American running for the U.S. Senate, I know where my allegiances lie, and that’s why I stand against radical liberals like Ilhan Omar who openly encourage anti-American and anti-Semitic policies. Peter, we have a duty to this nation that has given us so much. We are free in the greatest nation on earth, and we cannot take that for granted by ignoring our God-given obligation to protect our Judeo-Christian values from the radical liberals who want total control over our lives. We have to fight for the America we love, because they won’t stop eroding away at our values until they’re completely gone. It’s a doomsday of biblical portions and we cannot allow this to happen under our watch. We’ve seen what happens when politicians use religion as a talking point instead of their core values. There’s a reason Christ casted out the money merchants from the Temple. Shouldn’t we learn from that example and vote out these radical politicians who are telling us to abandon Jerusalem as the capital of Israel, while trying to IMPEACH our traditional values along with anyone who tries to defend those values. I don’t know about you, but I’m not going to stand by while these radical liberals and career politicians walk all over the values that made this nation great to begin with. I’m running for the U.S. Senate because it’s time to return America to its glorious days, and winning a Republican Majority in the Senate can make that happen. If you’re willing to support me then know this: I am pro-America, Pro-Israel, and I know full well that our nation was founded on Judeo-Christian values. I believe that God comes before government, and Christ comes before Congressmen. Thank you for your time Peter, and God bless. \-- James Tarantin Candidate for U.S. Senate (MD) | | Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

Fellow Conservative,

Arizona can be the state that gives control of the Senate back to Republicans. **Democrat Senator Mark Kelly knows that it will be a major failure for his party if he loses.**

As time goes on, more and more Arizonans are changing their minds about Mark Kelly.

His approval rating is under water, and our race was recently upgraded from _"leans Democrat"_ to _"toss-up."_ **Kelly is feeling the pressure, and panic has started to set in. Just look at this email he sent out:**

[ ](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=50bbd82f07da4bb0834be595b31d0996&_e=hMWqAJETzIv9JnKALODNUoDnE8jEWxuVYlmV_vZGuQ0sATQqXMXD7Jv6bdKxwqO7oRULfRkKpYO-AdpOoLwv4UZ21t_LIEO_jjtbco3PInQHgFHotcC0Z7FTh_W1XK06fVIYPulRgFv5kAYLN46OmbkHnb_kpeviM4CGpGxpZNLIH8I5Q9P1gGHGit-m4nnSNZEkkEb6oxIrRc_q8lZ6c-F0On_CCHrFK5eNO9ydEscvIkYfsy8MVNlqnY0LYhx0GZxdqIKxaTq2DrGx6J0IPd06YFykddJC849vNd6U5SBQJcxGEZgNlnpxwjS4S9UNFkFsx_MLMBRSpsJeIQU__iTIE10Pw8OJlTU86b-Pe-qV-lWOAF6BKcZFtpFQDZdOH49vkCtyqfHTZxSqvxyqv6x7jTYih80PBaeR5pEICUpUlZPvaD_BCZf9PA6jRxuW8cAxaWzMYu6xOipocbdyhk9l5K3vIaVCu3VKnDm5c1Q%3D)

Mark Kelly is one of the Left's biggest fundraisers, and he has already raised over $10 million. He and his supporters know what's at stake and will do whatever they can to keep Chuck Schumer in power.

Our campaign has had to set some lofty goals to be able to keep up, and right now, we have some ground to make up for our December goal. name: American Update
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8266%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=M9Rp%2bDVnnDoQ%2fYAtKQeZcQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19358%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6dogIvgS8OfASpgZ6ZTD3g&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19359%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FDupnCmTQ0KB8jS6oVp%2fNw&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19350%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CkaoFtBCFYQVl4KbvxRPxg&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

body:

| _Sponsored message_ |

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: This is actually quite urgent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If we’re going to have the necessary funds to compete with the top Democrat fundraiser in the country, then we cannot miss our fundraising goals.
If we're going to have the necessary funds to compete with the top Democrat fundraiser in the country, then we cannot miss our fundraising goals. |
[](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJxdkMFuwjAQRL_G3IKcTcBwyKFAEK1oD7RqRS-RYy-JkW1Sx4HC19cB2kMly5LfeFazIzNIWZrgQGVAIY4hpnRCJ6PRsKQiZoKxMk1TpOmYpNTwinPh1cFyjc4PxcEM6izBmAvcCRxJWfJ0wkYlAMRc8lKCkOVAZ7X3TUuSBwLLcFoUncPhSVmHsh8SmEduohpdK2rUkbIisBJrZWUk_T5yJFl23hTtoXMCSbJweCQw7pHgpuGqsgHeDHduUKrOBIqGKx1gK8LjtiSdFKt88zpf5esiz4vF21Mxy1ePL4tik7__zj1Yj9YHjxU6SpptdWm-P7cuyIXVSgbhH6yVbPsUUzYff8n1wGWyOSmtVTtmob2qz3HtLCTWanfOCJsRgKsN4FoPVO_HfbeBy7OP3Mc0yvdmTXsR5uH25wb_ft6HDO_rAWGLH8JCkjI)

---
Friend – Democrats know it. And we know it, too.

The Senate race in Georgia will go down to the wire. Democrats are going to spend whatever it takes to keep their politician in the Senate. Take a look at the panicked email they recently sent:

[](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJxdkEFvwjAMhX9NuLVK3dKUQw8DitjGpolNcKzSxKNhSWBpCtp-_VJgO0yKLPl7eU-2ZQkZy1IcqRIoJAkklBa0GI_jhoqECcaaLMuQZjnJqOE7zoVXB8s1Oh-Lgxm1JTTjFBjPoZmIZswQCxa6QmSQykSIZqTL1vtjR9I7AovwOhS9w_isrEM5hATmkZuoRdeJFnWkrAiswVZZGUm_jxxJF703dXfonUCSzh2eCOQDEtwcudrZAK-GGzcoVW8CRcOVDrATobkuSYt6Wa1fZ8tqVVdVPX97qKfV8v55Xq-rzW_uwXq0Pnis0NHj1r18TNfT7STItdVKBuEfbJXshikmbJZ_ytXIlfJ4VlqrLmfherthjsvNwsRavX-VhE0JwMUGcDkP7Danfb-G7ycfue0kqvZmRQcRZqH6ryP-_byFxLf1gLD5DyH7j5I)
The Democrats are on a roll with their fundraising. Their supporters understand what's at stake – control of the U.S. Senate and the fate of the Biden-Schumer-Pelosi agenda. In Georgia, we're running against the #1 fundraising senator in the country who already has $17 million in his campaign war chest.

Our campaign is being aggressive in our fundraising, but we're behind our December goal – by a significant amount. We hate writing emails like this nearly a year from Election Day, **but we must hit every fundraising goal along the way if we're going to have the necessary funds to win next November.**

**[In an effort to get back on course, we're asking 1,500 conservatives to make a donation of $10 or more before midnight tonight.](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJxdkFFPwjAUhX9NeRvp7jo6HvYgYwQN-oBE49PStRdW0hbsOo3-ejtAH0yaJv1Oz825R5XAOMtwokugkKaQUlrQIs-nLZUpl5y3jDGkbEYYteIghAz65IRBH6byZCddKSHl-3TOioxL3ANti71sBWNc5W3GcjYxZRfCuSfZHYFVPD3KweP0UzuPahwSWUBhkw59Lzs0iXYyshY77VSiwjHxJFsNwTb9afASSbb0-EFgNiIp7Fnog4vwarhxi0oPNlK0QpsIexkf1yVp0azr7XO1rjdNXTfL3UOzqNf3T8tmW7_8zj25gC5Ej5Mm6fLddr2q3uAhyo0zWkXhH-y06scUc17N3tVm4kt1_tTG6H7GY3uHMcels5jY6P1XSfiCAFxsAJd64PDycRy28P0YEv86T-qj3dBRhCre4euMfz9vQ6a39YDw5Q-ISo7L)**

_The last thing that we want is for complacency to set in. While some conservatives believe we have the wind at our back after Republicans swept the top races in Virginia, that doesn't translate into automatic victory next year. Far from it._

**We must block, tackle, and excel at the basics of campaigning – like raising money, organizing volunteers, and registering voters – to win.**

clean_body: If we’re going to have the necessary funds to compete with the top Democrat fundraiser in the country, then we cannot miss our fundraising goals. If we're going to have the necessary funds to compete with the top Democrat fundraiser in the country, then we cannot miss our fundraising goals. | Friend – Democrats know it. And we know it, too. The Senate race in Georgia will go down to the wire. Democrats are going to spend whatever it takes to keep their politician in the Senate. Take a look at the panicked email they recently sent: The Democrats are on a roll with their fundraising. Their supporters understand what's at stake – control of the U.S. Senate and the fate of the Biden-Schumer-Pelosi agenda. In Georgia, we're running against the #1 fundraising senator in the country who already has $17 million in his campaign war chest. Our campaign is being aggressive in our fundraising, but we're behind our December goal – by a significant amount. We hate writing emails like this nearly a year from Election Day, but we must hit every fundraising goal along the way if we're going to have the necessary funds to win next November. The last thing that we want is for complacency to set in. While some conservatives believe we have the wind at our back after Republicans swept the top races in Virginia, that doesn't translate into automatic victory next year. Far from it. We must block, tackle, and excel at the basics of campaigning – like raising money, organizing volunteers, and registering voters – to win. We know the holiday season is upon us. Soon, Election Day will be here too. The future of the country is on the line, so we are humbly asking for you to help us get back on track today. Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate - | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

clean_body: | | | | | | == | | | Peter, Washington is more toxic than ever. We are facing the worst immigration crisis in our nation's history. Biden is putting illegal immigrants first and Americans last. He's made it abundantly clear that our borders are open and anyone can come in. == We can't let up in the fight to hold Biden accountable and end the crisis. We are a nation of immigrants, but we are also a nation of law and order. What is happening right now is a free-for-all with deadly consequences. == | | | == | We are all in this fight together, and we must continue to keep the Biden Administration accountable. | Thank you for your support, Christian Collins == | | | == | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | Christian Collins for Congress | P.O. Box 571, Conroe, TX 77305 | | Sent by mailto:info@christiancollins.org

Volunteer, become a member of our new fellowship program, or help us organize our Veterans group. **[Volunteer ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39522329/320229178/-232506344?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjQ4ODViNi1iYjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_5aCCWq3LNlLyLcFXw8P6G4qTiG2M1GMBv-bzwILfb8=&emci=e6f86bef-b659-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=df4885b6-bb59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427)** We are committed to running a comprehensive, grassroots campaign to reach as many voters as possible in this great district. [**Learn more here. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39522331/320229180/584660255?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjQ4ODViNi1iYjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_5aCCWq3LNlLyLcFXw8P6G4qTiG2M1GMBv-bzwILfb8=&emci=e6f86bef-b659-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=df4885b6-bb59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427) The objective of the [**Dr. Bob Fellowship Program**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39522334/320229183/381894659?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjQ4ODViNi1iYjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_5aCCWq3LNlLyLcFXw8P6G4qTiG2M1GMBv-bzwILfb8=&emci=e6f86bef-b659-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=df4885b6-bb59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427) is to train and empower community organizers to help elect Dr. Bob and other Democrats across Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula. The program will run for 6 weeks and require approximately 10-15 hours per week to help plan door knocking, phone calling, local events, text banks, assist with data management through our database, postcard distribution / collection and more.

The program will include training on each activity, as well as team structures to help empower each individual to have success. The hope is to build long lasting, community focused, teams for long term change. We hope you will join us! |
---
| | | Peter, I can't believe this.

It's Marco, I'm on track to miss my Mid-Month goal and be outraised for the Quarter... again. I hate to bother you about this, but I promise it's important. My race will determine control of the Senate, and the fate of Trump's legacy. **[I'm pleading, will you give $18 to retake the Senate?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58977467:6ZLnL8ENQ:m:1:3298722022:C086AF44D0153B239D9477FF8EF85EC0:r "I’m pleading, will you give $18 to retake the Senate?")**

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're Suing and We Need Your Help
body:
Dear Peter, Big tech corporations like Twitter, Facebook and Google are attacking, silencing, and censoring millions of conservatives. They're targeting any conservative who dares question the government-approved opinions on vaccine mandates and the chaotic 2020 presidential election. And if that wasn't bad enough -- we've now discovered that these _big tech companies were conspiring with and taking orders from powerful liberal politicians!_ That's right -- _**we caught leftists government officials unconstitutionally colluding with "Big Tech" to silence their political opponents**!_ And unless conservatives like you and me take immediate action to stop them, our 1st Amendment rights will be nothing but meaningless words on an old piece of paper... That's why I'm asking you to join our critical fight today... [**Will you rush back an emergency donation of $20 today to help us win our lawsuit against Twitter and these liberal elected officials?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58978663:6utpA8EN2:m:1:3298722022:5EFAADEC327BAE35B64FC4C44686E72B:r) In case you missed our big announcement on _**Tucker Carlson Tonight**_ , let me explain. In 2018, California created the Office of Election Cybersecurity to "educate voters" with "valid information" on regarding elections. This new government office quickly became a _**political weapon**_ of the far-Left Secretary of State's office which used it to censor and silence conservatives. And conservative lawyer and activist Rogan O'Handley quickly found himself a target. At first Rogan was banned from Twitter for violating "rules about election integrity." Then, when Rogan questioned the chaotic presidential election procedures or the results it was deemed a "violation," and quickly removed from Twitter. _But that 's not the worst of it..._ Recently, new documents prove that radical Leftist operatives working within California's partisan Office of Election Cybersecurity instructed Twitter to censor Rogan. Just look at one exchange: Secretary of State Alex Padilla's staff messaged Twitter and said: _**" We would like this tweet taken down ASAP."**_ Then the next day Twitter responded saying, _" Thank you for reporting, Tweet has been removed. Please don't hesitate to contact me if there is anything else we can do."_ Then it happened... After Rogan dared to question the number of votes Joe Biden got during the election, Twitter permanently banned Rogan! **This proves that liberal government officials used government property to censor the political speech of their enemies****!!** And it's NOT just a private company -- these radical "Big Tech" companies are working hand-in-glove with liberal politicians and government officials to silence and destroy conservatives. Please know that Rogan's Twitter account was wildly popular and had more than 400,000 followers. **_It 's clear that the ONLY reason his account was banned was because the Left was worried that his tweets would damage Joe Biden's image._** In fact, Rogan's opinions didn't just threaten the image of Joe Biden... These radicals were also worried that his tweets would destroy then-California Secretary of State Padilla -- _who was being considered to fill Kamala 's Harris' vacated Senate seat!_ It doesn't take a rocket-scientist to see that this collusion between "Big Tech" and the government to silence conservatives is corrupt and unconstitutional. That's why my team of constitutional lawyers is suing Twitter, Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber and a handful of other liberal elites for their unconstitutional assault of the 1st Amendment. [**Will you help win this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $20, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58978663:6utpA8EN2:m:1:3298722022:5EFAADEC327BAE35B64FC4C44686E72B:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon and you may recognize me from my numerous appearances on _**Newsmax**_ and _**Fox News**_ with **Laura Ingraham, Tucker Carlson,** and **Shannon Bream**. #
Peter:
Please give me a chance to explain why this request is so important. **[In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my reelection campaign and Senator Durbin.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39524616/320240270/851105155?refcode=dd_em_211210_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDAxYmE3MS1jMzU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lduN1rVEE4EwHNALvuajmPBzx1oybmgjLVK_Jmd1tLw=)**

So we still need about 5,000 donations TODAY to reach our goal. And there’s only one way that happens... together.

Thank you in advance,
Mark Kelly

name: Kevin Hern
subject: Nancy Pelosi’s latest political game
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Nancy Pelosi has created a “crisis” and now wants to change the rules in Washington. Read more >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/6760f4320782e516/415f35d999db18a8c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Peter, I’ve been working hard in Washington to STOP the Democrats’ radical agenda that will hurt hardworking Oklahomans. **Nancy Pelosi and her leftist allies in the House have been attempting to raise the debt ceiling to pass yet another massive tax-and-spend bill. They even tried a swampy maneuver to circumvent the filibuster in the Senate this week!** Instead of writing a budget last spring (like she was supposed to), Pelosi refused to draft one, and even instructed her Budget Committee Chairman not to even attempt it. Now, the Democrats are blaming Republicans for the budget crisis THEY created. The American people are sick and tired of these political games, and they are starting to see through the false statements from the liberals who control both chambers of Congress and the White House. It is critical that we get America (and our budget) back on track, but it’s becoming increasingly obvious that it’s never going to happen while the Democrats have total control in DC. **That’s why I’m asking for your help right now to elect a new conservative majority in the House in 2022, and FIRE Speaker Pelosi once and for all. Will you please chip in what you can to help bring a RED wave to the House?**

---
We can’t keep electing Democrats who wait until the last minute, create a manufactured crisis, and then try to re-write the rules to clean up their own messes. Americans deserve better than that from their elected officials. **Let’s get some candidates into office who will actually do right by America, not spend their time playing political games in an attempt for more power.** Thanks for your help,
Kevin Hern

name: John Gibbs
subject: Defeat Liz Cheney's #1 ally in the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gibbs for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

My name is John Gibbs, and I'm running for
Congress with President Trump's endorsement to unseat Nancy
Pelosi's pet RINO Peter Meijer who voted to IMPEACH President
Trump.

Never-Trumper Peter Meijer championed the
impeachment hoax and put Nancy Pelosi first.

I am America First and America always.

I proudly served in high-level roles in the
Trump administration, including working under Dr. Ben Carson.

President Trump also appointed me to the 1776
Commission, where I helped lead the fight to stop racist critical
race theory from poisoning the minds of America's children.
SUPPORT JOHN GIBBS - CHIP IN $17.76 RIGHT
AWAY
My life story is the American dream.

I'm the grandson of black sharecroppers and
the first in my family to go to college.

I've served overseas as a Christian
missionary spreading the Gospel, and I saw firsthand how
exceptional our nation truly is.

But right now, America's liberty, culture,
and faith are under attack like never before.

Ousting Never-Trumpers like Peter Meijer that
roll over for the left is step one in taking our country back.

But I need your help.

That's why I'm asking you to stand with
President Trump in supporting my campaign by chipping in a
contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100 -- whatever you can most
afford -- right away.

Joe Biden's socialist spending shot inflation
through the roof, imposing a massive tax increase on every
American. Gas prices surge, and grocery store shelves sit empty.

Joe Biden's locked up political prisoners in
solitary confinement for committing misdemeanor crimes on January
6.

Joe Biden's open border policies rolled out
the red carpet to a record wave of illegal aliens invading
America.

Democrats employ cancel culture to threaten
jobs and ban you from social media if you question their
dangerous ideology or support Donald Trump.

Crime is out of control as Democrats praise
BLM and Antifa rioters while fighting to defund the police.

America as you and I know it will cease to
exist if the left gets its way.

When the chips were down, Never-Trumper Peter
Meijer cast his lot with Nancy Pelosi and the fake news media by
voting to impeach Donald Trump.

I stand with the Constitution, conservative
patriots, and the America First agenda.

That's why President Trump endorsed my
campaign.
SUPPORT JOHN GIBBS - CHIP IN $17.76 RIGHT
AWAY
Will you join President Trump in supporting
my campaign to oust Never Trump RINO Peter Meijer by chipping in
a contribution right away?

Michigan's third congressional district
deserves a conservative that fights for conservative values.

Peter Meijer is Nancy Pelosi's favorite
Republican.

I am a proud Trump-supporting America First
conservative that served at the tip of the spear in fighting for
President Trump and his MAGA agenda in the Trump administration.

Donald Trump endorsed my campaign and I hope
you will join President Trump in supporting my fight to oust
pro-impeachment Never-Trumper Peter Meijer by chipping in a
contribution right now.

Unlike Peter Meijer, I'm not looking to win
popularity contests on CNN or MSNBC.

If elected to Congress, I lead the fight to:

*** BUILD the wall and defund lawless
sanctuary cities;

*** SUPPORT election integrity by banning the
mass mailing of unsolicited ballots and ballot harvesting while
also pushing for a complete forensic audit of the 2020 election;

*** STOP illegal and immoral government and
corporate vaccine mandates;

*** OPPOSE all unconstitutional gun control.
"The right to keep and bear arms shall not be infringed" means
what it says; and

*** DEFEND the unborn by supporting 100
percent Pro-Life legislation.

Joe Biden's stunning incompetence is on
display for all to see.

From surging gas prices to dead American
heroes in Afghanistan to labeling parents as domestic terrorists,
Joe Biden's failures threaten our freedoms, security, and
prosperity.

Stopping Joe Biden's socialist agenda starts
with firing Nancy Pelosi as Speaker of the House.

But it also means conservatives have to elect
a conservative majority that fights for our values and beliefs.

When Peter Meijer voted to impeach Donald
Trump, he picked Nancy Pelosi's side.

So please chip in a contribution of in a
contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or the
legal maximum of $2,900 to my campaign for Congress today.

Donald Trump's endorsing my campaign for
Congress 100 percent.

Please join Donald Trump in supporting me and
help elect a true America First conservative and send Never Trump
RINO Peter Meijer packing.

Sincerely,

John Gibbs

Paid for by Gibbs for Congress

name: Diehl for Massachusetts
subject: Reminder: Remembering Pearl Harbor
body:
December 7, 1941
| | | |
---
---
---
|
---
Eighty years ago on this day, 2,390 people lost their lives in the attack at Pearl Harbor. In propelling the United States into World War II, this day forever changed the course of human history.
I give my sincere thanks to all of the brave men and women who sacrificed so much, and through their service, defended freedom for themselves and for future generations. They are, and will always be, the Greatest Generation.
"Never in the field of human conflict was so much owed by so many to so few." ~Winston Churchill

---
---
|
---
|
---
### Geoff Diehl attends Pearl Harbor Remembrance Ceremony in his hometown of Whitman, MA.

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: 19 Republicans Fund Biden Agenda

body:
Fellow Patriot:

Senate conservatives were right to force a vote
against funding Joe Biden's corrupt, illegal vaccine mandate in
the latest "continuing resolution" government spending bill. The
president has no power to force people to get a shot as a
condition of employment or to force businesses to fire anyone who
doesn't get it. But there's much more that's wrong with the
Democrats' spending bill than just the vaccine mandate and,
sadly, too many Republicans who voted for it.

The bill funds ...

❌ An education bureaucracy that subsidizes
teaching our kids CRT and radical gender ideas;

❌ An FBI that goes after parents for speaking out
for their kids;

❌ A Department of Homeland Security run by a
Secretary who refuses to secure the souther border;

❌ A Defense Department that undermines military
readiness by focusing on diversity and climate change; and

❌ A regulatory program that will force Americans
into energy poverty.
There are even more problems with this bill in
addition to funding Joe Biden's unconstitutional vaccine mandate
yet NINETEEN Republican senators voted in favor of it.

Blunt (R-MO)
Burr (R-NC)
Capito (R-WV)
Cassidy (R-LA)
Collins (R-ME)
Cornyn (R-TX)
Graham (R-SC)
Hyde-Smith (R-MS)
Kennedy (R-LA)
McConnell (R-KY)
Moran (R-KS)
Murkowski (R-AK)
Portman (R-OH)
Rounds (R-SD)
Rubio (R-FL)
Shelby (R-AL)
Tillis (R-NC)
Wicker (R-MS)
Young (R-IN)

That's the bad news.

The good news is that four of these Republicans
(highlighted above) are retiring next year - giving us a chance
to replace them with strong conservatives!
Please help SCF elect strong conservative leaders in
these states and in others across the country.
We need to flip some seats from Democrat to
Republican and others from RINO to Conservative. We need to help
elect leaders like:
✓ Josh Mandel (R-OH)✓ Mo Brooks (R-AL)✓ Ted
Budd (R-NC)✓ Adam Laxalt (R-NV) All four would be huge
conservative improvements over the Democrats and Establishment
Republicans in those seats today. The "continuing resolution"
spending bill isn't the real problem. The real problem is that
Democrats KNOW that when the chips are down, most Republicans in
Washington won't fight.
SCF's mission is to change that.
Please help us elect conservatives to the Senate by
making a generous one-time or monthly contribution today.

You can donate to SCF to support all of our
candidates and you can also donate directly to any of our
priority candidates. SCF will pay all processing fees and
transfer 100% of your candidate contributions directly to their
campaigns.
Thank you for considering this request and for doing
so much to fight for America's future.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

END OF THE YEAR
COUNTDOWN

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are
not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from
corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the
name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

name: Val Demings (personal)
subject: reflecting on this historic campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more
I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare.

So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate.
Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was destined for something bigger.
So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader that understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win.
So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups.
It's critical we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida.
My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?&refcode=jtk1924-fr-text
All the best,
Val Demings

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ibu2rS35CUKF9kop2dIjsg2] , or click here to unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/17997351-5258-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/20b08574-cf59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGIwODU3NC1jZjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lpKpDRSmAlYliYzF9y6CA3UNi_Yco5LhPB76IVOcOzg=&id=123159867 .

Friend,
Progress doesn’t grow on trees. It takes dedicated and intentional effort, and it takes time. I got into politics because we have a LOT of work to do in order to create a future that is equitable for EVERYONE – and I want to do my part.
This ticket comes with big plans for Maryland. Nancy and I want to take on racism and inequity to give every Marylander a fighting chance. To be the most powerful nation in the world, yet treat so many of our own as second class citizens is unacceptable.

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Councilman Andre Johnson is on Team Franchot!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
I’m honored to have received the endorsement of one of Harford County’s most dynamic leaders, Councilman Andre Johnson, and I’m delighted to share with you our newly-released video!
As the first ever African-American council member elected to Harford County District A, Andre has been a steadfast champion for Harford’s residents. He has also served our citizens as a member of the US Army for 18 years. I am so honored that he joined me in the fight to secure a better and stronger future for Maryland’s communities in 2022.
You can learn more about why Andre’s endorsing me by checking out our newly-released video below:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrejohnsonendorsement?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrejohnsonendorsement?amount=20.22]Over my decades of public service to the people of Maryland, I’ve built an unparalleled coalition of support between elected officials, community leaders, and activists in every corner of our state. If I’m blessed to be your next Governor, I’ll be a partner with all of them to ensure that all of our families, from Mountain Maryland to the Eastern Shore, are lifted into the high quality of life that they deserve.
I have a bold vision for our future that includes expanding affordable, quality healthcare coverage, using state-backed mortgages to expand home ownership, piloting fully-debt free paths to a college or vocational degree for our young people, and investing in the next generation of internet connectivity to attract the very best businesses and entrepreneurs to Maryland.
But this vision can only be made possible by your continued support for our people-powered movement. If you are able, will you chip in to help us maintain our momentum and win this competitive race?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrejohnsonendorsement?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrejohnsonendorsement?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrejohnsonendorsement?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrejohnsonendorsement?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrejohnsonendorsement]I can’t thank you enough for your support. A recent poll has shown that I am leading the Democratic field by a wide margin. With your help, we can stay ahead in this race, take back the Governor’s Mansion, and then deliver on the concrete points of progress to transform our state for decades to come.
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrejohnsonendorsement?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e386b765-5d51-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93/45ffa740-d259-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWZmYTc0MC1kMjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nZVg7gLVzoNlwvHvrGkGvZ9N4jQgXa8GwPR0D0D8LLs=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

clean_body: | = Friends — Trump’s conservative Supreme Court will determine the future of Roe v. Wade — and based on the reports coming out of the recent hearing on the Mississippi abortion case, and the fact that the unconstitutional Texas abortion ban is still in place, it is clear that we can’t rely on the Supreme Court to protect abortion rights. This is a nightmare for women and everyone who believes in equitable access to health care and a woman’s constitutional right to choose. We need to act quickly and make sure that the reproductive rights of every woman, no matter what state she lives in, are protected. That’s why today we are asking for 10,000 people to add their names and join us to show that Americans will do whatever it takes to save Roe v. Wade. | Between the Supreme Court’s impending decision and many conservative-led state legislatures passing extreme laws to restrict and ban abortion, we must take action now. Abortion is a constitutional right, and we must do everything we can to protect it. Thank you in advance for signing on, Defend the Senate Paid for by SMP, www.SenateMajority.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. subject: Let’s elect a Tax the Rich caucus in 2022
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39532218/320274798/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211210taxtherichRS_EGweb_full_SLA_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODlmYTVjOS1kMjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fpVVQgUce3vkuUeyZt8c9eZlcP4T8uif-1g7HXE2MTA=)
---
Hey folks,
It’s time to Tax the Rich.
And we don’t mean your doctor or the lawyer down the street — we’re talking about the absurdly rich billionaires like Elon Musk, Jeff Bezos, and Warren Buffett, who, just for starters, _paid only 3.4% of a combined $401 billion (billion!)_ between 2014 and 2018.
The average American making $70,000, on the other hand, pays **14%** in taxes. **Pretty messed up if you ask us!**
[**Unfortunately, there’s no way whatsoever that we’re going to make the filthy rich pay their fair share while corporatists like Scott Franklin are in Congress. Make a donation of any amount now to help us change that and hold the rich accountable just like the rest of us.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39532219/320274799/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211210taxtherichRS_EGweb_full_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODlmYTVjOS1kMjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fpVVQgUce3vkuUeyZt8c9eZlcP4T8uif-1g7HXE2MTA=)
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39532220/320274800/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211210taxtherichRS_EGweb_full_SLA_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODlmYTVjOS1kMjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fpVVQgUce3vkuUeyZt8c9eZlcP4T8uif-1g7HXE2MTA=)
---
The Build Back Better Act is in the hands of the Senate, which means we’re about to see just how far conservative Democrats like Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema (who Wall Street refers to as “Saint Sinema”) are willing to go to hold corporations and the super wealthy accountable. It’s no secret that every aspect of the Build Back Better Act (and more!) would be possible if the rich would just pay their fair share.
But here’s the thing: **Whether or not it passes, this is likely Democrats’ last shot to get anything done before the midterms.**
That means the fight for progressive policies that will help families, millennials, and everyone-else-that’s-not-a-corporation-or-billionaire will all depend on electing people who will stand up for working people in 2022.
**So, we _must_ make sure that we elect a strong Tax the Rich caucus — yes, we made that up, but you get the idea — in the 2022 midterms, so that we can deliver real help to the working people who need it most.**
[**That starts by electing Eddie — will you make a donation of any amount now to help us do it?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39532221/320274801/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211210taxtherichRS_EGweb_full_SLA_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODlmYTVjOS1kMjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fpVVQgUce3vkuUeyZt8c9eZlcP4T8uif-1g7HXE2MTA=)

clean_body: | | = Hey folks, It’s time to Tax the Rich. And we don’t mean your doctor or the lawyer down the street — we’re talking about the absurdly rich billionaires like Elon Musk, Jeff Bezos, and Warren Buffett, who, just for starters, paid only 3.4% of a combined $401 billion (billion!) between 2014 and 2018. The average American making $70,000, on the other hand, pays 14% in taxes. Pretty messed up if you ask us! = = The Build Back Better Act is in the hands of the Senate, which means we’re about to see just how far conservative Democrats like Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema (who Wall Street refers to as “Saint Sinema”) are willing to go to hold corporations and the super wealthy accountable. It’s no secret that every aspect of the Build Back Better Act (and more!) would be possible if the rich would just pay their fair share. But here’s the thing: Whether or not it passes, this is likely Democrats’ last shot to get anything done before the midterms. That means the fight for progressive policies that will help families, millennials, and everyone-else-that’s-not-a-corporation-or-billionaire will all depend on electing people who will stand up for working people in 2022. So, we must make sure that we elect a strong Tax the Rich caucus — yes, we made that up, but you get the idea — in the 2022 midterms, so that we can deliver real help to the working people who need it most. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = — Team Eddie | Eddie Geller is an activist, millennial, and former comedian running to bring real representation to the people of Florida's 15th District, and flip a longtime Republican seat in the process.
