name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're Suing and We Need Your Help, Peter
body:
Dear Peter, Big tech corporations like Twitter, Facebook and Google are attacking, silencing, and censoring millions of conservatives. They're targeting any conservative who dares question the government-approved opinions on vaccine mandates and the chaotic 2020 presidential election. And if that wasn't bad enough -- we've now discovered that these _big tech companies were conspiring with and taking orders from powerful liberal politicians!_ That's right -- _**we caught leftists government officials unconstitutionally colluding with "Big Tech" to silence their political opponents**!_ And unless conservatives like you and me take immediate action to stop them, our 1st Amendment rights will be nothing but meaningless words on an old piece of paper... That's why I'm asking you to join our critical fight today... [**Will you rush back an emergency donation of $20 today to help us win our lawsuit against Twitter and these liberal elected officials?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58979589:6vvvl8EEN:m:1:3253819041:D25AD278C61D0AC009F40D04C8098462:r) In case you missed our big announcement on _**Tucker Carlson Tonight**_ , let me explain. In 2018, California created the Office of Election Cybersecurity to "educate voters" with "valid information" on regarding elections. This new government office quickly became a _**political weapon**_ of the far-Left Secretary of State's office which used it to censor and silence conservatives. And conservative lawyer and activist Rogan O'Handley quickly found himself a target. At first Rogan was banned from Twitter for violating "rules about election integrity." Then, when Rogan questioned the chaotic presidential election procedures or the results it was deemed a "violation," and quickly removed from Twitter. _But that 's not the worst of it..._ Recently, new documents prove that radical Leftist operatives working within California's partisan Office of Election Cybersecurity instructed Twitter to censor Rogan. Just look at one exchange: Secretary of State Alex Padilla's staff messaged Twitter and said: _**" We would like this tweet taken down ASAP."**_ Then the next day Twitter responded saying, _" Thank you for reporting, Tweet has been removed. Please don't hesitate to contact me if there is anything else we can do."_ Then it happened... After Rogan dared to question the number of votes Joe Biden got during the election, Twitter permanently banned Rogan! **This proves that liberal government officials used government property to censor the political speech of their enemies****!!** And it's NOT just a private company -- these radical "Big Tech" companies are working hand-in-glove with liberal politicians and government officials to silence and destroy conservatives. Please know that Rogan's Twitter account was wildly popular and had more than 400,000 followers. **_It 's clear that the ONLY reason his account was banned was because the Left was worried that his tweets would damage Joe Biden's image._** In fact, Rogan's opinions didn't just threaten the image of Joe Biden... These radicals were also worried that his tweets would destroy then-California Secretary of State Padilla -- _who was being considered to fill Kamala 's Harris' vacated Senate seat!_ It doesn't take a rocket-scientist to see that this collusion between "Big Tech" and the government to silence conservatives is corrupt and unconstitutional. That's why my team of constitutional lawyers is suing Twitter, Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber and a handful of other liberal elites for their unconstitutional assault of the 1st Amendment. [**Will you help win this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $20, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58979589:6vvvl8EEN:m:1:3253819041:D25AD278C61D0AC009F40D04C8098462:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon and you may recognize me from my numerous appearances on _**Newsmax**_ and _**Fox News**_ with **Laura Ingraham, Tucker Carlson,** and **Shannon Bream**. I've been on a lot talking about our numerous battles _and victories_ against the radical Left. We went all the way to the U.S. Supreme Court to get houses of worship reopened and to stop the unconstitutional attacks on people of faith during COVID lockdowns. _**But I never thought the attacks on our individual rights would be this bad.**_ Not only are we suing Twitter -- a multi-billion-dollar corporation -- for its gross violation of Rogan's 1st Amendment right to free speech... We're also taking on former-Secretary of State Alex Padilla for conspiring with Twitter to silence conservatives. And even though we feel great about our case, this will be the hardest legal battle we've ever fought... You see, as a non-profit, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is because of the help and support of conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000... [**So, can I count on you to stand up to Twitter and Senator Padilla by making a one-time donation of $20, $35, $50 or more today****?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58979589:6vvvl8EEN:m:1:3253819041:D25AD278C61D0AC009F40D04C8098462:r) This legal battle will define the future of our country... Will we sit back and allow liberal politicians, "Big Tech" corporations, and government bureaucrats to destroy our constitutional freedoms? Or, will we prove that WE, the American people will NOT be silenced! I hope you join us in this critical fight to defend the 1st Amendment by rushing back your urgent tax-deductible donation today. For Freedom, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. We have clear evidence that liberal government officials colluded with "Big Tech" billionaires to silence and censor conservatives... That's why we just filed a massive lawsuit against Twitter and the radical bureaucrats to hold these radicals accountable for their illegal actions -- and I need your help to win! [_**So, I 'm asking you to join our critical fight today by rushing back your emergency tax-deductible donation of $20, $35, $50, $100, $250 or more today to stop the silencing of conservatives.**_](pdf) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58979589:6vvvl8EEN:m:1:3253819041:D25AD278C61D0AC009F40D04C8098462:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58979589:6vvvl8EEN:m:1:3253819041:D25AD278C61D0AC009F40D04C8098462:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58979589:6vvvl8EEN:m:1:3253819041:D25AD278C61D0AC009F40D04C8098462:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58979590:6vvvl8EEN:m:1:3253819041:D25AD278C61D0AC009F40D04C8098462:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: to be blunt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | [_**First, I need you to know 2 critical things. Then, I’m going to ask you to become a 2022 Founding Member. This election is going to make or break our House Majority, and I need you to understand exactly what’s at stake so I can earn your support. Will you read until the very end and then chip in $15 or whatever you can? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39532199/320274561/1694321165?refcode=20211210_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yjg1NDA2NC1kMjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HtxMeoelAInUA9nviB9SGnldy6nw3g4ZM-ONG7JOml4=) I want to pull back the curtain and explain why my Founding Members are so important. 1\. Republicans and Democrats are tied in the 2022 race for the House. 2\. Kevin McCarthy just lined up $25 million to unseat me as Speaker. [_**I’m fighting to make sure Republican delusions never become reality. But the GOP just announced they have us massively outraised. # * Volunteers Needed*
### **We Need Your Help!**
We are gearing up for the ride of a lifetime and we are going to need all hands on deck. We are currently looking for volunteers to assist us in several areas for the Gilbert for Governor campaign; like knocking on doors, making phone calls, hosting a fundraiser, assisting with digital and online marketing, and scheduling. What's good about this, is you CAN WORK FROM HOME! Just give us a few hours of your time. We are very excited about those that have already joined us, but we are in need of so much more so that we can WIN this race. Every Thursday we will have online training and/or meetings to discuss the strategies that is needed to run this race and WIN it. Here is the link to join us every Thursday at 7PM (CST). name: Nina Turner
subject: Student loans forgiveness for 45 million Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
With a stroke of the pen
#

Friends,

In two short months, the student debt payment pause will end, and 43 million Americans will be required to start making payments. With so many people still under financial hardship due to the pandemic, now is the time to cancel all student debt and transform the education system of this nation.

Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley is absolutely **[correct.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39532892/320277881/-946760841?s=20&refcode=211210_FR_studentloandebt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmJlYzFlOS1kMzU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OANouUPi4DeTBGfeaRy09VNtNgY7WTKYKW-wwacJmkA=&emci=2fd8fd32-9b57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=4bbec1e9-d359-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12102799)**
> "Failure to act would be unconscionable and so we must move with urgency as we continue the work of building a just and equitable recovery from the current economic crisis. Broad-based, across the board permanent student-debt cancellation must remain front and center. The people — the broad and diverse coalition that elected President Biden — demand, deserve, and require nothing less."

**With a stroke of the pen, student debt can be canceled. ALL OF IT.**

The false argument that student debt cancellation will benefit the wealthy is absurd, and Congresswoman Alexadria Ocasio-Cortez **[fired back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39532893/320277882/-1520041206?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw%7Ctwcamp%5Etweetembed%7Ctwterm%5E1466799577844137990%7Ctwgr%5E%7Ctwcon%5Es1_&ref_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.businessinsider.com%2Faoc-student-debt-cancellation-billionaires-child-student-loans-ayanna-pressley-2021-12&refcode=211210_FR_studentloandebt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmJlYzFlOS1kMzU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OANouUPi4DeTBGfeaRy09VNtNgY7WTKYKW-wwacJmkA=&emci=2fd8fd32-9b57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=4bbec1e9-d359-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12102799)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39532894/320277883/1761773496?refcode=211210_FR_studentloandebt_img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmJlYzFlOS1kMzU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OANouUPi4DeTBGfeaRy09VNtNgY7WTKYKW-wwacJmkA=)
The American people gave Democrats the power of the House, the Senate and the White House with the optimistic expectation that the leaders they elected would implement a bold, progressive agenda that lifts working families.

Now is the time to act. Progressives are pushing for immediate action on student debt cancellation before payments resume on January 31, 2022 and they need your help.

We believe if we mobilize and raise our voices, we have the power to create change. [**Therefore, I am asking you today to make a donation to strengthen our movement and help us rally more voices across the country and join our fight to cancel student loan debt today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39532895/320277884/1761773496?refcode=211210_FR_studentloandebt_L1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmJlYzFlOS1kMzU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OANouUPi4DeTBGfeaRy09VNtNgY7WTKYKW-wwacJmkA=)

clean_body: With a stroke of the pen Friends, In two short months, the student debt payment pause will end, and 43 million Americans will be required to start making payments. With so many people still under financial hardship due to the pandemic, now is the time to cancel all student debt and transform the education system of this nation. Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley is absolutely "Failure to act would be unconscionable and so we must move with urgency as we continue the work of building a just and equitable recovery from the current economic crisis. Broad-based, across the board permanent student-debt cancellation must remain front and center. The people — the broad and diverse coalition that elected President Biden — demand, deserve, and require nothing less." With a stroke of the pen, student debt can be canceled. ALL OF IT. The false argument that student debt cancellation will benefit the wealthy is absurd, and Congresswoman Alexadria Ocasio-Cortez = The American people gave Democrats the power of the House, the Senate and the White House with the optimistic expectation that the leaders they elected would implement a bold, progressive agenda that lifts working families. Now is the time to act. Progressives are pushing for immediate action on student debt cancellation before payments resume on January 31, 2022 and they need your help. We believe if we mobilize and raise our voices, we have the power to create change. = = Thank you, Nina Turner = * Paid for by Nina Turner for Us Nina Turner for Us PO Box 91956 Cleveland, OH 44101 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:
How about this? If you flee your district for an easier race, you don’t get to decide who represents us. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39537852/320286489/-851526706?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzI4ODYxNS1kOTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A8ByT8LjtfkyDRXR-kQcfn5-gB3RLYfe1Hqj42YvocE=)
This is infuriating, friend.

**Madison Cawthorn recently held a meeting with Donald Trump to determine who they’ll endorse to keep North Carolina districts like mine in Republican hands.**

How about this for a new rule? If you flee your district for an easier race, you don’t get to decide who represents us.

This is politics at its worst, but it’s what we’ve come to expect from the GOP in our state. As if their racist gerrymandering wasn’t enough, now they want to handpick their successors to maintain influence.

_Give me a break._

No matter how desperate our opponents get, this race is still about improving peoples' lives in our community. It's about ensuring working families have a shot at high-wage jobs and affordable housing. If we stay focused, I know we can win:

**[We have a major FEC deadline at the end of this month and need a critical 52 donations TODAY to send a message that we will not back down from this fight. name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Tell the Senate: Pass Build Back Better NOW!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39537863/320286528/282571568?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211210BBB_GV_full_SLA_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDZhN2MyOC1kOTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uU4YT4Usl7pDGn8AWMZ2_wNz3tBANy3RL6m9OLbxJNo=)
---
**** Friend, Remember when House Democrats single-handedly passed the **Build Back Better Act** — _the largest investment in children, families, and the environment in decades_ — last month? It was a huge achievement, but in order for it to become law, it still needs to pass in the Senate before it reaches President Biden’s desk for signature. Here’s what’s on the line:
* **Universal and free pre-kindergarten** for all 3- and 4-year-olds, the largest expansion of free education in 100 years, plus an extension of the child tax credit;

* **Medicaid expansion** , lower prescription drug prices, and lower healthcare premiums;

* **The largest effort to combat climate change in American history** , with tax credits for households who invest in clean energy, creation of hundreds of thousands of clean energy jobs, environmental justice initiatives, and coastal/forest restoration.

All of this can become a reality, but only if moderate Democrats or Republicans get on board. Right now, not a single Republican senator supports it, despite the positive impacts it would have on their constituents. Our own representative, my opponent Yvette Herrell, opposed it in the House, too. [**The people of New Mexico and the United States as a whole deserve these major investments and improvements. Join me in urging the Senate to come together and pass Build Back Better ASAP before the year ends.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39537864/320286529/537909096?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211210BBB_GV_full_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDZhN2MyOC1kOTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uU4YT4Usl7pDGn8AWMZ2_wNz3tBANy3RL6m9OLbxJNo=&emci=3a6a7c28-d959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=3d6a7c28-d959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=4482565) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39537865/320286530/537909096?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211210BBB_GV_full_SLA_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDZhN2MyOC1kOTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uU4YT4Usl7pDGn8AWMZ2_wNz3tBANy3RL6m9OLbxJNo=&emci=3a6a7c28-d959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=3d6a7c28-d959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=4482565)

clean_body: | = ** Friend, Remember when House Democrats single-handedly passed the Build Back Better Act — the largest investment in children, families, and the environment in decades — last month? It was a huge achievement, but in order for it to become law, it still needs to pass in the Senate before it reaches President Biden’s desk for signature. Here’s what’s on the line: Universal and free pre-kindergarten for all 3- and 4-year-olds, the largest expansion of free education in 100 years, plus an extension of the child tax credit; Medicaid expansion , lower prescription drug prices, and lower healthcare premiums; The largest effort to combat climate change in American history , with tax credits for households who invest in clean energy, creation of hundreds of thousands of clean energy jobs, environmental justice initiatives, and coastal/forest restoration. All of this can become a reality, but only if moderate Democrats or Republicans get on board. Right now, not a single Republican senator supports it, despite the positive impacts it would have on their constituents. Our own representative, my opponent Yvette Herrell, opposed it in the House, too. | Thanks for using your voice to demand progress! — Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of southern New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Team Bass
subject: Dolores Huerta and Rep. Adam Schiff have officially endorsed Karen »
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Hello --

We want to make sure you didn't miss the news, team. Endorsements for Karen's campaign for mayor of Los Angeles keep on rolling in -- and, in the past week, Karen received official endorsements from Rep. Adam Schiff and labor leader and civil rights leader Dolores Huerta!

"I've known Karen and her work for decades. When she's faced with a challenge or crisis, she does what good organizers always do when they work in service to others - they bring people together, find common ground by listening to the people, and then develop solutions which make the most sense...She has been able to get results throughout her life by being a steady, patient leader who cultivates mutual respect through honesty and strength. **I 'm proud to support her in this fight.**"

-- Labor Leader and Civil Rights Leader Dolores Huerta

"I am proud to endorse [Karen] for mayor. LA needs a leader who brings people together to create a stronger, more equitable city. One who has the experience to make progress on homelessness, health care, and climate. **Karen is undeniably that leader.** "

-- Rep. Adam Schiff

As a U.S. Congresswoman, former Speaker of the California State Assembly, and community organizer, Karen has a **proven** track record of serving Los Angeles. Our campaign is bringing together a diverse coalition to tackle complex issues, and leaders and activists from all walks of life are fired up to elect Karen as mayor.

**[Will you join Representative Adam Schiff and civil rights and labor leader Dolores Huerta in supporting Karen for mayor? Donate just $3 to our campaign to fuel this grassroots movement. If you're an Angeleno, your individual contribution could be matched 6-to-1 by the city!](https://act.myngp.com/el/cyh95tbZSI8EbIjXQbDpUBAq0bO8Fwkid6OXHwT7fK4=/OPU2kaS2W92K5NGyVgPSEPWlZuQjePqUT8CGZl_wspI=?ms=em21_211209_endors_fndd_gq_act_udt_tb_ettx&refcode=em21_211209_endors_fndd_gq_act_udt_tb_ettx&source=em21_211209_endors_fndd_gq_act_udt_tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211209_endors_fndd_gq_act_udt_tb_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

[SUPPORT KAREN!](https://act.myngp.com/el/cyh95tbZSI8EbIjXQbDpUBAq0bO8Fwkid6OXHwT7fK4=/OPU2kaS2W92K5NGyVgPSEPWlZuQjePqUT8CGZl_wspI=?ms=em21_211209_endors_fndd_gq_act_udt_tb_ettx&refcode=em21_211209_endors_fndd_gq_act_udt_tb_ettx&source=em21_211209_endors_fndd_gq_act_udt_tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211209_endors_fndd_gq_act_udt_tb_ettx&utm_medium=email)
---

In solidarity,

Team Bass

Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A.. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign:
[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/cyh95tbZSI8EbIjXQbDpUBAq0bO8Fwkid6OXHwT7fK4=/OPU2kaS2W92K5NGyVgPSEPWlZuQjePqUT8CGZl_wspI=?ms=em21_211209_endors_fndd_gq_act_udt_tb_ettx&refcode=em21_211209_endors_fndd_gq_act_udt_tb_ettx&source=em21_211209_endors_fndd_gq_act_udt_tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211209_endors_fndd_gq_act_udt_tb_ettx&utm_medium=email)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: My landmark bill just passed in the House.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
| | Adam’s _Protecting Our Democracy Act_ — a bill designed to prevent abuses of presidential power — just passed the House. **Despite defeating Trump, this past year has shown how vulnerable our democracy remains. We can’t let up on our work to protect our democracy from the autocratic cult now masquerading as the Republican Party. Add your name to demand Senate Democrats abolish the filibuster and pass the _Protecting Our Democracy Act_ today.** | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39539093/320287320/619504576?contactdata=SfEabLYg2TqZQpPz5C2WT0hx1pP4iE1pT7lTunyQsw4jwHOrbJIaB66qomKu3QVutd3ykm5qN2C%2ByYj4WQE%2Fj05viFsfoWnpRrFy365FzhHoSNMAFGzbMM9q9fM8WxYpOfSxPf9QGfw5uyGhEkzSuim%2FeBJXeXwFM%2FDJj1RU7m0%3D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_RES_AC_20211210_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGYxYTY0ZS1kOTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xN41oPd_vZeINGBmrs94tOIlgax3_w7-ML1M0qsZz6c=&emci=e3f1a64e-d959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=e8f1a64e-d959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=33917617)
---
Derek,
Yesterday, the House passed the _Protecting Our Democracy Act_ , my sweeping, landmark legislation to prevent presidential abuses of power and begin to repair our democracy after four years of Donald Trump.
And as I walked off the House Floor, I couldn’t help but think how very close we came to seeing our democracy fail just eleven months earlier.
How on the same Floor where I proudly cast my vote, Capitol Police instructed Members of Congress to prepare to don gas masks as rioters and insurrectionists attempted to beat down our chamber’s doors.
This Congress, and this country, have witnessed events in the past year that few of us previously thought possible in the United States.
81 million votes for Joe Biden are what stood between our democracy and an authoritarian striving to tear it down. Even then, Donald Trump pulled out every stop to halt the peaceful transfer of power — something that has been an unbroken and vital practice since our nation's inception.
And we’re not out of the woods yet. Not by a long shot.
A Big Lie has shaken our nation and threatens the integrity of our elections in the future. The same Big Lie that led to a bloody insurrection that injured at least 151 Capitol and Metropolitan Police officers, and is now being used to usher in a new generation of Jim Crow laws around the country.
Protecting voting rights is foundational to our democracy. But even with a solid foundation, Trump illustrated that a corrupt leader could still pull the walls down around our democratic institutions.
By using the levers of government to go after his political opponents. By using his office to enrich himself and his family. By inviting foreign interference in our elections. By dangling pardons before those who would lie to cover up for him. And so much more.
The _Protecting Our Democracy Act_ puts into law the norms of office that were destroyed over the last four years. But to pass this package of reforms, we need relief from the same archaic rule that has thus far stymied progress on voting rights legislation.
So I ask my Senate colleagues: What is more important to you?
An unconstitutional, anti-democratic, procedural rule that prevents a simple elected majority from passing legislation demanded by those who elected them.
Or the survival of our democracy?
**The Senate must abolish the filibuster. We must demand it. Because there is no room for compromise or half-measures against the forces of authoritarianism. If we give an inch, they will take a mile. We have to make a stand.**
**[Add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the _Protecting Our Democracy Act_ today and demand that all 50 Senate Democrats abolish the filibuster and pass my legislation to prevent presidential abuse of power. We may not have another chance.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39539095/320287321/619504576?contactdata=SfEabLYg2TqZQpPz5C2WT0hx1pP4iE1pT7lTunyQsw4jwHOrbJIaB66qomKu3QVutd3ykm5qN2C%2ByYj4WQE%2Fj05viFsfoWnpRrFy365FzhHoSNMAFGzbMM9q9fM8WxYpOfSxPf9QGfw5uyGhEkzSuim%2FeBJXeXwFM%2FDJj1RU7m0%3D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_RES_AC_20211210_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGYxYTY0ZS1kOTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xN41oPd_vZeINGBmrs94tOIlgax3_w7-ML1M0qsZz6c=&emci=e3f1a64e-d959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=e8f1a64e-d959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=33917617)**

clean_body: | | | Adam’s Protecting Our Democracy Act — a bill designed to prevent abuses of presidential power — just passed the House. Despite defeating Trump, this past year has shown how vulnerable our democracy remains. We can’t let up on our work to protect our democracy from the autocratic cult now masquerading as the Republican Party. Add your name to demand Senate Democrats abolish the filibuster and pass the Protecting Our Democracy Act today. | | Derek, Yesterday, the House passed the Protecting Our Democracy Act , my sweeping, landmark legislation to prevent presidential abuses of power and begin to repair our democracy after four years of Donald Trump. And as I walked off the House Floor, I couldn’t help but think how very close we came to seeing our democracy fail just eleven months earlier. How on the same Floor where I proudly cast my vote, Capitol Police instructed Members of Congress to prepare to don gas masks as rioters and insurrectionists attempted to beat down our chamber’s doors. This Congress, and this country, have witnessed events in the past year that few of us previously thought possible in the United States. 81 million votes for Joe Biden are what stood between our democracy and an authoritarian striving to tear it down. Even then, Donald Trump pulled out every stop to halt the peaceful transfer of power — something that has been an unbroken and vital practice since our nation's inception. And we’re not out of the woods yet. Not by a long shot. A Big Lie has shaken our nation and threatens the integrity of our elections in the future. We can’t let his campaign derail us.

I’m going to try and be as civil as I can about this.

Millionaire Republican J.D. Vance is running for U.S. Senate in Ohio. You know as well as I do — a guy who calls affordable childcare “class war against normal people” doesn’t belong anywhere near the Senate.

We can’t let his campaign derail us from expanding our Democratic majority — political experts say that Ohio’s open Senate seat is one of the most likely to flip.

Tim

Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**

name: records@maggiehassan.com
subject: Profile status update for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Really quick, friend – before you log off for the weekend.

We don't have an online donation on file for you to win in New Hampshire and hold Democrats’ slim 50/50 majority. With Republicans spending millions against us and our biggest FEC deadline right around the corner, we urgently need your support.

EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
DONATION STATUS: pending
REQUESTED DONATION AMOUNT: $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mwh-em-dec21?refcode=e20211210_record-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mwh-em-dec21?refcode=e20211210_record-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250]

You are such a valuable member of Maggie Hassan’s reelection team, and we’re so grateful to have you on board. Pundits say that Maggie’s seat in New Hampshire is one of the most likely to flip to Republican control -- that’s why it’s imperative that we keep our donation records up to date.

Maggie is counting on you, you know, but please only contribute if you’re able to.

Just $5 will update your record and, more importantly, help ensure that the Hassan campaign has the funds needed to execute a strategy that will keep New Hampshire blue. Any amount works - the donation itself is far more important than the amount. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mwh-em-dec21?refcode=e20211210_record-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250]

If this email seems urgent, that’s because it is. Maggie won her last race by just 1,017 votes, so it’s not hyperbole to say that every donation and every show of support could be the thing that wins (or loses) this race -- and the Senate.

Thank you for helping.

P.S. - If you’ve donated recently by mail or in person, thank you. We’ve received your donation, but it is still processing in our system.

–––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

body:

And videos about the George Floyd riots | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1be86493ee59/walz-deleted-press-conference-videos?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

It appears Governor Tim Walz has [deleted a myriad of his YouTube videos ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=84ad294566&e=33b11688c1)relating to COVID and the George Floyd riots. The videos have been purged from official channels and no explanation has been given. Why?
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=9586f8a972&e=33b11688c1)
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=8714f81ecb&e=33b11688c1)
---
| This speaks to Tim Walz’s lack of transparency! Why not keep these videos up for public viewing? Thankfully, our team has found numerous alternative places where the videos or audio reside. Governor Walz must answer: **why were these videos DELETED?**

Our research team identified over 150 sources, many of which still contain video and audio of the now deleted content. [See them all here.](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=676ff6e3b6&e=33b11688c1)

People often ask me what the BIGGEST difference is between a potential Jensen administration and the Walz administration of the present. There are a lot of differences, but the biggest may be the willingness to be transparent. We have never had a more secretive and opaque administration than the one Governor Walz is running.

I will continue to lead with radical transparency - throughout this campaign and as governor.

Let's demand better! [Join our movement!](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=25bacc1b8f&e=33b11688c1)

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor - Minnesota
---

Friend —

As long as there are people who get shut out of equity and opportunity, our drive for a fairer society must continue.

I am running for reelection. I am doubling down on my work as attorney general with a clear vision, experience, strength, and an unflinching commitment to bring justice to all.

In the past three years, I have never stopped taking on the powerful on behalf of vulnerable and working families. I sued the Trump administration 76 times, going all the way to the Supreme Court to safeguard New Yorkers’ rights. I have fought for better conditions and transparency at nursing homes so our elderly can be protected. I have taken on the gun lobby by taking legal action to eliminate the NRA.

The work will continue. I will remain unbought and unbossed. And when it comes to fighting for justice, I will stand tall. [**Will you stand with me?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39542309/320295727/-39856258?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk269-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTFkMzMxYi1kZTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cp-zZh2ghqZyAtadAtiY2l5J9FaHoatT01_7cgiJpBk=)

Supreme Court Expansion Clamor
Resumes as Biden Commission Wraps
This is the moment everybody has been waiting for.
**Biden’s court-packing commission just released their final report and Democrats are PLOWING AHEAD with a plot to pack the Supreme Court.**

name: Mike Collier
subject: So excited about tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Hi there — I've got some big news to share and I want you to be the first to know, my friend: Tomorrow morning in Laredo, **I'm officially filing for the 2022 ballot to run for Lieutenant Governor of Texas against Dan Patrick.** I'll be in good company, too — standing alongside our elected leaders in the Texas Senate Democratic Executive Committee who recently endorsed me. I'm heartened to have their support. My entire life, I've believed deeply in our beloved Texas. This is my home. These are my people. **And it would be my absolute honor to serve the greatest state in the nation during this defining moment in our country's history.** Remember this: Even though it'll be my name on the ballot, this milestone was made possible because of you. So, thank you. From the bottom of my heart, thank you for the months upon months of hard work and dedication from this team, and for your continued support. Folks like you have grounded this movement in compassion and put this operation on the strongest footing possible to fight for what’s right and defeat Dan Patrick, once and for all. You all inspire me to keep going. And you have my sincere promise that I will wake up every day committed to honestly solving problems for you and your family, as I have done all my life. No matter where you live or who you are, I will fight with every fiber of my being to be a Lt. Governor you can be proud of. [**If you’re with me, chip in now and let's keep laying the groundwork to confirm that Dan Patrick will never again work on behalf of Texans:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39542545/320296831/1189302780?refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211210_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmU3NGQ4NS1kZjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IDSNi65J3ruQTYFdrpeN7K7Yyz3x07OFmxcMTMcvCU0=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39542546/320296836/1189302780?express_lane=true&amount=5&&refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211210_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmU3NGQ4NS1kZjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IDSNi65J3ruQTYFdrpeN7K7Yyz3x07OFmxcMTMcvCU0=)

clean_body: | Hi there — I've got some big news to share and I want you to be the first to know, my friend: Tomorrow morning in Laredo, I'm officially filing for the 2022 ballot to run for Lieutenant Governor of Texas against Dan Patrick. I'll be in good company, too — standing alongside our elected leaders in the Texas Senate Democratic Executive Committee who recently endorsed me. I'm heartened to have their support. My entire life, I've believed deeply in our beloved Texas. This is my home. These are my people. And it would be my absolute honor to serve the greatest state in the nation during this defining moment in our country's history. Remember this: Even though it'll be my name on the ballot, this milestone was made possible because of you. So, thank you. From the bottom of my heart, thank you for the months upon months of hard work and dedication from this team, and for your continued support. Folks like you have grounded this movement in compassion and put this operation on the strongest footing possible to fight for what’s right and defeat Dan Patrick, once and for all. You all inspire me to keep going. And you have my sincere promise that I will wake up every day committed to honestly solving problems for you and your family, as I have done all my life. No matter where you live or who you are, I will fight with every fiber of my being to be a Lt. Governor you can be proud of. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = We’ve got a lot of work ahead. But with your support, I will keep doing what’s right, no matter the consequences, to ensure that every person in every community has the opportunity to thrive in this state we love. Let’s go win. Yours, Mike The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

name: Team Rayner
subject: It's time for bold action on climate, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michele For Florida Michele For Florida
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39542542/320296813/124312502?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWU3NGQ4NS1kZjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=He1jE0IWMWl9hqOZcic1DM-1Px_EO1gsbZmqV345pAo=)

Peter, we need to talk about climate change. And, how it’s as much a **justice issue** as it is an environmental one.

Here in Florida, we are facing climate-fueled threats from all sides. Extreme weather from intensifying heat waves, hurricanes, floods, and storms threaten every aspect of our state. As the sea rises an inch every decade, rainstorms are getting heavier -- putting our coastal communities at _severe_ risk of flooding and threatening the livelihoods of millions.

**And as temperatures continue to soar, accelerated by the warming of our planet, this public health crisis must be addressed _now._**

But the truth is, these effects won’t impact all folks in our state (or our country) the same way. As with most of our problems, the impacts will disproportionately fall on Black and brown communities. It’s all in the numbers: **Black and Brown folks are 52% more likely to live in areas experiencing the impacts of urban heat island effects.**

On those super hot days, everyone needs AC to cool off, right? Well, even the distribution of electricity is inequitable, Peter. In South Florida, **Black and brown communities incur disproportionately higher electricity bills** \-- even when they qualify for low-income energy assistance.

**[For far too long, too many politicians (especially Republicans) have ignored the climate crisis, and the unique threats it poses to our most vulnerable communities. That’s why we _need_ to elect Michele Rayner, the climate justice candidate, to Congress. Will you support this grassroots campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39542543/320296821/-465419534?refcode=em21_211210_climate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWU3NGQ4NS1kZjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=He1jE0IWMWl9hqOZcic1DM-1Px_EO1gsbZmqV345pAo=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39542544/320296825/-465419534?refcode=em21_211210_climate&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWU3NGQ4NS1kZjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=He1jE0IWMWl9hqOZcic1DM-1Px_EO1gsbZmqV345pAo=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39542548/320296834/-465419534?refcode=em21_211210_climate&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWU3NGQ4NS1kZjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=He1jE0IWMWl9hqOZcic1DM-1Px_EO1gsbZmqV345pAo=)

Michele is the _only_ candidate who is ready to tackle the climate crisis -- and the stark inequalities that it both highlights and amplifies.

When the wastewater spill in Manatee County caused a red tide that impacted marine life and vulnerable small businesses dependent on fishing, **Michele wasted no time taking action.** Michele worked tirelessly alongside Agriculture Commissioner Nikki Fried to immediately craft legislation to revamp and revitalize the dated clean water policies that were failing our communities.

And in 2022, Michele has plans to handle gypsum stacks that spill phosphate mining waste into our waterways, making sure that a catastrophe like the Piney Point disaster _won't_ happen again.

**[We need Michele in Congress, where she'll continue to fight for environmental justice for all of us with passion and dedication. Can you help get her there by chipping in $5 or whatever you can?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39542560/320296869/-465419534?refcode=em21_211210_climate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWU3NGQ4NS1kZjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=He1jE0IWMWl9hqOZcic1DM-1Px_EO1gsbZmqV345pAo=)**

Thanks Peter,

Team Rayner

_“Florida's DeSantis wants to hand out taxpayer dollars to businesses that defy vaccine mandates” (CNN)

This race has “huge national implications” (Washington Post)_
Friend,

As he fails at his job, Gov. DeSantis is becoming more and more desperate -- so his stunts are getting more and more _outrageous_ (just take a look at this recent CNN headline). He desperately wants to run for president in 2024, and he’s willing to do anything it takes to appease his far-right base.

**[Unfortunately, he’s already amassed a huge war chest (funded by his right-wing, billionaire donors), so he’s confident that he can do or say anything he wants ... and _still_ win reelection. But we know the truth: He’s BEATABLE. Team, we don’t need to match Gov. DeSantis’s war chest dollar for dollar to defeat him, but we do need to stay on track.

And, right now, we’re a bit _behind_ where we need to be going into 2022. By making a quick contribution to our $8,000 goal by December 12th, you can help us catch up. What do you say? name: Team Battino
subject: Ron Johnson thinks COVID and AIDS are overhyped
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Battino for U
body:
Let’s get him out of office and replaced with someone who believes in science. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39542804/320297950/464806879?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDA5YWJlYS1lMDU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g19lxjPTrz7uLnOnSrp4tdGojCmWT08cd3V8Ho7wMU8=&emci=710bfbad-c159-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=2009abea-e059-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25515813) | _"Fauci did the exact same thing with AIDS. He overhyped it. He created all kids of fear, saying it could affect the entire population when it couldn't...and he's doing - he's using the exact same playbook with COVID."_ Team, These are the words of the senior Senator from Wisconsin, Ron Johnson. **Right before falsely claiming that mouthwash kills COVID-19, Johnson went on Fox Radio, slammed Dr. Fauci, and said the AIDS epidemic (which has killed 750,000+ Americans & 36 million worldwide) and the COVID-19 pandemic (which has killed 780,000 Americans & 5 million worldwide) have been “overhyped.” ** No one who can ignore and downplay the suffering of his own constituents should represent them in the Senate. We need someone who works for the people, and trusts scientists and doctors (or is one). **Let’s get him out of office and replaced with someone who believes in science. [Dr. Battino is the right person to lead us in this moment. | Friend,
Kat has lambasted the Socialists for their over-reaching mandate tyranny. The Far-Left thinks they can end the COVID pandemic by forcing Americans to get vaccinated or put on lockdown in their homes, despite the science stating otherwise.
The Radical Socialists tout "follow the science" when in reality they just mean "blindly follow the liberal agenda."

| | | [SAY NO TO BIDEN SOCIALISM](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dbW54LswZ3YeAocK3N584M-Hbtec2HSQHB0FWfwvQubB5UQ1kQv1ACGnmpAhCclyFku_jz4KirrTzXFuOjm8HqDYXJZkxWHSFXcw6mNmg0ewsrSMudHLbwKRhcew0WNJNEsVGEwEFkF2miss54j39O3MuST2O1y4ZjwVmnakfJj5ixFN7yfgjcxdm8opnIH6AalVOHS0qjs=&c=C-mx3f-ZIH2pgFgGPGJz2ZewYVu7X8o-4JAECjSc9fjawqANN9daAQ==&ch=XV5LJnPwIAmSAczDXkWCI531mD-tlky0VgQC90a0UfQXkIjhToRzQQ==)

| Florida has proven that mandates and lockdowns don't work. The cost of shutting down our cities and infrastructure out of fear of spreading the virus would only cripple our economy even further.
The proud patriots of Florida are pro-freedom and anti-mandate!
Kat has always stood against overbearing federal lockdowns and unconstitutional vaccine mandates. We defeated one of the mandates, but Biden's White House continues to find ways to force the vaccine on Americans in order for them to go to work and feed their families. Big government involvement only worsens working Americans' lives and businesses.
Kat is ready to take on the Radical Left and their constant push for economic and medical tyranny. However, she needs your support in this fight. With your support, Kat can continue fighting for liberty and freedom.

name: Val Demings
subject: I hope you'll give this a read
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
It's important for me to share my story with you.
#
Team,
This is a longer, but especially important, email about why I'm running for Senate. It's important for me to share my story with you and why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read.
I was raised in Jacksonville, FL -- and I've got to say, when you grow up in the South poor, Black and female, you've _got_ to have faith. It's something I learned from my parents. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and my goodness they worked _hard_. And although we didn't have a lot of money -- although life was tough sometimes -- we had each other. We had love. We had _faith_. I've carried that spirit with me my entire career.
That faith that things can get better, that we can do some good in the world, inspired me to get into public service. In fact, my mom used to say to me: "Never grow tired of doing good, Val -- _never tire_." And so for me, growing tired was never an option. It's what pushed me to become the first in my family to graduate college. It's also what pushed me to serve 27 years in the Orlando Police Department, where eventually I became the first woman to lead the department. And it pushed me to run for Congress and represent my community.
**[I will never tire of the opportunities to do good or the challenges to tackle before me, and I'm asking you to do the same. Pitch in a contribution of $5 or more to my campaign and Jacky Rosen now to help me defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39543016/320299024/-1954815880?refcode=jr_em_nd_211210_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjNmOWMwYS1lMjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kz9qUmFI6b6kEdgsA2ZjOQhyz0VDtF2gJaHh7CVFFcg=)**
_Never tire._ These are the words that resonate in my mind each and every day that I serve the people of Florida's 10th district in Congress. They've stuck with me as I've fought to put an end to gun violence, as the horror of that violence struck our district at Pulse Nightclub in Orlando. We mourned, deeply. But we resolved to fight for change, to never tire -- and I won't stop until long-overdue action on gun violence is finally realized.
_Never tire_ , I said to myself, as I took on a habitual offender who occupied the most powerful office in the world: President Donald Trump. Unlike some in Washington, I never tire of standing up for what I believe is right, and I carried that with me as I fought to impeach him, because no one is above the law.
This is my story: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the '60s, have a story so filled with opportunities like these. Now, I'm ready to meet a new moment, to do more good for Floridians. I am ready to be the next U.S. Senator for Florida -- and together, with you never tiring alongside me, I know we can win.
**[So I need your support. This campaign is a battle of many things, and an unfortunate reality among them is resources. The Republican Party is already proving they will spend whatever it takes to protect Marco Rubio, so if you're with me, if you want to elect Florida's first Black senator and first Black woman senator and defend our majority in the Senate, please donate $5 to my campaign and Jacky Rosen now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39543017/320299025/-1954815880?refcode=jr_em_nd_211210_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjNmOWMwYS1lMjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kz9qUmFI6b6kEdgsA2ZjOQhyz0VDtF2gJaHh7CVFFcg=)**
Thank you for being in this with me. _Never tire._
Val Demings

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39543018/320299026/-1954815880?refcode=jr_em_nd_211210_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjNmOWMwYS1lMjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kz9qUmFI6b6kEdgsA2ZjOQhyz0VDtF2gJaHh7CVFFcg=)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from this email list: [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/3dd7333d-3559-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/623f9c0a-e259-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjNmOWMwYS1lMjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kz9qUmFI6b6kEdgsA2ZjOQhyz0VDtF2gJaHh7CVFFcg=&id=105090150)

name: Salud Carbajal
subject: Before the holiday crunch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/DtfBuiXD0-gGV4xgpYcFoIbCD3qzhjPCY5uPcCBSRns=/GT8Jy1UYUz7ssy4b4-0j-vkuqRLT4N6LRl9MybcoG1w=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
December is a busy month for many of us. Between preparing for the holidays, finalizing our year-end giving decisions, and pausing to experience the joy of the season, we understand that keeping up with political campaigns may not be a priority for many this time of year.
But our campaign is not taking a break just yet.
December 31 marks the final fundraising deadline before the critical 2022 election year, and we must keep our momentum strong going into the new year. [**_Can you help us prepare for our next race by contributing today?_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/DtfBuiXD0-gGV4xgpYcFoIbCD3qzhjPCY5uPcCBSRns=/GT8Jy1UYUz7ssy4b4-0j-vkuqRLT4N6LRl9MybcoG1w=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
Many campaigns will be emailing you through the holidays, right up until the critical December 31 deadline, but we want to prepare early and avoid that last-minute rush.
Please take a minute to [**_contribute today_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/DtfBuiXD0-gGV4xgpYcFoIbCD3qzhjPCY5uPcCBSRns=/GT8Jy1UYUz7ssy4b4-0j-vkuqRLT4N6LRl9MybcoG1w=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) towards our December digital fundraising goal so we can go confidently into the new year, prepared to run a strong race and do our part towards keeping the House majority.
I am proud to put the needs of working people first and bring positive change to millions of Americans' lives every day, but all of that could change if we lose critical seats next year. Democrats are holding onto our majority by a razor-thin margin and we must not take anything for granted. But, with your help, I know we can come together and do whatever it takes to keep the majority.
I am grateful for the progress we have made this year and look forward to continuing our work. Thank you for standing with us and joining the fight to keep our Democratic majority. Most importantly, best wishes to you and yours this holiday season.
Sincerely,
Salud Carbajal
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/DtfBuiXD0-gGV4xgpYcFoIbCD3qzhjPCY5uPcCBSRns=/GT8Jy1UYUz7ssy4b4-0j-vkuqRLT4N6LRl9MybcoG1w=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Hitting our goals is so important to the success of our movement
#

Folks —
In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign for Senate before midnight.
Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important. Here is the truth:
The race for Pennsylvania’s open U.S. Senate seat is going to be one of the most competitive in the country. CNN says it’s one of the most likely seats to flip, and the Cook Political Report rates it a toss-up.
That means Republicans and outside interests will spend whatever it takes to win, and our race is about to get a flood of dark money.
And that’s why we send you emails like this. The only way for us to win this race is by reaching our fundraising benchmarks, and since this is an FEC deadline month, we’ve got some ambitious goals to hit.
So here’s the part where I ask:
[I am respectfully asking you to make a $3 contribution to my campaign for Senate before midnight tonight. Could you please pitch in? name: Nelson HQ
subject: Ron Johnson’s craziest statement yet:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:

Friend, It's been a B.I.G. week on the campaign trail for Team ’22! We've barnstormed Georgia, announced more endorsements, and won an important victory against Joe Biden's unlawful vaccine mandate. **[We aren't taking our foot off the gas, and if you haven't already donated to help fuel our efforts, I hope you'll do so now.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5d2ec8503a7cdcb5/70cbc42a98c30cf7c3d6b838967d376c/37793)**

# **_Lynn Westmoreland's Endorsement_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5d2ec8503a7cdcb5/f588108ec6445c5dc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
I'm proud to share with you that former Rep. Lynn Westmoreland endorsed our campaign last night in Coweta County! Lynn has been a friend for many years. I'm grateful for that, for his service to our state, and to have his strong support. [**Watch the video of Lynn's speech here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5d2ec8503a7cdcb5/af45de2444d46a47c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# **_B.I.G. Crowd In Coweta County!_**
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5d2ec8503a7cdcb5/a6d4561690530e5cc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
|
---
More than 200 folks joined us last night in Coweta County for our Believe In Georgia tour stop! It's humbling to see this outpouring of support across the state. Our team's grassroots momentum is real, and it's growing by the day. Thank you to all of our Team ’22 coordinators who've helped make this tour a B.I.G. success.
---
---
# **_Lowndes County_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5d2ec8503a7cdcb5/e9d87973acb4102cc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
A great crowd also joined us in Valdosta this week. Thank you to Lowndes County Team ’22 and my good friend state Sen. Ellis Black for all of your work planning this event. There's no doubt about it — from Coweta to Lowndes to Glynn County, Georgians are fired up to defeat Raphael Warnock and win back the U.S. Senate!
---
---
# **_Here's Something Fun_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5d2ec8503a7cdcb5/b576f2d13e443109c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Stirred some cane syrup at our Believe In Georgia tour stop this week in Brunswick! Thank you to Wayne and Kathy Hutcheson, as well as state Rep. Don Hogan, for hosting us. And thank you to everyone who attended!
---
---
# **_Update About Biden's Vaccine Mandate_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5d2ec8503a7cdcb5/f585ea2567252c36c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
This week, a federal judge in Georgia issued a nationwide injunction blocking Joe Biden's vaccine mandate for federal contractors! As Agriculture Commissioner, I took action by suing the Biden administration to stop this mandate, and we WON. Contrast this with Raphael Warnock, who voted this week in the U.S. Senate to fund and enforce Biden's unlawful mandate for businesses and workers. **The contrast is as clear as it gets.**
---
---
# **_One More Thing_**
---
Please follow our campaign's [**Facebook**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5d2ec8503a7cdcb5/6aea60b1d114a475c3d6b838967d376c/37793), **[Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5d2ec8503a7cdcb5/679d55dfc23e34bfc3d6b838967d376c/37793)** , and [**Instagram**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5d2ec8503a7cdcb5/70216b25eacff433c3d6b838967d376c/37793) pages if you aren't already, and make sure 10 of your friends are too! We're rapidly getting closer to the end of the year and our final campaign finance disclosure of 2021. This year, gun violence became the leading cause of death for American children.

| This year, gun violence became the **leading cause of death** for American children. Dr. Annie is a national expert on pediatric gun violence and cares for children who have been shot. She has seen firsthand how the lack of gun safety in our nation has affected our communities and she understands what the solutions are. _Enough is enough_.

[Join her today in calling on Nancy Mace and her colleagues in Congress to take action against gun violence →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39544869/320307181/-1844896122?refcode=AA_EM_PT_1MO_211210_1_2&refcode2=&contactdata=qXApHtOxcrL612gr2ti%2FwVdxVYbjnGFbNKPW%2FlBdDcF5Yja5AdXKunCLALBMOJ2j&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjQ0MWQzNC1lNzU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JVXK6nQUSUVJ5ONeITj8LYOIkv_zosn8vvSLRBEIC8Q=&emci=708ab1bf-2559-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=8b441d34-e759-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6125529)

_Original Message from Dr. Annie Andrews:_

Friends,

Just last week, a Michigan community was traumatized by a school shooting that took multiple lives, and hurt the hearts of many.

But while the full scope of this tragedy was unfolding, NRA-endorsed Nancy Mace wasn’t using her platform in Congress to propose legislation to stop further school shootings — instead, she was picking immature fights on Twitter with her colleagues.

[I believe we need real action to prevent gun violence. Join me in calling on Congress to take action to keep our children, friends, and families safe →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39544881/320307192/-1844896122?refcode=AA_EM_PT_1MO_211210_1_2&refcode2=&contactdata=qXApHtOxcrL612gr2ti%2FwVdxVYbjnGFbNKPW%2FlBdDcF5Yja5AdXKunCLALBMOJ2j&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjQ0MWQzNC1lNzU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JVXK6nQUSUVJ5ONeITj8LYOIkv_zosn8vvSLRBEIC8Q=&emci=708ab1bf-2559-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=8b441d34-e759-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6125529)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39544890/320307200/-1844896122?refcode=AA_EM_PT_1MO_211210_1_2&refcode2=&contactdata=qXApHtOxcrL612gr2ti%2FwVdxVYbjnGFbNKPW%2FlBdDcF5Yja5AdXKunCLALBMOJ2j&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjQ0MWQzNC1lNzU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JVXK6nQUSUVJ5ONeITj8LYOIkv_zosn8vvSLRBEIC8Q=&emci=708ab1bf-2559-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=8b441d34-e759-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6125529)
---

**Gun violence is now the #1 cause of death among children in America.**

The tragedy at Oxford High School shows how many steps we could be taking to prevent more violence. From secure storage laws to expanded background checks, we can and must do more.

As a pediatrician, I’ve treated multiple pediatric gunshot victims and seen firsthand how traumatizing and horrifying gun violence is to our current and future generations. As a mom, I have heard the fear in my own children’s voices when they describe lockdown drills. We need our elected officials to take action _now_.

[Sign on today if you agree we need to protect our schools, churches, and communities from gun violence →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39544893/320307207/-1844896122?refcode=AA_EM_PT_1MO_211210_1_2&refcode2=&contactdata=qXApHtOxcrL612gr2ti%2FwVdxVYbjnGFbNKPW%2FlBdDcF5Yja5AdXKunCLALBMOJ2j&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjQ0MWQzNC1lNzU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JVXK6nQUSUVJ5ONeITj8LYOIkv_zosn8vvSLRBEIC8Q=&emci=708ab1bf-2559-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=8b441d34-e759-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6125529)

Thank you,

Annie

I’d be lying to you if I said I wasn’t pretty upset about what my team just told me.

We came up well short of our November fundraising goal, and I’ve got to say that’s not good. Chuck Schumer’s going to be foaming at the mouth to take a shot at me this month, knowing that I don’t have the resources to fight back. Thanks for your support, — Team Martin | Dr. Jason Martin is running for Governor because now more than ever Tennessee needs a leader who will start working to meet all of our needs. As an ICU physician, Dr. Martin has seen firsthand the devastating consequences of lies, corruption, and divisiveness in Nashville. This campaign — by and for ALL Tennesseans — is the antidote. = | = | Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee 1831 12th Avenue S #175 Nashville, TN 37203 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Tom Perez
subject: Did you see Cecile’s email?
body:
Last week, the Supreme Court heard arguments in the most consequential abortion rights case in 50 years, and activists say it's likely the Court's decision could severely limit abortion access, or overturn Roe entirely.

Peter,

Last week, the Supreme Court heard arguments in the most consequential abortion rights case in 50 years, and activists say it's likely the Court's decision could severely limit abortion access, or overturn _Roe_ entirely. **And just this morning, the Justices issued a decision on Texas' abortion ban, allowing the law to stand. **

That's why I'm checking in to make sure you saw Cecile Richards' email, team. She's absolutely right when she says it's _critical_ to elect Democratic governors who will keep abortion safe and legal and make reproductive health a priority.

I couldn't be more proud to have her support, and I hope I can count on yours, too.

_**[As Governor, I promise that I will not only maintain Maryland's strong track record on reproductive freedom, I'll expand it. First, I need your support to secure the Democratic nomination in a crowded primary. Please chip in $7 or whatever you can to support our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39545265/320308560/-633456140?refcode=bpi-em-20211210-cecileendorse-kicker-ND&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjkwMWQwNy1lOTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e08Sx8uzBkaVTkENi4nLMCVzVzcZ3IRHdD1vv9pfYww=)**_

Thank you for helping out,

Tom

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Cecile Richards
Date: December 8, 2021
Subject: Now is not the time to sit on the sidelines
Folks,

Just last week, the Supreme Court heard arguments in the most consequential abortion rights case in 50 years after all but green lighting Texas' heinous abortion ban.

I am not exaggerating when I say the future of _Roe_ hangs in the balance. It's _critical_ that we use our power to elect Democratic governors, who will fight like hell to protect reproductive freedom and uphold our values -- no matter what the Court decides to do.

**That’s why I’m asking you to join me in supporting Tom Perez for Maryland Governor.

[Tom has championed reproductive freedom his entire career, and he'll continue to do so as Maryland's governor. Can I count on you to support Tom's campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39545266/320308561/-633456140?refcode=bpi-em-20211210-cecileendorse-kicker-ND&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjkwMWQwNy1lOTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e08Sx8uzBkaVTkENi4nLMCVzVzcZ3IRHdD1vv9pfYww=)**

As a country, we have a lot of work to do to realize a future where our lives, bodies, work, and families are safe and protected. **I know Tom Perez is the right person to take on this monumental challenge.**

He championed reproductive freedom as the head of the Civil Rights division in the Department of Justice, where he aggressively enforced the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act, and protected women’s access to critical health services. He expanded health care for workers as Labor Secretary. And he stood shoulder to shoulder with organizers from across the country to defeat Donald Trump in 2020.

I’ve seen him lead with determination, grit, and compassion countless times in our work together, and I know he’ll bring the same fire to Annapolis. **I could not be more proud to endorse him for Governor. I hope you’ll join me in supporting him, too.**

**[Chip in now to support Tom’s campaign for Governor and elect a champion for reproductive freedom here in Maryland.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39545273/320308568/-633456140?refcode=bpi-em-20211210-cecileendorse-kicker-ND&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjkwMWQwNy1lOTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e08Sx8uzBkaVTkENi4nLMCVzVzcZ3IRHdD1vv9pfYww=)**

Let’s go,

Cecile Richards

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Your thoughts on the Second Amendment
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zuvsquq01hinnra0235867tbce66qran9pbs5aj8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shhm4p36cjh2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ziabu9jnrp8o7fo3vej9ltsg528ebddom3eepsn8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shhm4p36cjh2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf72a4ob88l92birpgmfktglp7s65jcq6n8sl4v0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shhm4p36cjh2bs)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry—supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zm8ja3jjs5hmbbpp91d7ud69fvs3jkucjlr7tcl8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shhm4p36cjh2bs)**
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zue6gdomfafcafq1magljbu4pebjn48q12cbnqjg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu0b7p40losebrj21h51ssk2ngpg5fbn76af42r0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cji66oj4cpie49fg)
