Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in Imprimis , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of first principles.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it. That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief Second Amendment Survey. You can complete the survey today at this secure link: We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we reach and teach millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations. After completing your Second Amendment Survey , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry—supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed Second Amendment Survey. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our Second Amendment Survey at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

We're coming up $5,191 short and I would appreciate your support. But first, let me explain why I recently signed the no fossil fuel money pledge.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39545562/320309718/-787496292?refcode=em-121021-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2ZmYzQ4MS1lYTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sHTMb1bI2sCi94HA-h6RKh8FGtrXfbHJkY8L2BoAWEI=)
_I'm prioritizing the health of my kiddos and our Central Valley community over fossil fuel profits #NoFossilFuelMoney_
**The no fossil fuel money pledge means I'm refusing donations from oil, gas, and coal industry executives, lobbyists, and PACs** \-- and here in the Central Valley, we know all too well that fossil fuels and corporate polluters harm our health and the environment.

I see it with the kiddos I teach. Pollution and smoke is very harmful -- especially during recess. I've watched some struggle with asthma and other complications due to climate change and our deteriorating environment.

**I'd rather prioritize the health of our families, climate, and democracy over fossil fuel industry profits -- but that means I need a ton of people chipping in grassroots amounts if we're going to fund this campaign the right way.**

**[Will you chip in $5, $15, or even $35 to help fund our outreach efforts? The more we raise now, the more Democrats and undecided voters we'll be able to reach. subject: Trump is waiting. Are you going to join him? 🔗
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:

name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: What are your 2022 priorities?
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39546630/320314376/-2081290588?code=jtk1132-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmJiNjAxNC1lYzU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Po8Ud5bUdBy2ENxITPhRdt3LNtwSqv1Pnhorp-XVxOE=&emci=fe815a7f-0d59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=96bb6014-ec59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24265352)
---
Peter,

I've been so grateful to have you on my side as I push our state toward a brighter future.
In just the few years since I've taken office, we've already accomplished so much together: We've slashed taxes to put money back into the pockets of working families, invested in small businesses, strengthened public education, legalized cannabis, vaccinated our state against the COVID-19 pandemic, and so much more.
I couldn't be more proud of the progress we've made since 2019, but our work is far from over. I'll never stop fighting for New Mexico, and I'm excited to hit the ground running in the new year.
**As this year comes to an end, I'm dreaming big about how to deliver even more opportunities for New Mexicans, and I'm turning to my top supporters for input. Before I meet with my team on Monday to finetune our strategy for 2022, will you tell me your aspirations for our great state?**
**[Peter, please take my survey before Dec. 12 at midnight to tell me your top priorities for 2022.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39546631/320314377/-721838313?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1132-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmJiNjAxNC1lYzU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Po8Ud5bUdBy2ENxITPhRdt3LNtwSqv1Pnhorp-XVxOE=&emci=fe815a7f-0d59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=96bb6014-ec59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24265352)**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39546632/320314378/-721838313?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1132-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmJiNjAxNC1lYzU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Po8Ud5bUdBy2ENxITPhRdt3LNtwSqv1Pnhorp-XVxOE=&emci=fe815a7f-0d59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=96bb6014-ec59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24265352)

Thank you for joining this grassroots team.

Michelle Lujan Grisham

body:
| Thanks to Trump’s far-right Supreme Court Justices (like Brett Kavanaugh), public opinion of the Supreme Court is PLUMMETING. | **_As a trusted Democrat in your city, we need to know what YOU think:_** [DO YOU APPROVE OF THE SUPREME COURT?](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/SCOTUS/?refcode=VPP_20211210_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=6&akid=1004%2E878179%2EBSAR7K) [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/SCOTUS/?refcode=VPP_20211210_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=7&akid=1004%2E878179%2EBSAR7K) | [YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/SCOTUS/?refcode=VPP_20211210_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=8&akid=1004%2E878179%2EBSAR7K) | [NO »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/SCOTUS/?refcode=VPP_20211210_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=9&akid=1004%2E878179%2EBSAR7K)
---|---
THIS POLL WILL CLOSE IN ONE HOUR — YOUR RESPONSE IS DUE IMMEDIATELY UPON OPENING THIS EMAIL.
Look, thanks to the work of decades of Republican meddling, the Supreme Court is out of control! The far-right court is:

❌ GUTTING the Voting Rights Act
❌ FAILING to protect workers
❌ And now, they’re aiming to undermine _Roe v. Wade!_

We get sick to our stomachs thinking about justices like Brett Kavanaugh and Amy Coney Barrett — _but we need to hear from our TOP supporters now!_
[DO YOU APPROVE OF THE SUPREME COURT?](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/SCOTUS/?refcode=VPP_20211210_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=10&akid=1004%2E878179%2EBSAR7K) | [YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/SCOTUS/?refcode=VPP_20211210_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=11&akid=1004%2E878179%2EBSAR7K) | [NO »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/SCOTUS/?refcode=VPP_20211210_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=12&akid=1004%2E878179%2EBSAR7K)
---|---
Thank you,

_VPP_

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. name: Hendrell Remus
subject: re: redistricting
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]

Peter,

We are asking Tennessee Republicans, “Where are the maps?!” Democratic legislators have been seeking public input on new maps for months while Republican legislators have been drawing lines behind closed doors to suit their own interests.

It’s not fair to keep Tennesseans waiting. We have no confidence in their ability to be fair and to draw maps that allow people to choose their representatives and not the other way around. You can bet that when the rest of the lines are released we’ll pursue legal action against every unfair map Republicans put out.

We have a team of lawyers ready to defend fair representation, but we need your help. Can you chip in to our Redistricting Fund now to make sure Republicans don’t get away with gerrymandering Tennessee? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

We also have the opportunity to help our communities by learning what redistricting is and why it matters, which is why we’re hosting a training to make sure everyone is informed. Sign up below.

What: Redistricting: What it is and why it matters.
Where: Zoom (sign up below to reserve your spot)
When: Monday, December 13 at 6PM CT
SIGN UP [https://www.mobilize.us/tndp/event/430412/]

Yours in the fight,

Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]https://www.facebook.com/tndem
[https://www.facebook.com/tndem] https://twitter.com/tndp [https://twitter.com/tndp]
https://www.instagram.com/tndems [https://www.instagram.com/tndems]

CAROL V. ABNEY, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.

Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

body:

| Peter -
---
| Interesting new strategy from the Democrats...
The Democratic National Committee just released a new attack ad against Jim Jordan, Marjorie Taylor Green, Paul Gosar, and me - and it seems like they're doing us a huge favor. They used a ton of their own money to highlight our bold, patriotic vision for America FOR US.
I'd like to send my personal thanks to the DNC for paying for this new ad that perfectly sums up what we as conservative fighters are going to accomplish next year.
Please, run this new ad in Florida - it will save my team and me a lot of effort!

Donald J. Trump is even going to have my vote for Speaker!

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39547096/320316451/69228752?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjFlYWRlYS1lZDU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tQRPcccq6ErNEkUcWJxDRrlYRS-6NuB_A9MyQp1-vC8=&emci=cd826e02-d959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=a21eadea-ed59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15353729)

Peter --

This morning, I was endorsed by EMILY's List. They have a long history of supporting pro-choice women running for office, and I'm honored to have their endorsement.

Here's what they had to say:
"Tina Kotek is a proven fighter for opportunity and justice, and EMILY's List is thrilled to stand with her as she runs for governor of Oregon. To continue making real, meaningful progress for families throughout the state, we must elect Tina Kotek as Oregon's next governor." - Laphonza Butler, President of EMILY's List
We need women in leadership defending access to reproductive health care and standing up for working families. Right now, Republicans across the country are carrying out an unprecedented assault on abortion rights. And they're trying to bring their tactics here to Oregon.

Oregon is a national leader in reproductive health care access, and if I am your next Governor, it will stay that way.

[**The stakes of this election couldn't be more clear, and we can't win without you. If you can, pitch in $5, or more so we can continue fighting to protect reproductive freedom for everyone.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39547097/320316452/83565961?refcode=em21_211210_emilyslist&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjFlYWRlYS1lZDU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tQRPcccq6ErNEkUcWJxDRrlYRS-6NuB_A9MyQp1-vC8=)

name: Ashley Ehasz
subject: BREAKING: Supreme Court’s decision on choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39547438/320317797/-46617290?refcode=fl_em_fr_20211210scotus_ae_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzEwM2I3Ny1lZjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tjdcWyoCQ26Yc7FuCRoyfkCeDc56vxmSM-vvfplcmI0=)
---
Breaking news, friend: **The U.S. Supreme Court just issued its ruling on Texas’s extreme 6-week abortion ban, and in a 5-4 decision, they’re allowing the law to go into effect while the appeals process continues.** This is a disturbing day, friend, and means that pregnant people in Texas — especially those who are poor — will have little to no reproductive choice, unless they have the means to travel out-of-state. As this case goes back to the courts, today’s decision does not bode well for _Roe v. Wade_. It’s all the more reason we need legislators in Congress to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law and protect every person’s right to choice. **My opponent and PA-01’s Republican Representative Brian Fitzpatrick has voted again and again against the right to choose.** **[Help me replace him in 2022 and defend our reproductive freedom in Congress: rush a donation of $10 or more to support our campaign now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39547439/320317799/-46617290?refcode=fl_em_fr_20211210scotus_ae_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzEwM2I3Ny1lZjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tjdcWyoCQ26Yc7FuCRoyfkCeDc56vxmSM-vvfplcmI0=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Breaking news, friend: The U.S. Supreme Court just issued its ruling on Texas’s extreme 6-week abortion ban, and in a 5-4 decision, they’re allowing the law to go into effect while the appeals process continues. This is a disturbing day, friend, and means that pregnant people in Texas — especially those who are poor — will have little to no reproductive choice, unless they have the means to travel out-of-state. As this case goes back to the courts, today’s decision does not bode well for Roe v. Wade. It’s all the more reason we need legislators in Congress to codify Roe v. Wade into law and protect every person’s right to choice. My opponent and PA-01’s Republican Representative Brian Fitzpatrick has voted again and again against the right to choose. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = — Ashley | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District: to provide our communities with the services and opportunities they need to thrive, to create positive change, and to ensure the next generation will have a better future ahead of them. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. | | Howdy Peter,

Tomorrow is our relaunch rally into TX-2 called Liberty On The Lake with MAGA stars Bryson Gray & Forgiato Blow, Payton Howie, and Jameson Ellis.

Special guest speakers include:

* Aaron Sorrells (candidate for Lt. Governer)
* Dr. Billy Graff (candidate for Montgomery Co. Judge)
* Carmen Montiel (candidate for TX-18 to fire Sheila Jackson-Lee)
* Bob Nevens (freedom fighter against vax mandates)
* Shawn Scott (Don Huffines Campaign)
* Jonathan Hullihan (candidate for TX-8)
* Jameson Ellis (candidate for TX-2 to fire Dan Crenshaw)

Tickets are only $5 for general admission.

Private VIP Luncheon with Bryson Gray, Forgiato Blow, Payton Howie, and Jameson Ellis is 1pm - 3pm at the venue and tickets are still available for $500.

Grab yours while you still can!

subject: Republicans are negotiating away your right to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| This might be one of the most important emails you read today. So, let's get right to it: **Ohio Republicans are trying to make it harder for hard working Ohioans to cast their vote.**

Ohio Republicans are helping lead the charge of voter suppression bills that we're seeing introduced across the country.

Listen, Republicans control our state legislature so we're at a disadvantage the minute they present their voter suppression bill.

We're prepared to fight this upcoming legislation every step of the way. We'll take the fight to court if we have to, but we need to ensure we have the resources to win. [**Help us fill our Ohio Voting Rights Legal Fund by making a donation of $10 or more right away.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39547700/320318786/1743532738?gpsid=31_134_19319&refcode=em21_210610_WS3_fnd_gq_new__lw_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210610_WS3_fnd_gq_new__lw_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=odem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDJkOGUyNi1mMDU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xDZyb9wAeCW0SP0mYkhN4dgCt3MBitHL80BtWxhgkgg=)

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Lisa Hanson is in Jail
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=lisa_hanson_is_in_jail&n=1)
---
December 10th, 2021
## Lisa Hanson is in Jail
Last night, Lisa Hanson was sentenced to 90 days in jail for her defiance of Governor Walz' illegal and unconstitutional orders. Judge Joseph Bueltel threw the book at Mrs. Hanson. "You wanted to make money over the interest of public safety," stated Bueltel. "You don't recognize the law. You don't think you're subject to the law." What damn law did Lisa break? A Governor cannot makes laws. That is clearly a violation of our State Constitution. Lisa who is an upstanding citizen, with no criminal background, will not be spending Christmas with her grandchildren this year because of this injustice. Meanwhile, the Radical Left is letting violent, repeat offenders out of prison and not prosecuting rioters and looters. This is unbelievable! **[Read our article](https://www.action4liberty.com/judge_sentences_lisa_hanson?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=lisa_hanson_is_in_jail&n=2).** **Jake Duesenberg** **Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=lisa_hanson_is_in_jail&n=3 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=lisa_hanson_is_in_jail&n=3)

Judge Joseph Bueltel threw the book at Mrs. Hanson. "You wanted to make money over the interest of public safety," stated Bueltel. "You don't recognize the law. You don't think you're subject to the law." What damn law did Lisa break? A Governor cannot makes laws. That is clearly a violation of our State Constitution. Lisa who is an upstanding citizen, with no criminal background, will not be spending Christmas with her grandchildren this year because of this injustice. Meanwhile, the Radical Left is letting violent, repeat offenders out of prison and not prosecuting rioters and looters. This is unbelievable! . Jake Duesenberg Action 4 Liberty | "Support Us"

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: at a tipping point
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Van Hollen for Senate
body:
| |
---
Nearly one year after the January 6th insurrection, Republicans refuse to give up Trump's Big Lie. In fact they are doubling down on it in states across the country and using it as a pretext to pass new voter suppression laws. As if that was not enough, the new ideological majority on the Supreme Court cannot hide its eagerness to overturn long established precedents that define a woman's right to reproductive freedom, tear down laws upholding the separation of church and state, and remove even the minimal restraints some states have established for when and where someone can carry a gun. Our democracy can't survive if the majority of Americans have no say. That’s why I’m working to end or amend the filibuster so that we can defend our democracy with robust federal legislation to secure voting rights, end partisan gerrymandering, protect reproductive rights, enact common-sense gun safety laws and end secret money in politics. [Mitch McConnell and his big money SuperPACs are ready to do anything to stop us and win back control of the Senate to pursue their narrow special interest agenda at the expense of the rest of the country. clean_body: | | Nearly one year after the January 6th insurrection, Republicans refuse to give up Trump's Big Lie. In fact they are doubling down on it in states across the country and using it as a pretext to pass new voter suppression laws. As if that was not enough, the new ideological majority on the Supreme Court cannot hide its eagerness to overturn long established precedents that define a woman's right to reproductive freedom, tear down laws upholding the separation of church and state, and remove even the minimal restraints some states have established for when and where someone can carry a gun. Our democracy can't survive if the majority of Americans have no say. subject: Meet the Young Guns!

body:
We need just 5 seats to take Congress, and these are the Young Guns leading the charge
&nbs; p;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?31nnz--fgxr-4qqlpo1&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

Fellow Conservative,

We need just 5 seats to take Congress next fall, and today I am meeting with some of the Young Guns who will take us to that majority:
* Esther Joy King (IL-17)
* Amanda Adkins (KS-03)
* Bruce Poliquin (ME-02)
* Ryan Zinke (MT-01)
* Tom Kean Jr. (NJ-07)
* Monica De La Cruz (TX-15)
* Wesley Hunt (TX-38)
* Derrick Van Orden (WI-03)

These are some of the strongest Republican candidates in the country, which is why we chose them to be a part of our Young Guns recruitment and support program. It is absolutely CRITICAL that these candidates have the resources and support they need to win — [**can I tell them that they have your support?**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31nnz-1ot7v-4qqlpo6/)
[**SUPPORT THE YOUNG GUNS**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31nnz-1ot7w-4qqlpo7/)
I launched the Young Guns program in 2007 to identify and support winning candidates across the country who embody the principles of the House Republican Conference. I’m proud to welcome these candidates to the Young Guns program and I look forward to working together to not only take the House — but to build a lasting Republican majority.
[**Please chip in now to support our effort to take back Congress and FIRE Nancy Pelosi:**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31nnz-1ot7x-4qqlpo8/)
[**RUSH $25**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31nnz-1ot7y-4qqlpo9/)
[**RUSH $50**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31nnz-1ot7z-4qqlpo0/)
[**RUSH $100**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31nnz-1ot80-4qqlpo7/)
[**RUSH $250**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31nnz-1ot81-4qqlpo8/)
[**RUSH CUSTOM AMOUNT**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31nnz-1ot82-4qqlpo9/)
Thank you for investing in our future,
[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31nnz-1ot83-4qqlpo0/)
Leader Kevin McCarthy

**A Note from Kevin:**

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31nnz-1ot84-4qqlpo1/)
As Leader of the House Republicans, I’m committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. I’m incredibly grateful for your support in this fight and want you to know that I’m doing everything in my power to secure victory for Republicans. Your sustained support fuels our grassroots movement and provides us with the resources necessary to combat the Left’s political games. If you’d like to make another contribution, I will fight tooth and nail to ensure every cent goes towards advancing the conservative agenda and winning back the House -- [**EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31nnz-1ot85-4qqlpo2/)

The fight is far from over, and we’re only getting started.

Kevin McCarthy
_Leader, House Republicans_ |

subject: Christy's not slowing down!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39549019/320326868/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDRlNjk3Ny1mNDU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fHSPuo4-62U-ILJCcX1WnFmtGcoK1mbblrMJKx-JTB8=&emci=9d45143c-0b59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=504e6977-f459-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

The days may be getting shorter and cooler, but we're not letting that slow us down! Between taking a vocal stand on reproductive freedom and getting out and meeting with members of the houseless community, **there is simply too much to get done for the people of CA-25.**

Here's a glimpse of what we've been up to:
* * *

Christy had a great time marching in the Lancaster Holiday Parade last week! Thank you to the Antelope Valley Progressive Democrats for bringing it all together.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39549020/320326869/-1401856893?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDRlNjk3Ny1mNDU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fHSPuo4-62U-ILJCcX1WnFmtGcoK1mbblrMJKx-JTB8=&emci=9d45143c-0b59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=504e6977-f459-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=11385749)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39549021/320326870/-1401856893?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDRlNjk3Ny1mNDU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fHSPuo4-62U-ILJCcX1WnFmtGcoK1mbblrMJKx-JTB8=&emci=9d45143c-0b59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=504e6977-f459-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=11385749)
---
* * *

In light of the recent SCOTUS hearings over abortion rights, Christy released a _fiery_ new video where she talks about a very personal story and why reproductive rights are the front and center of this campaign:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39549022/320326871/-803653937?v=EoWsckqRpQA&t=3s&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDRlNjk3Ny1mNDU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fHSPuo4-62U-ILJCcX1WnFmtGcoK1mbblrMJKx-JTB8=&emci=9d45143c-0b59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=504e6977-f459-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=11385749)
---
* * *

Christy's campaign was recently highlighted in a Jezebel article, where she talked about the needs of the district, including the dire need for more Planned Parenthoods and women's health clinics. Christy will continue to be a staunch and outspoken advocate for reproductive justice in CA-25 and the nation. name: MISSING: Vaccine Survey Response
subject: Freedom means no VACCINE MANDATES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
I'm not seeing your name on the list of conservatives who have taken our four question vaccine mandate survey

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdao76kiuv2m357jnad14pa8tctfp5lnkn7vj8c8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shhm6ob4c9h2bs)
---

Fellow American,

In August the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. **Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION!**

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 21 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn6j7vvovml8q9jh8nmb4v8ua6ep484n8mns62no_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shhm6ob4c9h2bs)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq4ke0elg5ghku5hd71fqbbcksfahbktgtoe190o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shhm6ob4c9h2bs)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, December 10th

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgal4a1tb6i1i9abmm0iocn25toocsja1cfgna0g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shhm6ob4c9h2bs)

---

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!** Now, if you work for a company with more than 100 employees, the government is going to try to force you to get vaccinated!

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zocj7r8vg2kvf0n1n830iisc9hgsvnh7rmfog99g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shhm6ob4c9h2bs)**

Thanks for letting us know –

Thank you,
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zup54ng9imi9c0m4uibogl2hmln8ven1b4sce6kg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shhm6ob4c9h2bs)
Jim Jordan

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9cs8b7c3e00mbtl7ci785opk359sbfel504fgn8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shhm6ob4c9h2bs)

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

[**Visit ICYMI News**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0fainakhe354envkiqs0euukfsblpbvke9fautg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shhm6ob4c9h2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to change your subscription preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi8f9u327vsa6tbt7elvn43fi2t8bk2tolueplq0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9jle8r7ccjkm1on9dtjmppq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmuju1df34kqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr69bls2on2s3isujqact4moqfbd5jmkrncst66uqrf8pnm9qrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb0sbkmuprf972u9hf8t32eirm2sb4mdo63cbm6li3asj46pr3edj16qp6acbie1jmcor4mso67c35mup238h1e8he4933cpie8or3c5i64oh5u)

Thanks for letting us know – Thank you, Jim Jordan | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x-UnXZEV9rwWCU4oSd5EZQK5i5bJ0D_H_09LgcZp5uFE0uIjofAduQty9vNFY-fIJx01XUjbTm2D6OW3zxZqi8wMX-4s00wP75TvOj2Wd4eJT-uL_4A3ItqdeESh-wdnQl-rNC5oobr5DCnfolhC0UtIWEmGljJlW52b0kuQdiahAGJDHrPyennp3b8RYgEoz7_BEiB7ubLsvvFEFXXkB39g1lSa9OZSGhm1auSlwFNu7FGp_IK0sTpWfD2ErCPqgnHa8GzJD6qUecQRhrgN5kARiYuRxnKIjqzzzUf6-ZxI_WIovW4JnUIM6cKgZcC3m3wBr55mjkIG7onsVPp9N3Z4HXM69Q_tqC5kLxZd2l8w/3hq/QD539L5iT2e4_urBTPt9aA/h0/Mxfrzm6XMLYDWnHGMnZ3w0rjEaV6M2cGprm2350VWE0)

| Kevin McCarthy voted NO on investment in clean drinking water.
Meanwhile, the water in Bakersfield, California is contaminated with Chromium-6 — a chemical that increases the risk of cancer 30 times over. **I’m running for Congress to fight for our communities — not poison them. Can you make a donation to our people-powered movement to defeat him in 2022?** [Contribute »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x-UnXZEV9rwWCU4oSd5EZQUsZlh8KLgwzrCWTT_IwMV6PwFPZONDk5xQBbGBgfKQrgK0I1sHNMvr8YCb6a64VKC_t04DRPCLTheVLTHRjo8kGHU7raLzaVfvtOMacOUWxRJ9QNOqKJVXxBDo3AslrQRqJb42-EA59tr2UcNYGmDF8tpSexHcSWcK1RGTEeyMFJ4PAgJpBaUMMilTOqqZ_kLweBo5XfZhl0wfNcDNQCg-ifK4cs_6fwB3rxJjWKRUGg1XyP9m1EFf316qmf1FhXptRgJOxz3y6TWf-t9HRk2TxDcT6KQs6Newhf8lEy4idTYNC86j8sSJs6dblryLSB9kOwvvFIVk8K4cBZ_Oan3UNI8TgXY_bFIWGtXs0Sxi4/3hq/QD539L5iT2e4_urBTPt9aA/h1/Glvka5HZG6wsVDMsFgcXNRXqfW9aRlfW_wpXc309y9c)
---

It’s kind of unfathomable. If you represent a community that has some of the most toxic drinking water in the country — contaminated by Chromium-6, a chemical linked to cancer — wouldn’t you do everything you can to make sure that water is cleaned up?
Kevin McCarthy has been in Congress for over ten years. He’s had the time to address this. Instead, he’s ignored the people he represents at every turn.
[**Watch this video to learn more about the toxins in Bakersfield’s water — and then make a contribution to help defeat Kevin McCarthy and elect leadership that actually gives a damn about our community.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x-UnXZEV9rwWCU4oSd5EZQUsZlh8KLgwzrCWTT_IwMV6PwFPZONDk5xQBbGBgfKQpyqNncKPrABf55WUyIqme_sW-O4YhAMHZk0Bj2SLMMLlI4D6Rh_XZmYMy0g2sYBZF8y0YQQTRu3wsIMsp7jbU5knlhpzR4auvOTBG_YpzRqjUk9vQ3vDL7xEzTxcrHf2yRbFoW9GWkXtCzvsG4zLGO9Me0giVjus58AiLfYVUCb8ADnQCCtd9WCP_sBW62KNurb67rNs50iu4pfgwToiMndvs3n_St2FQFsby9fURrvbK3D-6sCu93SMlsvontZ-nRaD-07QOH7aTZ47eReTXjuUKfJiSuer-CR9pPaRd77oL2MO8kXeJog1B6VwgeRXo/3hq/QD539L5iT2e4_urBTPt9aA/h2/SyXo3c7MM2jOdNj-yTxLnKebtfPEzwAJH9bnPLgjXJ8)

This is water that we use every day of our lives.

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I hate to be the one to tell you this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
My team just informed me [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8261%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=hC4kUhrAYWrXKnzZOWZLFA&sysid=1)
My team just informed me

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19340%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Rou6GfpMyl3nC2c167pKjg&sysid=1)
---

Folks,

I’d be lying to you if I said I wasn’t pretty upset about what my team just told me.

We came up well short of our November fundraising goal, and I’ve got to say that’s not good. Chuck Schumer’s going to be foaming at the mouth to take a shot at me this month, knowing that I don’t have the resources to fight back. Now I can take a punch, but I don’t want to take one if I can avoid it. **[So, if you’re able and willing to help me out, it’d mean the world to me if you’d rush what you can to support my re-election campaign for 2022.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19341%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ARJW0mQmazOtKHzt%2ft%2fSDg&sysid=1)**

---

**[If you can rush $5, $10, or even $100 so I can fight back, I promise you I won’t forget it.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19343%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TOrzO7%2fbsYVUfrcNcKRRhg&sysid=1)**

Your support is the only thing that keeps me in this fight to stop the Socialist Agenda.

Together, we’re going to be able to stop their attacks on our freedom and our Democracy.
[RUSH YOUR SUPPORT HERE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19344%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XW%2fr718deR9hKFY0rc28EA&sysid=1)

Thank you for helping me make up ground and fight back against Chuck and the Radical Left.

God Bless,

name: David Palmer
subject: I’ll save you the sports metaphors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Palmer for Illinois
body:
My plan to move our communities forward | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39549527/320329768/312490568?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDQ1YTc4YS1mNzU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=igZaARBjeHr22xzEUTZor6PY5R3enVKhUs8606SXEok=) | Peter, When I was a little kid, I dreamed of making it big in the NBA. I thought that one day I’d make my living by dazzling thousands of spectators, sinking three-pointers, and dunking on my opponents. **What I didn’t realize then, though, was that playing basketball professionally would bring me so much more than I could imagine as a 10 year old – it taught me the importance of teamwork and commitment that would extend to every other facet of my life.** My commitment to Central Illinois is steadfast, and my commitment to bringing change to Congress is relentless. **It is constantly renewed by the incredible potential I see from our cities to our farmland and everywhere in between.** [**Chip in now to support our campaign that is intently focused on the policies that directly address the issues facing the residents of our community.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39549528/320329769/694734457?refcode=commitment121021&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDQ1YTc4YS1mNzU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=igZaARBjeHr22xzEUTZor6PY5R3enVKhUs8606SXEok=) You might not think that from playing basketball internationally for years would be the perfect stepping stone to running for office, but hear me out. I believe that in order to make our communities stronger for our future and the future of the next generation, we must come together as a team. A team with a game plan that will find creative solutions to our challenges and uplift our strengths. **A team with the commitment to tackle the issues before us by putting people, not politics, first.** **As we navigate a time in our country where there is great division, we must remember that commitment to a singular goal will bring us a future we can all be proud of.** [**Will you stand with me and support me in this journey to strengthening our communities for every single Illinoisan that calls the 13th District home? Make a donation today to help me keep up the momentum.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39549529/320329770/694734457?refcode=commitment121021&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDQ1YTc4YS1mNzU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=igZaARBjeHr22xzEUTZor6PY5R3enVKhUs8606SXEok=) I am committed to being a leader you can count on. It’s what we all deserve. David
---
* * *
[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39549530/320329771/312490568?refcode=footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDQ1YTc4YS1mNzU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=igZaARBjeHr22xzEUTZor6PY5R3enVKhUs8606SXEok=) Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. body:
It’s a power grab, plain and simple. | | **_A Republican power grab in Ohio might be the GOP’s most brazen yet_** "Republicans in Ohio recently enacted new maps that would give them a supermajority in the state legislature – completely ignoring reforms that prevent this." _\- The Guardian_
---
**__[TAKE THE POLL: Do you think Ohio’s new legislative maps are fair?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39550037/320331699/1071830460?refcode=ea.706f105e-f959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.706f105e-f959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDZmMTA1ZS1mOTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jk7MdtSar1lYLx0KfLOB8IAACqMOwtCfYcBbYDRe3FA=&emci=7aa4d959-f159-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=706f105e-f959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=22604289)__**
Twice in the last ten years, Ohioans voted to reform our redistricting process to be fairer, less partisan, and more representative.
**Now the GOP is flat out ignoring us, and we are furious.**
The top Republicans in Ohio’s legislature used their power on the redistricting commission to draw maps in secret — maps that will let Republicans hold onto power no matter what the voters say. They’re giving themselves a supermajority in the legislature and _at least 12_ of our 15 congressional districts.
_Everyone — even Republicans in Columbus — knows that outcome would be absolutely inconsistent with what the majority of Ohioans want._
**It’s a power grab, plain and simple.**
**_[John wants to know what YOU think of the GOP’s partisan gerrymandering, friend. Do you think that our new legislative maps are fair?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39550039/320331700/1071830460?refcode=ea.706f105e-f959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.706f105e-f959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDZmMTA1ZS1mOTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jk7MdtSar1lYLx0KfLOB8IAACqMOwtCfYcBbYDRe3FA=&emci=7aa4d959-f159-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=706f105e-f959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=22604289)_**
[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39550041/320331701/1071830460?refcode=ea.706f105e-f959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.706f105e-f959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDZmMTA1ZS1mOTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jk7MdtSar1lYLx0KfLOB8IAACqMOwtCfYcBbYDRe3FA=&emci=7aa4d959-f159-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=706f105e-f959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=22604289) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39550042/320331703/1071830460?refcode=ea.706f105e-f959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.706f105e-f959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDZmMTA1ZS1mOTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jk7MdtSar1lYLx0KfLOB8IAACqMOwtCfYcBbYDRe3FA=&emci=7aa4d959-f159-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=706f105e-f959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=22604289)

Peter,

Soon President Trump and Melania Trump will be celebrating Christmas with their family, and we want to make this holiday season as special as we can for them.

That’s why we’re inviting you to wish President Donald J. Trump and Melania Trump a Merry Christmas... [**by signing our Golden 5th Annual Christmas Card to them!**](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=6092c471fd6e44b3ac30a1925e00820a&_e=6OQzBApvvu-E27rGmeqmJX1a9LydSObQqnyk6SLWDg8-Zy47t1M6LqsYygCR2RkJvM47f3MuKToDHQpPucWtb3AkhcC40les_R2kqe0NszYL_j4iG-T5XRYNxioDofWAIavhDsQfGKOVcR5zDQHLFYIPe2u7l9NuLMnnpPZNEfr4J3naOF8UInBY_gCAChcmaeW7PqR_77_3xuPkdC19wskKh-FebP2AG_H-E-yn7ygOAvkeqMHUEB-kh-O9PCTJZbU-LCYXuqDg6-Blnea3DKs9abcadSiGydJY3r2TZmFFHugXQX0lyRpBVXF5WeJ0kpBnpYFt3SgKET2ql2Bnx2E-nwwjA7NSiPwjJYmAJmNQRSGu2xg4kxhNd8XAF5KVMipyk9syBb6OtzGXsuxDkjeX91URSMFZ2scFU73cyJZsZiz607FGHKXLrIRQ-Qkk)

_CNN_ and _Roll Call_ are both calling Ron Johnson the most vulnerable Republican Senator up in 2022, and we're hearing he is expected to announce his re-election very soon. We need to be ready to hit the ground running as soon as he does.

Washington Republicans and outside groups plan to blanket Wisconsin with millions of dollars in false attacks to protect Ron Johnson and keep this seat red. And, look, we already know that kind of money can swing an election. Especially in a battleground state like ours.

Even worse? Ron Johnson is on _Fox News_ or Twitter almost every other day spreading dangerous lies and conspiracy theories. Just this week, he falsely suggested that mouthwash could kill the COVID-19 virus. Listerine even had to put out a statement saying no research data backs up his outrageous claim!

This guy is an embarrassment to Wisconsin, a threat to public health, and he does not belong in the U.S. Senate. But let me be clear: elections are won and lost based on how early of an investment grassroots donors make. Republicans are already coming after me, including Ron Johnson’s campaign, and we cannot afford to let their attacks go unchallenged.

**Add a donation of whatever you can afford — every dollar makes a difference — to help us fight back against GOP attacks, defeat Ron Johnson, and flip Wisconsin blue. Anything you can give before the final FEC deadline of the year will go a long way.**

Your contribution today can help us flip this seat from red to blue. Can I count on you to chip in before our final FEC deadline of the year to make sure our campaign has the resources to defeat Ron Johnson and win this toss-up race? You can donate right here: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = CNN and Roll Call are both calling Ron Johnson the most vulnerable Republican Senator up in 2022, and we're hearing he is expected to announce his re-election very soon. We need to be ready to hit the ground running as soon as he does. Washington Republicans and outside groups plan to blanket Wisconsin with millions of dollars in false attacks to protect Ron Johnson and keep this seat red. And, look, we already know that kind of money can swing an election. Especially in a battleground state like ours. Even worse? Ron Johnson is on Fox News or Twitter almost every other day spreading dangerous lies and conspiracy theories. Just this week, he falsely suggested that mouthwash could kill the COVID-19 virus. Listerine even had to put out a statement saying no research data backs up his outrageous claim! This guy is an embarrassment to Wisconsin, a threat to public health, and he does not belong in the U.S. Senate. But let me be clear: elections are won and lost based on how early of an investment grassroots donors make. Republicans are already coming after me, including Ron Johnson’s campaign, and we cannot afford to let their attacks go unchallenged. Add a donation of whatever you can afford — every dollar makes a difference — to help us fight back against GOP attacks, defeat Ron Johnson, and flip Wisconsin blue. Anything you can give before the final FEC deadline of the year will go a long way. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Ours is a campaign powered by a lot of folks just like you who are standing up for what’s right, not the corporate PACs that are already more than well-represented in Washington. That’s why we’re not taking a dime from them, and why I’m relying on you ahead of this important deadline. Thanks for reading, and thanks for all you do. Onward! Sarah Godlewski Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put hard-working Wisconsin families first. She's the only Democrat in this race who has won statewide twice. With your help, she can defeat Ron Johnson, too. Chip in to join our grassroots campaign: | = Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 166 Madison, WI 53701 United States

body:

Folks,

The GOP primary is crowded with multi-millionaires writing themselves fat
campaign checks. It’s no wonder they’re so out of touch with Ohio
families. Just take a look at the recent reports we’ve received:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6249?t=1011&amount=25&akid=1699%2E3611125%2EYIXP8H ]Median Household Income in Ohio $56,602 JD Vance 2020 Income $1 million Mike
Gibbons 2020 Income $15 million

Tim has a major FEC fundraising deadline at the end of the month and we’ll
need a whole lot of grassroots supporters giving what they can to overcome
his opponents’ self-funding campaigns.

Usually 1 out of every 100 people who open an email like this make a
donation. If we can get just one more person in every 100 to chip in a few
bucks, we’ll be in a strong position. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6249?amount=25&t=1007&akid=1699%2E3611125%2EYIXP8H ]Will you be that person and chip
in $25 to
stop the GOP millionaires from buying their way into the Senate?

$25

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6249?t=1013&amount=25&akid=1699%2E3611125%2EYIXP8H ]Other Amount

keep a roof over their heads through COVID-19, wealthy Republicans like JD
Vance and Mike Gibbons saw their personal fortunes skyrocket.

How could they possibly have any idea what Ohio’s working families are
going through?

Like millions of Ohioans, Tim Ryan and his family are working to pay off
their mortgage and student loans.

For Tim, it’s not just politics—it’s personal. That’s why he will always
fight like hell to cut workers in on the deal.

We’re proud to run a people-powered campaign that’s only possible thanks
to donations from folks like you. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6250?t=1008&akid=1699%2E3611125%2EYIXP8H ]Can we count on you to make a
donation before our end-of-year FEC deadline and help Tim beat these
self-funding millionaires with the power of a grassroots movement?

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Date: December 10, 2021 Contact: Brandon Kiser Ph: (832) 714-8041 Email: brandon@christiancollins.org

CHRISTIAN COLLINS OFFICIALLY ON TX-8 PRIMARY BALLOT

---
|
---
|
---
|
Christian Collins has officially submitted all necessary paperwork to the Republican Party of Texas to be listed on this coming Republican primary ballot.
Christian Collins is the Founder of Texas Youth Summit, a former Cruz aide, and a conservative grassroots activist who is committed to fighting in Congress for the conservative values that TX-8 holds dear.
"I'm excited to announce I've officially filed to run for United States Congress in Texas' 8th District! I'm proud to be endorsed by Senator Ted Cruz and backed by the House Freedom Caucus in Congress (the more conservative wing of the Republican Party). Since I announced my run seven weeks ago, we've seen a ground swelling of support. Our message is resonating because voters are seeing that I'm running to represent the will of the people as opposed to the Washington Establishment and special interests."

### Paid for by Christian Collins for Congress

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jarrin=20Jackson?=
subject: Stop the vaxx mandates!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DRAIN THE DC SWAMP PAC
body:
Government can't force substances into your body. |
---
| | [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=956c7a23e1&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| | Hi Peter,

If you want to get the vaccine, get the vaccine. I have no problems if that's your choice.

The freedom to make those kind of decisions without fear of government punishment or violence is what America is all about! It's what I fought for in the military.

Commie Biden doesn't think so. Every time his poll numbers drop again- like clockwork- he tries to amp up the draconian, unconstitutional mandates.

**The latest? Fining every private business with unvaccinated employees. **

But then something incredible happened: the American people fought back, sued Biden, and we won. Now we must win in Congress to roll this back! [We will defeat Biden, with your help!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=878b6b033d&e=ba6e67b849)

My name is Jarrin Jackson, and I am the chairman of Drain the DC Swamp PAC. I also served in Afghanistan as an infantry officer. Our PAC are America First grassroots patriots, actively FIGHTING Biden and all his unconstitutional mandates!

I was thrilled when the courts stopped Biden's nonsense.

November 29: Federal court halts CMS vaccine mandate rule in 10 states
December 1: Federal judge blocks vaccine mandate for health workers
December 7: Georgia federal judge issues injunction on federal vaccination mandate

Biden can't win these cases. He was being a dictator, doing unconstitutional things.

**But now we have to stop it in Congress.**

[Imagine what we can do with pressure on vulnerable Senators?](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=87e12a0d12&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=4973175f93&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **The Senate is about to pass a resolution against Biden's vaxx mandates- WITH DEMOCRAT SUPPORT:**

_The Senate is set to vote this week on a resolution to nullify President Biden's vaccine mandate for private companies, as Republicans and at least one Democrat push back on the administration's rule requiring vaccines or inconvenient testing rules for workers at large businesses.

All 50 Senate Republicans, led by Sen. Mike Braun, R-Ind., backed a challenge to the vaccine mandate last month under the Congressional Review Act (CRA). That law allows Congress to officially disapprove of an executive branch regulation via a resolution passed through each chamber.

Sen. Joe Manchin, D-W.Va., said last week he also supports the Braun resolution.

"I do not support any government vaccine mandate on private businesses," Manchin said Thursday after voting against an amendment to a government funding bill that would roll back public and private vaccine mandates. Sen. Mike Lee, R-Utah, and a handful of other Republicans forced that vote in exchange for expediting passage of the funding bill, but they got no Democrat support.

Republicans also think Sen. Kyrsten Sinema, D-Ariz., may vote for the Braun resolution. She declined to say whether she will vote for it in an interview with CNN last week. Sen. Steve Daines, R-Mont., is also pushing his Democrat counterpart from Montana, Sen. Jon Tester, to "join me in my efforts to block all of Biden's mandates."

The Braun resolution only needs a simple majority to pass the Senate, which means the bill will likely succeed. Rep. Fred Keller, R-Pa., is leading companion legislation in the House of Representatives, which his office said Friday has 206 cosponsors. But House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy, R-Calif., said Friday it is unlikely the bill could come for a vote in the House with Speaker Nancy Pelosi, D-Calif., in charge._

This proves that pressure works! We can stop Biden in the courts, but the BETTER option is to pressure the Swampers to do the right thing and stand up to Biden!

_**Now is the time to take on the unpopular Biden.[Now is the time to help us launch devastating attacks that will help America First candidates!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=f67d01bf09&e=ba6e67b849)**_
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=d041b703a2&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| It's time to put the pressure on. We need to pressure the Swampers to stop Biden- and challenge Biden whenever possible!

**This is the way we win. Pressure the weak and challenge the Swampers.[Help us win this issue!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=f9d7b9b4f2&e=ba6e67b849)**

Don't let Biden pass anything. Ride it out until help arrives.

[Help us elect the right people to challenge Biden and defeat his bills.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=c2ba92293b&e=ba6e67b849)

Intimidate his allies. Make it impossible for them to take away our liberties any further. [Help me beat the Swampy politicians!

Donate now.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=4701ec2dd2&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **Thank you!**

Respectfully,

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: What we find when we audit
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Wait till you see THIS |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3d408192dd&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
I am Mark Finchem. I am the proud America first election integrity patriot pushing for and developing nationwide watermarking and authentication measures for balloting.

**And this month is absolutely critical for the movement.[We are coming up on and end of month fundraising goal of fifty thousand dollars, which we absolutely need to hit if we are to be able to fight against the Anti-American Democrats in 2022.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=43fdf93626&e=44b8c466b0)**

I am proud to announce that we are hosting a hearing on Election Integrity on December 13th. It is absolutely important to put pressure on the necessary officials to audit Pima County.
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c8743787ce&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _We need to once again ring first-hand witnesses to who can speak to what they saw in 2020. This is a critical next step in investigations of fraud in Arizona._

But do not forget - we are a statewide epicenter of a national problem.

**Just this week, we received shocking news out of Wisconsin.**

_It was just reported that there are over 119,000 on the voter rolls in. Wisconsin that have been on the voter rolls for over a CENTURY._

And these are just those registered as “active” voters.

If you add in inactive voters?

That number balloons to over half a million. **These are the types of numbers that you would expect when Dictators when fraudulent elections in the Middle East.**

We cannot let this happen in America again. We are better than that.

A few more findings:

**Wisconsin had only four and a half million citizens who reached the age of majority. How many on the voter rolls?**

**SEVEN MILLION.**

**64,000 voters were switched to inactive AFTER the election was over even though they were recorded as voting.**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a78543d9d6&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| The point here is grim but simple folks: there was clear and abundant fraud in the 2020 election, and the election hearing in less than a week will go a long way to establishing the crucial next steps.

[And this is why I urgently need your support.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5f3526383f&e=44b8c466b0)

The media is doing everything it can to contain and suppress the election integrity narrative. This means it is up to our campaign to make sure that we dig and investigate and get the word out.

[_And unfortunately, this takes lots of money. This is why we have a fundraising goal of 50,000 by the end of the month. Can you help with a rush donation of 25, 50, or 100 tonight?_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=97c7d0b9f8&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you and God bless you!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=201058edd9&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b95747593c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE

| |
---

Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737

Moving forward together,

Maggie Toulouse Oliver

body:
Former White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows recently gave the January 6 investigation committee a PowerPoint file that outlines how the Trump administration planned to overturn the election -- and it was dated just one day before the January 6 insurrection. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39550686/320334427/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlhNDBlODI3LWZjNTktZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mrSVTr8-kC3w7li6t23x0fPv7-u2lxdaenOh4h-KIk4=&emci=d03a05f9-e359-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=9a40e827-fc59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=16335001) **Mark Meadows PowerPoint Plan to Overturn Election Results Revealed**
\-- _Newsweek_
Have you heard the shocking new revelation about the Trump team's plans to overturn the 2020 election results, team?

Former White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows recently gave the January 6 investigation committee a PowerPoint file that outlines how the Trump administration planned to overturn the election -- and it was dated just one day before the January 6 insurrection.

The PowerPoint included recommendations such as claiming "foreign interference," declaring a National Security Emergency, and announcing electronic voting for all states would be invalidated.

And that's just a few of the plans outlined in this 38 page presentation.

The revelation of this PowerPoint plan shows just how far the Trump administration was willing to go to attack our democracy. It's disturbing, shocking, and we need to make sure Republicans don't get the chance to try it again.

name: Kara Hahn
subject: If we have each other’s backs, anything is possible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39550689/320334431/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjQwZTgyNy1mYzU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1WSnN67DtDT7yXH_Io6O7MmKIKq0FxUoOfIaqy7f5_k=)

Hey there,

Running to bring honest, accountable representation to over 700,000 Long Islanders right here in New York's 1st District is proving to be a tough challenge. **But it's exactly the kind of challenge I'm up for because this community means the world to me.**

I was born and raised here. My mom and dad were deeply involved in our community. Mom was a teacher and Dad a volunteer firefighter and veteran, and through the power of example, they taught my siblings and me the virtue of public service.

From driving around with my dad and other volunteers in a pickup truck to clear fallen trees after Hurricane Gloria in '85, to cleaning litter off our local beaches with students today -- it's always been important to me to do my part.

I feel immense fulfillment in finding commonsense legislative fixes to problems my neighbors face. But while I love my work on the county level, I'm running for Congress to make an even greater impact for my community.

**I'm ready to take on any and every challenge we'll face,[so long as I can count on folks like you to have my back, friend.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39550690/320334432/-987883882?refcode=em21_211210_karab&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjQwZTgyNy1mYzU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1WSnN67DtDT7yXH_Io6O7MmKIKq0FxUoOfIaqy7f5_k=)**

In the face of economic uncertainty, a deadly pandemic that continues to rob us of so much, and a growing climate crisis, I am convinced we can continue to make significant progress if we work together toward our common goals.

**[Your support can make an incredible impact. If you can, please chip in $5 to help me continue serving our communities. clean_body: | = Hey there, Running to bring honest, accountable representation to over 700,000 Long Islanders right here in New York's 1st District is proving to be a tough challenge. But it's exactly the kind of challenge I'm up for because this community means the world to me. I was born and raised here. My mom and dad were deeply involved in our community. Mom was a teacher and Dad a volunteer firefighter and veteran, and through the power of example, they taught my siblings and me the virtue of public service. From driving around with my dad and other volunteers in a pickup truck to clear fallen trees after Hurricane Gloria in '85, to cleaning litter off our local beaches with students today -- it's always been important to me to do my part. I feel immense fulfillment in finding commonsense legislative fixes to problems my neighbors face. But while I love my work on the county level, I'm running for Congress to make an even greater impact for my community. I'm ready to take on any and every challenge we'll face,= In the face of economic uncertainty, a deadly pandemic that continues to rob us of so much, and a growing climate crisis, I am convinced we can continue to make significant progress if we work together toward our common goals. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks so much for your continued support. Please take care and stay safe. Kara Hahn Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. This open seat is a must win for Democrats to defend our majority in the House and continue driving progress in America, but we can't do it without your help. Make a recurring donation to sustain our movement for the long haul and send Kara to Congress! = = *

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Our latest recommendations to make Congress work better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Today, I'm proud to share with you the latest recommendations coming out of the Select Committee on the Modernization of Congress (also known as the "Fix Congress" Committee). The work of this committee is one of my top priorities because I believe Congress could get a lot more done for the people if it did things differently. As Chair, it's my goal to have our committee take steps to help us make Congress work better for the American people.

Our bipartisan committee voted in favor of **25 new recommendations** aimed at increasing civility, strengthening congressional support agencies, and furthering evidence-based policymaking. You can read about our committee's efforts **[here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Dx_DtrOy5doLpovW5luxV89SNK9ieStG3wyzF6nKknc=/WO-XnDSfgt3Uk81qB2ndn03GXtTraUCVyLse9mXfADA=)**

Specifically, we are recommending that Congress:
* Create more bipartisan workspaces where members and staff can collaborate;
* Urge committees to make bipartisan web pages;
* Give members more opportunities to deliver feedback on how committees can work better;
* Improve professional development opportunities for members to address topics like conflict resolution and building collaborative committees;
* Develop a Task Force on Evidence-Based Policymaking to ensure that policies are developed based on science and fact;
* And much more.

**[There's no silver bullet to fix issues we're facing in Congress, but I believe these recommendations are a great step forward. If you believe we need more progress and less partisan bickering in Congress, will you add your name next to mine to endorse this latest list of recommendations?](https://act.myngp.com/el/Dx_DtrOy5doLpovW5luxV89SNK9ieStG3wyzF6nKknc=/vQyq2QADHB8EmW5Ygrdsb3iIRoAre9WU0bmD2ecwewI=?ms=em21_211210_Modern_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em21_211210_Modern_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em21_211210_Modern_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211210_Modern_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

[ENDORSE THE RECOMMENDATIONS](https://act.myngp.com/el/Dx_DtrOy5doLpovW5luxV89SNK9ieStG3wyzF6nKknc=/vQyq2QADHB8EmW5Ygrdsb3iIRoAre9WU0bmD2ecwewI=?ms=em21_211210_Modern_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em21_211210_Modern_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em21_211210_Modern_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211210_Modern_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})

While these recommendations may just be the jumping-off point, the great news is that Congress has acted on more than 60 percent of our previous recommendations. We're hopeful for progress on these recommendations as well, and I'm committed to continuing this work so Congress can function better and get results for you.

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/Dx_DtrOy5doLpovW5luxV89SNK9ieStG3wyzF6nKknc=/Sh5L3spC6JC2nFiI2_8uOG3voB8zShwnwUEtzvETjP4=?refcode=em21_211210_Modern_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211210_Modern_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Dx_DtrOy5doLpovW5luxV89SNK9ieStG3wyzF6nKknc=/gwIJg3O899ntUSgZW_9z9oFzV2H1lsO_cLuBz0lFq0Y=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Dx_DtrOy5doLpovW5luxV89SNK9ieStG3wyzF6nKknc=/dLAzO6pMYO25lAs2ZxHznxSRrT3WkXrQs7XHRTONRdA=)
---|---
Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
---

People for Derek Kilmer
PO Box 1381
Tacoma WA 98402 United States

Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot.

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/Dx_DtrOy5doLpovW5luxV89SNK9ieStG3wyzF6nKknc=/Sh5L3spC6JC2nFiI2_8uOG3voB8zShwnwUEtzvETjP4=?refcode=em21_211210_Modern_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211210_Modern_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
How many more children will we allow to die before enough is enough?
#

Friends,
Just days after the Oxford High School shooting in Michigan, Republican Congressman Thomas Massie posted THIS on Twitter:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-dec21?refcode=em211210-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1296_3935704_rk-Jm_&akid=1296%2E3935704%2Erk-Jm_)
This stunt was cruel and devoid of any empathy for the Oxford, Michigan community — and all Americans who’ve lost a loved one to preventable gun violence.
This is Second Amendment extremism, plain and simple. In this season of peace and celebration, Rep. Massie chose to elevate conflict and violence. This is evidence of how far the gun lobby has corrupted politicians on the right.
We may not be able to convince someone as extreme as Rep. Massie to vote for reasonable gun safety measures. But we CAN defeat politicians like him at the ballot box and elect gun safety candidates who will take action and stand up to the gun lobby.
Will you help us do it?
[**If you’re with us, please make a donation so we can elect officials who care about saving lives and passing gun safety legislation. You can contribute here:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-dec21?refcode=em211210-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1296_3935704_rk-Jm_&akid=1296%2E3935704%2Erk-Jm_)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em211210-1-15&t=21&refcode2=1296_3935704_rk-Jm_&akid=1296%2E3935704%2Erk-Jm_)**

****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em211210-1-15&t=23&refcode2=1296_3935704_rk-Jm_&akid=1296%2E3935704%2Erk-Jm_)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em211210-1-15&t=24&refcode2=1296_3935704_rk-Jm_&akid=1296%2E3935704%2Erk-Jm_)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em211210-1-15&t=25&refcode2=1296_3935704_rk-Jm_&akid=1296%2E3935704%2Erk-Jm_)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-dec21?express_lane=true&refcode=em211210-1-15&t=26&refcode2=1296_3935704_rk-Jm_&akid=1296%2E3935704%2Erk-Jm_)**
---
****
As we have said before, we can express outrage after every shooting, but it means nothing if our politicians like Massie refuse to act. How many more children will we allow to die before enough is enough?
Sincerely,
The team at Giffords
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-dec21?refcode=em211210-1-15&t=27&refcode2=1296_3935704_rk-Jm_&akid=1296%2E3935704%2Erk-Jm_)**

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=1296%2E3935704%2Erk-Jm_) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
