name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: End the filibuster, protect abortion rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

BREAKING: Supreme Court allows Texas abortion ban. It’s the most
restrictive abortion law since the passage of Roe v. Wade in 1973. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86465?refcode=em20211210-20907&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=20907%2E1203867%2EuwrHHf ]We
need to fight back now. Help us end the filibuster and protect abortion
rights »

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86465?refcode=em20211210-20907&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=20907%2E1203867%2EuwrHHf ]Fight Back

Peter, this is a
crisis moment for reproductive freedom and health in America. We said as
soon as Democrats took control of the Senate and President Biden took
office, that Democrats needed to end the filibuster, pass legislation to
protect the right to safe and accessible abortion, and expand the Supreme
Court.

We are continuing our push to end the filibuster as the critical first
step to expanding the court and passing a slew of urgently-needed
legislation, including a law protecting everyone’s right to safe and
accessible abortion.

We are also committed to electing Democrats who will fight for these
urgent actions because the Democratic establishment hasn’t taken the clear
steps necessary to protect abortion rights and avoid more disastrous
decisions from the Supreme Court. We’re even trying to unseat
anti-abortion Democrat Henry Cuellar in a primary that starts early voting
in less than 70 days.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86465?refcode=em20211210-20907&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=20907%2E1203867%2EuwrHHf ]Can you chip in $3 right now to fuel our advocacy to
end the filibuster AND our campaigns to elect more Justice Democrats to
Congress? If Democrats fail to end the filibuster, our only hope is to
transform the Party and elect a new generation of working-class
progressive leaders who WILL take the bold action our times require.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86465?refcode=em20211210-20907&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=20907%2E1203867%2EuwrHHf ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=20907%2E1203867%2EuwrHHf ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=20907%2E1203867%2EuwrHHf ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211210-20907-footer&t=1026&refcode2=20907_1203867_uwrHHf&akid=20907%2E1203867%2EuwrHHf

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=20907%2E1203867%2EuwrHHf

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: American Defense News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
As you know, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm2jt21gf0gv0mtpoe971lcqrk8j0an6r321f1b0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbprat1ncoq33cjkshr64tb6m5ir8tdlesom5dljc5q6eorgs1r7cd3nmhhmat30sv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj661qbac70e9o6cd34mdi3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933cpie8pr0c1i6aoh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztggcvj2vs46evk4s999ap5sotgb6pskb55eren0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shjm0o34clh2bs) [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk8s8q3tke547f1iuvdpssjrifqndr45ia39pe0g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shjm0o34clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, **** As you know, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. **** And one way to honor the brave soldiers who fought in World War II is to study the conflict itself—its causes, how it was fought, and its implications on the present day. **** To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course about the war, “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the war’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. **** I hope you find this course as important and fascinating as I do. The strength and bravery of American soldiers during one of the darkest times in human history stands as one of the great moments in our nation’s proud history. It’s a history we must learn, cherish, and share. **** **You can access your free online course, “Second World Wars,” now using this secure link:** **[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/the-second-world-wars](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh3qkvhce687jb7594fh682i7b501imd3fs3lb1g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shjm0o34clh2bs)** Warm regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College |
#
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2zlcdc8eno3qtgvmv0t396okmk2641ts3on54c7p0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1ctv8urii4v308nted0o1up7r8fgha9qjl1rlc0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shjm0o34clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Dear Peter,
I wanted to reach out and personally invite you to join me for a**[reception in support of my campaign for Governor of Maryland on Saturday, December 11 at 5:00 PM in Chevy Chase](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39551280/320336939/-1864143073?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWIxODMzZS1mZTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hc3zoYxssxowyWyWROrW_Pb0-7Om6zggOfA25upOxC8=&emci=83ecddb2-d559-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=81b1833e-fe59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837). **
I’m running to build a Maryland where everyone has access to a good-paying job, every child can receive a world-class education, small businesses can thrive, and justice is equal for _all_.
But we still have a long road ahead of us, and I need your help to make my vision for our state a reality. We have an incredible opportunity to **flip a Governor’s seat from red to blue in the midterms** , so I hope you’ll**[join me on December 11](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39551281/320336940/-1864143073?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWIxODMzZS1mZTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hc3zoYxssxowyWyWROrW_Pb0-7Om6zggOfA25upOxC8=&emci=83ecddb2-d559-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=81b1833e-fe59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837) **to learn more about our campaign.
I hope you can join me along with our host committee: Ambassador Elizabeth Frawley Bagley, Kathleen Matthews, Barbara Goldberg Goldman, Ambassador Bill Eacho, and Mike Steed.

name: American Update
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8264%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=VR9uFjD94efER2kv%2bac6wQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19476%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Lz7LUzS22o7Zu4IjAUvC6A&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19477%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JiAkPKSmHf%2fp6vqxxlhsNA&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19478%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O4bv9qkv34bJ7y0ZumZC%2bA&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Dr. Neil Shah For Governor
subject: Watch This Speech
body:
| Peter -- In my latest speech I talk about my political journey, the silver lining of the pandemic, and the future of liberty in Minnesota. Conservatives need to stand up and get involved if we’re serious about firing Walz and taking back our state. The hundreds of conservative activists in this room are ready to do that. Are you? We have a unique opportunity to put a real, authentic, and electable conservative in the Governor’s office next November. Let’s not waste it by choosing a flip flopper or an establishment hack who won’t win. Please watch. [](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5kzyz4kyOGJS1Qe_3-8jcVXf7pFSlLJiHqxYqr5JcZOYk&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=xmas_party_speech&n=1 "Dr. Neil Shah - Don't Take Freedom For Granted") Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate For Governor www.electneil.com

name: Scott Johnson
subject: Jerry is the real deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Dickinson for Congress Committee
body:
| | |
---
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39551586/320338026/-632576040?utm_source=headerlogo&utm_medium=email&refcode=em_20211210-vol-SJ-volask-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGQ2YWMxZS0wMDVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxnInMol04kh0l9qsyZ3DuHRxVVmvLRHBOW7J8t34xA=&emci=922ed5ba-d459-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=edd6ac1e-005a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25561085)
---
| I’m so ready to help lead our grassroots organizing efforts! Join us! Friend, First off, I want to introduce myself. Hello! My name is Scott Johnson (He/They), and I am the new Field Director for Team Jerry, and I couldn’t be more excited to start leading our grassroots organizing efforts! We want _YOU_ and need your help to spread the word about our campaign! **Currently, we are building an amazing list of volunteers, and need your help to share Jerry’s content on social media, or put signs in their yards, or show up at our events right now—Friend,[will you be one of those people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39551587/320338027/-584705806?refcode=em_20211210-vol-SJ-volask-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGQ2YWMxZS0wMDVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxnInMol04kh0l9qsyZ3DuHRxVVmvLRHBOW7J8t34xA=&emci=922ed5ba-d459-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=edd6ac1e-005a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25561085)** _**[VOLUNTEER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39551588/320338028/-584705806?refcode=em_20211210-vol-SJ-volask-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGQ2YWMxZS0wMDVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxnInMol04kh0l9qsyZ3DuHRxVVmvLRHBOW7J8t34xA=&emci=922ed5ba-d459-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=edd6ac1e-005a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25561085)**_ Personally, I joined this team because **Jerry is the real deal.** He’s fought tirelessly for the housing rights of low income people; he knows the scars that racial profiling and police brutality leave firsthand; he’s helped his siblings navigate our unjust justice system. **So when he talks about these issues, they aren’t just platitudes to him—they’re about the real-life experiences of both himself and his loved ones.** And frankly, our Congress needs a representative that understands the adversity that so many of us face in our lives! [**So if you agree with me, and you’re ready to have someone representing PA-18 who will fight for people like you and me, then sign up to volunteer now!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39551589/320338029/-584705806?refcode=em_20211210-vol-SJ-volask-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGQ2YWMxZS0wMDVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxnInMol04kh0l9qsyZ3DuHRxVVmvLRHBOW7J8t34xA=&emci=922ed5ba-d459-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=edd6ac1e-005a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25561085) I sure hope you sign up! We need you, your voice, your strengths, and your contributions. name: Trey Arnold
subject: Wendy Davis Endorses Charlie Gearing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas
body:
Dear Peter -

Charlie just received the endorsement of Deeds Not Words founder and former State Senator Wendy Davis.

Your $114 donation to Charlie's campaign will ensure that House District 114 has a strong leader with an unmatched commitment to reproductive rights .

DONATE: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital

Charlie’s positive campaign that we are “better together” has never been more true so please forward this exciting news to your friends and neighbors.

Thank you for your continued support!

Trey Arnold
Campaign Manager

Charlie Gearing is a born and raised North Texan running for Texas House District 114 in East Dallas. He believes we need to fight for the things that matter to Texas families – investing in our teachers and students, creating good-paying jobs, expanding Medicaid, holding ERCOT accountable, restoring voting rights, and rolling back dangerous abortion restrictions.

Donate Now » https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital
Learn more at gearingfortexas.com: https://www.gearingfortexas.com

Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas

Charlie Gearing for Texas
10440 N. Central Expressway Suite 1400 Dallas, TX 75231

subject: FW: Do you still support me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
Give just $1 to help me win re-election.
| Peter,
---
I’m starting to think you no longer support me and the conservative values I’m fighting for.
---
_While hundreds more of your fellow conservatives stepped up to support my re-election campaign after my last email, you still haven’t taken action._
---
**The stakes couldn’t be higher. We MUST WIN this toss-up race next year to take back the House majority from Nancy Pelosi.**

_For less than the cost of a cup of coffee, you can make a meaningful difference in one of the most important races in the country and help usher in the red wave that will save America._

clean_body: Give just $1 to help me win re-election. | Peter, I’m starting to think you no longer support me and the conservative values I’m fighting for. While hundreds more of your fellow conservatives stepped up to support my re-election campaign after my last email, you still haven’t taken action. The stakes couldn’t be higher. We MUST WIN this toss-up race next year to take back the House majority from Nancy Pelosi. For less than the cost of a cup of coffee, you can make a meaningful difference in one of the most important races in the country and help usher in the red wave that will save America. Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar Florida's 27th Congressional District \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Maria Elvira Salazar Date: Fri, Dec 3, 2021 Subject: RE: Peter's membership. To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, Thousands of patriots, including your friends, neighbors, and fellow conservatives, have stepped up to support my re-election campaign this year. But I was just going over a list of all of our 2021 Founding Members, and I noticed you haven’t accepted your membership or supported my campaign at all this year. I hate to think that I’d lost your support. You were one of my biggest grassroots champions in 2020, and you played a critical role in our upset victory over my radical Democrat opponent. With 2022 around the corner, I wanted to reach out and you personally to ask you to join my campaign one more time before the end of the year. This next month is going to make or break my re-election chances next November. We’ve got to stay on budget and finish the year in the strongest position we possibly can so we’re ready for whatever Pelosi and the Left throw at us in 2022. And we can’t do that without the support of grassroots Americans like you, Peter. $5 may not seem like a lot compared to Pelosi’s millions, but when every conservative does their part, it adds up quickly. The fate of my bellwether congressional district -- and the House majority -- is in your hands. I hope that you’ll come through for me like you did in 2020. Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar Florida's 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: $539 million
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#
Friend,
New Yorkers were hit hard at the beginning of the pandemic. Working- and middle-class families faced numerous challenges — including financial and economic uncertainty as businesses were forced to close.
To remedy the burden placed on families throughout our state, Mondaire sprang into action and worked with his Democratic colleagues to pass the _American Rescue Plan_ in March.
Mondaire is proud to share that New York is the first state to launch the Homeowner Assistance Fund — a program funded by the _American Rescue Plan_ that will provide up to $539 million to help vulnerable homeowners.
This program will bring life-changing support to so many, especially in lower-income communities, where folks have been disproportionately impacted by the pandemic.
_**[As the pandemic continues, Mondaire is working hard to deliver relief for New Yorkers. Friend, if you believe that we need to keep Mondaire in Congress so he can keep fighting for our communities, please show your support and add your name today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39551776/320338603/-2014335061?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211210_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjY5MGI1Yi0wMDVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TnG-EWz9AU-2bekE48_NXefNf9MV-Ro4zGu-oPXXtfA=&emci=2adffa99-c959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=bf690b5b-005a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24719896)**_
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39551778/320338606/-2014335061?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211210_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjY5MGI1Yi0wMDVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TnG-EWz9AU-2bekE48_NXefNf9MV-Ro4zGu-oPXXtfA=&emci=2adffa99-c959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=bf690b5b-005a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24719896)**
In addition to the Homeowner Assistance Fund — funding was used to safely re-open schools, families received $1,400 survival checks, and vaccination efforts dramatically increased, which has helped to slow down the spread of the virus.
This relief from the _American Rescue Plan_ is only the beginning.
With the Omicron variant circulating and COVID-19 cases surging throughout the country, Mondaire will continue working with his Democratic colleagues to combat COVID-19.
**[Ensuring that working- and middle-class families have the resources to survive the pandemic is of the utmost importance to Mondaire. He will continue to push for relief in Congress, but he needs you to sign on and support his efforts today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39551779/320338607/-2014335061?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211210_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjY5MGI1Yi0wMDVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TnG-EWz9AU-2bekE48_NXefNf9MV-Ro4zGu-oPXXtfA=&emci=2adffa99-c959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=bf690b5b-005a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24719896)**

clean_body: Friend, New Yorkers were hit hard at the beginning of the pandemic. Working- and middle-class families faced numerous challenges — including financial and economic uncertainty as businesses were forced to close. To remedy the burden placed on families throughout our state, Mondaire sprang into action and worked with his Democratic colleagues to pass the American Rescue Plan in March. Mondaire is proud to share that New York is the first state to launch the Homeowner Assistance Fund — a program funded by the American Rescue Plan that will provide up to $539 million to help vulnerable homeowners. This program will bring life-changing support to so many, especially in lower-income communities, where folks have been disproportionately impacted by the pandemic. In addition to the Homeowner Assistance Fund — funding was used to safely re-open schools, families received $1,400 survival checks, and vaccination efforts dramatically increased, which has helped to slow down the spread of the virus. This relief from the American Rescue Plan is only the beginning. With the Omicron variant circulating and COVID-19 cases surging throughout the country, Mondaire will continue working with his Democratic colleagues to combat COVID-19. Together, we can combat the virus and do our part by getting vaccinated and boosted to protect ourselves, our families, and our community. We're grateful for your support, Team Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. body:
This is how the Republicans hold power. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39551899/320338978/823540626?refcode=ea.c574d50d-015a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.c574d50d-015a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTc0ZDUwZC0wMTVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H1QyqTtgsmNSDs3z84-Iyw0cc6xMhrYIPrC0k0Xonug=&emci=44b0dbf4-ff59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=c574d50d-015a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1049176)
Peter — you know that your vote is your voice. **But with less than a year to go before the 2022 midterms, extreme far-right legislators in states from coast to coast are trying to make it harder for some of us to vote and have our voices heard in next year’s critical elections.** _This is how political parties that can’t win on the issues hold onto power._ Peter, when politicians roll back voting access and gerrymander legislative maps to suit their own political interests, the people are the losers. They’re passing laws that systematically make it harder for some folks to cast a ballot. They’re drawing new district lines that assure they’ll stay in power for the next decade. And the GOP is at it again here in North Carolina, where their new maps _guarantee_ they’ll control at least 70% of our congressional seats and could secure them supermajorities in Raleigh — all while limiting the power of voters of color to choose their representatives. **[Our democracy is still under attack. name: Holly McCormack
subject: We will fire Marjorie Taylor Greene
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter, yesterday Marjorie Taylor Greene self proclaimed herself as the “face of America.”
Let’s make one thing clear: she is not.
We’ve had a void in leadership for far too long. Marge parachuted into GA-14 for an easy win. In 2020, she ran her Dem opponent out of town. Northwest Georgians don’t align with Marjorie Taylor Greene, we simply had no other option. That will change next year.
I won’t back down and I won’t abandon the folks of GA-14. This district wants affordable childcare, accessible broadband internet, and we want our roads fixed. Marjorie Taylor Greene’s far right values don’t represent us and her lack of accomplishments leave us in the dust. In 2022, we will fire Marjorie Taylor Greene.
Chip in $14 today if you’d like to see this happen. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em1210]
Let’s get back to work,
Holly McCormack.

name: Bridget Barton
subject: Stunning Hypocrisy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bridget Barton for Oregon
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/d87bb1bf48eb013366a6b3c4b83ff292/37693/46309e214dbe1ac6/a019353ad00118e3c3d6b838967d376c/37693)
---
Peter,

There’s no end to the left’s pandemic panic insanity, and there’s no end to their hypocrisy.

We’ve seen it all across the country. Kate Brown is one of the most SHAMELESS offenders.

**This week Oregon schoolchildren were forced to eat lunch outside in 40-degree weather, sitting six feet apart on Home Depot buckets, to comply with her decrees.**

Meanwhile, “Queen” Kate has been in Washington, D.C. partying UNMASKED indoors with her wealthy left-wing activist pals!

ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. This insanity must be stopped.

But it never will be with the radicals in charge... _they’re actually trying to make “Queen” Kate’s indoor mask rule PERMANENT!_

I’m calling out these frauds, and I’m running for Governor to RESTORE OUR LIBERTY.

I hope you are behind me in this fight, Peter.

[**Please rush a $5, $10, $25, or $50 donation, to protect our schoolchildren from these hypocrites and to build our** _fight-to-win_**grassroots team across Oregon >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/d87bb1bf48eb013366a6b3c4b83ff292/37693/46309e214dbe1ac6/9864f0a42139b7aec3d6b838967d376c/37693)

It’s time to UNLEASH our great state in 2022. Together, I know we can get the job done!

\- Bridget

Together, I know we can get the job done! \- Bridget id:2021-12-09-20:03:16:204t | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Bridget Barton for Oregon | |

name: Gen. Michael Flynn
subject: I support Tom Norton
body:
Dear Patriot
**I 'm General Michael Flynn. I'm the former National Security Advisor to President Trump, a former Army General, and currently leading the fight for election integrity. **
I'm writing to you today to make a BIG announcement. I'm endorsing a fellow patriot Tom Norton who is running for Congress in Michigan against RINO Peter Meijer, one of the Impeachment 10 who betrayed our country.
Tom Norton answered his nation's call when he served in Afghanistan. He answered it again when he established a program to help suicidal veterans in Michigan choose to live lives with purpose and meaning.
And once more, Tom is heeding our nation's call by running for United States Congress so that the people of Michigan's 3rd District can be represented by a patriot who holds their values sacred rather than someone who holds them in contempt.
I give Tom my full endorsement and urge patriots everywhere to join with me to help send to Congress Tom Norton who will put America first.
**I 'm writing to ask for your help to get Tom Norton elected to Congress. We CANNOT let RINO Peter Meijer continue to sabotage this country in a conservative district all while pretending to be a conservative. **
It's time for true conservative leadership in Michigan. Tom is a true patriot who will fight for an America First agenda.
Please help Tom win by making a contribution today at [https://tom.gop/donate](https://contacts.tom.gop//l/Oxl6a1Fvy59S6763vIEQrTBw/eGFv8zJOyxD9efsY9g0TgQ/lF3KikxWzo82Xcypx892iQhA).
Kind Regards,
Gen. Michael Flynn

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Prayers for Mike McDaniel & Family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470978?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Prayers for Mike McDaniel & Family_** It is with heavy hearts that we share the devastating news of the loss of Ellen McDaniel earlier this week. Ellen was the beloved wife of former State Party Chairman Mike McDaniel. She was an active member of our party and supported several causes, candidates and campaigns as a staffer or volunteer over the years. Her passing was unexpected and has left Mike, her family, friends, and those of us she touched throughout her life deeply saddened.

Please join us in lifting up Mike and all of Ellen's family and friends in prayer during this tragic time. Those wishing to send sympathy cards and notes of condolences can mail them to the Indiana Republican Party Headquarters. We'll make sure Mike and his family receive them. Our address is: Indiana Republican Party
Re: McDaniel Family
101 W. Ohio Street
Suite 2200
Indianapolis, IN 46204
Thank you for your prayers. I know we can speak for Hoosiers across the state in offering our deepest and heartfelt sympathies to Mike and the entire McDaniel family during this time.
---
|
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| **_Building One Indiana For All_**
**Governor Holcomb **announced the placement of[ Indiana's first-ever naloxone](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e61c0e6a04&e=1acd9bb3d6) vending machine. This is the first of 19 to be placed statewide. **_"There is no single solution to ending this epidemic that has taken the lives of thousands of Hoosiers... Naloxone vending machines are a practical tool to prevent overdoses and save lives," Governor Holcomb._**
The governor also continues to sit down for year-end interviews with local media outlets. Here is a selection of some of the ones published so far:

[Fort Wayne Journal Gazette, part 1](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c0751848d4&e=1acd9bb3d6)
[WANE 15](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bd8576619d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
[Indianapolis Star](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5a8fc59d4a&e=1acd9bb3d6) _**Photo: Governor Holcomb participates in a year-end interview with the Fort Wayne Journal Gazette.**_
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Indiana Right to Life Dinner_** Eric Holcomb for Indiana (EHFI) and the Indiana Republican Party were proud, once again, to support Indiana Right to Life's annual Christmas gala. It was great to be with so many fellow pro-life Hoosiers, including Mike and Karen Pence. This is an exciting time for the pro-life movement and we are keeping a close eye on several ongoing legal challenges aimed at protecting the unborn. Many thanks to the IRL team and the hundreds of pro-life advocates that are making an impact here in Indiana and across the country.

_**Photo:** Chairman Hupfer with former Vice President Mike Pence at the Indiana Right to Life Dinner this week._
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Indiana Republican State Convention**_ The 2022 Indiana Republican State Convention will take place **on Saturday, June 18, 2022 in Indianapolis. **

More information, including details on hotel accommodations, can be found [at this link.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b6822a3fcd&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| _**Congress of Counties is Back!**_ Congress of Counties returns in 2022 and [registration is open!** **](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=772f785461&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**Bidenflation has NOT impacted registration for Congress of Counties! [General admission registration remains $100/person.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=03e45becf0&e=1acd9bb3d6)**

This two-day training event for Republican Party leaders, candidates and grassroots activists is scheduled for February 25-26 at the historic [French Lick Resort](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9d515949b0&e=1acd9bb3d6).

You'll want to experience Congress of Counties next year to kick-off 2022’s election season, meet Indiana’s top Republican elected officials, and learn more about critical election topics like: The training provided at Congress of Counties is the training you’ll need to WIN elections throughout Indiana in 2022 and beyond, keeping Indiana on the right track.

THE FULL SCHEDULE FOR CONGRESS OF COUNTIES WILL BE RELEASED IN THE COMING WEEKS! -[-> Register Now!<-](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=38bcdefe5c&e=1acd9bb3d6)-
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Secretary Sullivan Visits Wabash**_
Indiana Secretary of State Holli Sullivan was on the road again this week, this time visiting Wabash. You can read about her stop in the [Wabash Plain Dealer. ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=389c1591b9&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| _**Upcoming Republican Events**_
[December 16:](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=35565181b7&e=1acd9bb3d6) Adams County GOP Christmas Reception
[January 29:](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=138daca227&e=1acd9bb3d6) Rush County Lincoln Day Dinner
[February 10:](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c8929d56c0&e=1acd9bb3d6) Hendricks County Lincoln Day Dinner
[February 25:](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e11c343ec0&e=1acd9bb3d6) Congress of Counties
[June 18: ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b6b1dfd1f0&e=1acd9bb3d6)Indiana GOP State Convention
---
| |
---
| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb **[announces first-ever vending machine at the St. Joseph County Jail that will help prevent overdoses ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=784b208b28&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch **[visits Montgomery County ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c0b33b1818&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Treasurer Kelly Mitchell** [promotes new ESA program.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=143c6a2271&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Auditor Tera Klutz **[announces reelection](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f130e1a8ee&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Secretary of State Holli Sullivan**[meets with Wabash County clerk](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5f87f83f27&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Attorney General Todd Rokita** [honors Pearl Harbor](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1f651d4f58&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young**[ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c77b039a83&e=1acd9bb3d6)[s](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0541ba8bb4&e=1acd9bb3d6)[peaks at the NAIFA's Leadership Conference](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c5e6e6510a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun** [fights to block Biden's vaccine mandates](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9679812ae8&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski **[pushes Biden to end the drug crisis at the border](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=08845269e6&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks **[talks House politics on his podcast](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5493d6fe18&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Baird** [shows how inflation is affecting Americans](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9ce9b11258&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Victoria Spartz** [connects with the Elwood City Council](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3d837446ef&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Greg Pence** [fights to protect the unborn](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9d35a359e4&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Bucshon **[joins Fox Business to discuss Biden's overreach on vaccine mandates](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5d894dfe3e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth**[votes against a funding bill](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d216c2443c&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: this is no walk in the park
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hi there, Maggie said that I could reach out to you about far-right Republican Tom Cotton’s recent trip to the Granite State. I’ll be frank: his trip was ugly. Truth be told, he was here to rally the GOP's most extreme base before the 2022 election, attack Maggie, and raise money for extreme Trump Republicans. Maggie is one of the most vulnerable Senators up for reelection in 2022 (she only won her last race by 1,017 votes), and Senate control could boil down to New Hampshire. **[I told Maggie we could raise $8,000 today to help protect against Cotton’s attacks, and I need you to make a $5 donation to help us get there. clean_body: Why we need to close out 2021 strong... | Friend, Nancy Pelosi was CAUGHT admitting to her donors that our race for Texas’ brand-new congressional seat will likely cost her the majority. Even more, LEAKED reports suggest she will finally RETIRE if we flip the House. But with this race being the MUST-WIN race of the midterms, Pelosi has made us her #1 target. That’s why I’ve set such an ambitious $1,000,000 goal to close out the year strong and send Pelosi packing once and for all -- but I’m counting on YOU to help me crush this goal. The Left has dug their own grave for 2022, Friend. For over a year, radical Democrats in blue states stripped Americans of their liberties, and as a result, voters flocked to red states like Texas where they knew they would be FREE. While California and New York LOST 2 congressional seats, the Lone Star State GAINED 2. But as the NEW seat that will decide the fate of the House majority, I need your help putting the final nail in the Left’s coffin. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. My ties to Upstate New York go back generations. My parents own and operate the same grocery store my great-grandmother opened after immigrating to this country. After helping out at the family business and spending much of my life here, I know our community lifts each other up when we need help – that character represents so much of why I’m running for Congress.

subject: Interested in getting more involved with Team Carleah?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f795ee6de0b8/volunteer-opportunity-happy-thanksgiving-14837778?e=3bc549893c)
---
| |
---
| |
# Calling all prospective Team Carleah core members!
Hey everyone,

Are you interested in getting more deeply involved in the campaign? Do you have any special skills that could help us out on a structural, strategic, or administrative level?

**Let us know by typing your email into[this quick form](https://carleahsummers.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f56790a135a1d688e4182dde&id=5a421ceddd&e=3bc549893c)!**

(**Please do not fill this out if you are just interested in phonebanking and canvassing opportunities- those will still be shared through these emails!** Getting more involved does require more time, so we understand if you are unable to take on a larger role- you are still an important part of Team Carleah!)

We will soon be contacting those interested in expanding their Team Carleah role in order to set up a meeting to help onboard everyone, so please make sure you respond to the above form by Monday (12/13).

Note: If you previously filled out our volunteer form and included a response to the question "Do you have specific skills that you think would be helpful to the campaign," you will be automatically contacted, so no need to take the above action! (Feel free to do so, however, if you don't remember)

_Print Brigade_

We are also establishing another easy way you can help the campaign- _**the Print Brigade**_!

If you have a printer, ink, and enthusiasm for Carleah, please consider answering "Yes" to the Print Brigade question on the above interest form ([linked here again](https://carleahsummers.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f56790a135a1d688e4182dde&id=86d4d718cf&e=3bc549893c))!

Members of the Print Brigade will be sent printer-friendly pdfs of our campaign literature. From time to time, we may ask that you print help print things for our campaign activities, but we would also encourage you to print our materials whenever you want and disperse them amongst your family and friends!

The Print Brigade is an easy way to get involved and share valuable resources with the team, so please consider joining!

_Other Updates_

In terms of other updates, we also encourage you to check out our website, which is gradually being updated with more planks from Carleah's platform. [Check out the "Issues" page](https://carleahsummers.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f56790a135a1d688e4182dde&id=b7a81d1761&e=3bc549893c) and scroll down to learn more specifics about Carleah's stances on healthcare, the opioid crisis, and more!

_Have a question about anything above? Send us an email at[carleahsummers@gmail.com](mailto:carleahsummers@gmail.com)!_

More to come soon,

Brett Guessford
_Campaign Advisor_

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Respectfully asking for $3 before our FEC deadline ends 3 weeks from today and we’re legally required to report our fundraising numbers.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
If we post a bad number, we’ll look vulnerable and the outside spending is sure to ramp up.
#

Friends -
We’re writing to ask if you can choose today to make your first $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign.
And we really hope you do.
Because three weeks from today, we close the books on the most important FEC fundraising deadline of this campaign so far.
And when it’s over, we’re legally required to report not just how much money we’ve raised, but how many donations we’ve received to make up that total. Everyone will know.
If we post a bad number, we’ll look vulnerable and the outside spending is sure to ramp up.
So we are looking for AS MANY DONATIONS AS WE CAN POSSIBLY GET before this deadline ends. We set a goal of 100,000. But the only way we get there is if you’re willing to make your first donation today:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign today? We’re getting so close to this FEC deadline and it all adds up when we all chip in.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?refcode=em211210-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1775_6688874_8AUfnB&akid=1775%2E6688874%2E8AUfnB)

****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em211210-1-15&t=22&refcode2=1775_6688874_8AUfnB&akid=1775%2E6688874%2E8AUfnB)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em211210-1-15&t=23&refcode2=1775_6688874_8AUfnB&akid=1775%2E6688874%2E8AUfnB)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em211210-1-15&t=24&refcode2=1775_6688874_8AUfnB&akid=1775%2E6688874%2E8AUfnB)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?express_lane=true&refcode=em211210-1-15&t=25&refcode2=1775_6688874_8AUfnB&akid=1775%2E6688874%2E8AUfnB)**
---
****
These goals are not arbitrary. They are what we need to win. And we won’t reach them without you.
Thanks,
Team Kelly
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?refcode=em211210-1-15&t=26&refcode2=1775_6688874_8AUfnB&akid=1775%2E6688874%2E8AUfnB)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=1775%2E6688874%2E8AUfnB).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. This isn’t good, friend. Earlier this week, Matt Gaetz and his extremist allies — including Jim Jordan, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and Paul Gosar — held a press conference where they promised to “take power” after next year’s crucial midterm elections.

During her time in Congress, Sara has been a strong voice against the members of Congress like these ones who have no respect for our rule of law, including introducing a resolution to censure Marjorie Taylor Greene and voting with her Democratic colleagues to censure Paul Gosar. But these far-right extremists have plenty of support and are eager to take back control of the House in 2022. **We absolutely cannot let that happen.**

[_**Anything you can spare sends a strong message to insurrectionists that progressives like Sara have real support from the American people. All of us here on Team SJ would greatly appreciate anything you can spare to show them that Sara is here to stay.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39552402/320341199/-1384613475?refcode=BLU-SJC-20211210-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2RkZjJmYy0wMzVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r3-3wlZl8Qw1vhQOD2ld3G-5cOH_yNpFezApB8SUt9o=)

clean_body: Far-right extremists have plenty of support and are eager to take back control of the House in 2022. | = | = This isn’t good, friend. Earlier this week, Matt Gaetz and his extremist allies — including Jim Jordan, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and Paul Gosar — held a press conference where they promised to “take power” after next year’s crucial midterm elections. During her time in Congress, Sara has been a strong voice against the members of Congress like these ones who have no respect for our rule of law, including introducing a resolution to censure Marjorie Taylor Greene and voting with her Democratic colleagues to censure Paul Gosar. But these far-right extremists have plenty of support and are eager to take back control of the House in 2022. We absolutely cannot let that happen. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Together, we can keep this progressive champion in Congress. | | | **I don 't have much time, so I'll be quick:**

**Here 's the bad news:** Kevin McCarthy just raked in a shocking $400,000 after trying to sabotage my Democrats with his EIGHT-hour speech on the House floor.

**But I also have good news:** If 500 supporters give a monthly recurring gift before midnight to protect our Majority, we could OUTRAISE McCarthy, OVERPOWER his haul, and make his speech completely BACKFIRE.

_So today, I 'm asking you to step up and become a Majority Maker._

**Majority Makers are some of my best grassroots Democrats who give recurring monthly contributions of $3, $10, or even $25 -- because they know that in 2022, there 's never been more at stake.**

Majority Makers will receive exclusive updates about the state of our races, opportunities to hear directly from me and other Democratic leaders, and a personalized member card.

**[I need you to make a crucial choice at this moment. We can either let Kevin McCarthy use this ploy to rake in piles of cash and DEFEAT our Majority -- or we can rise up to meet this moment head on, protect our House Democrats, and SQUASH the GOP's desperate dreams of flipping our House. I'm calling for 500 monthly recurring gifts in the next 13 hours to make his ploy BACKFIRE. Can I count on you? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **\- Holcomb’s “Positively Preaching” Vaccination Strategy -** This week, Governor Eric Holcomb announced the state’s latest strategy to fight COVID-19: “positively preaching” for higher vaccination rates. In an alarming interview with KPC Media this week, Holcomb was described as “switching back” to a “pre-pandemic mindset” and not supporting campaigns that “compel vaccination” across Indiana. In fact, Gov. Holcomb’s new, partisan pandemic strategy comes as the state is seeing COVID cases reach levels not seen since last winter – a time when the Governor described Indiana as being “on fire” with COVID-19. Here’s what’s changed: Governor Holcomb quit holding weekly COVID-19 press briefings and Indiana Republicans have failed to hold an aggressive effort to get Hoosiers vaccinated. Their extreme partisanship is preventing Indiana from moving on from the pandemic, and it’s leading to more Hoosier deaths in the process. Indiana Democrats have done everything possible to help Hoosier families put COVID-19 in the rearview mirror. Thanks to the American Rescue Plan, Hoosiers have every opportunity to get a vaccine, all 92 counties have received critical relief to make up for lost revenues, and Hoosier families received vital relief checks through the Child Tax Credit. Democrats delivered and created this brighter future for families, but unfortunately, the Indiana Republican Party’s extreme partisanship is betting against Indiana and Hoosier families.
**\- Braun “Perfectly Comfortable” with Criminalizng Abortion -** The Indiana Republican Party is planning to criminalize access to women’s reproductive health care across Indiana. During an interview with Meet the Press this week, U.S. Senator Mike Braun said he was “perfectly comfortable” with making legal and safe abortions criminalized. Braun’s dangerous and partisan rhetoric echoes plans from state Republicans – like State Senator Liz Brown – who are “interested in pursuing” anti-abortion measures similar to the Texas law, which allows private citizens to sue physicians who provide abortion services. This is expected to happen during the 2022 legislation session. A large majority of Hoosiers do not support the extreme, partisan anti-abortion efforts coming from the Indiana Republican Party. A large majority of voters did not support the extreme anti-abortion law signed by then Governor Mike Pence. But once again, Indiana Republicans will show their extreme partisan agenda comes before creating a better future for Hoosier families. This is the very reason why the INGOP is both bad for business and bad for Hoosier families.
**\- Holcomb Endorses Democrats’ Plan to Build Cannabis Infrastructure System -** During an interview this week with Indy Politics, Holcomb said he has “no problem with lawmakers putting a plan in place” ahead of cannabis legalization. Lucky for Governor Holcomb, Indiana Democrats have gone on offense and plan to introduce this kind of legislation. State Representative Sue Errington has drafted legislation for the Indiana General Assembly’s 2022 legislative session that would “establish a cannabis compliance commission to regulate all forms of legal cannabis in Indiana, including industrial hemp and low THC hemp extract” – aka, create an infrastructure for cannabis growers and the state to safely and effectively create an economic revenue stream for the State of Indiana. Just like the American Rescue Plan and The Jobs Act, Democrats are once again proving to be the party that’s ready to deliver for Hoosiers when it matters most. Hoosiers currently contribute millions of dollars to Michigan and Illinois’ economies — where cannabis is legalized. This can be changed because, once authorized, Indiana’s economy would have a guaranteed cash crop in the long-term for the state’s businesses and farming communities, creating a revenue stream for the state to use in future sessions. A brighter future will be created for Hoosiers once the Indiana General Assembly legalizes marijuana in 2022. Let’s get it done.
**\- Opportunities -** **\- Spring Interns 2022 -** The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates.
* * *
#### Benefits
* Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process
* Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials
* Enhanced communication and organizational skills
* Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development
* This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field.
* We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school.

* * *
#### Intern Duties
Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include:
* campaign research
* voter outreach
* data entry
* assistance with local campaign events
* special projects

* * *
#### Qualifications
Applicants must be:
* passionate about Democratic politics
* trustworthy and responsible
* able to communicate effectively with others
* flexible and willing to help when needed
* able to work on multiple tasks at once

* * *
#### Start/End Dates and Schedule
Applications for the Spring of 2022 are now being accepted until December 10, 2021. We are not currently accepting applications for the Summer of 2022. Fall interns must commit to working a minimum of 20 – 30 hours per week. Schedule flexibility is a possibility. This position has a monthly stipend but does not include travel reimbursement. Hybrid virtual/in-person opportunities also are a possibility.
* * *
#### How to Apply
Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at [lauren@indems.org](mailto:lauren@indems.org).

Just like the American Rescue Plan and The Jobs Act, Democrats are once again proving to be the party that’s ready to deliver for Hoosiers when it matters most. Hoosiers currently contribute millions of dollars to Michigan and Illinois’ economies — where cannabis is legalized. This can be changed because, once authorized, Indiana’s economy would have a guaranteed cash crop in the long-term for the state’s businesses and farming communities, creating a revenue stream for the state to use in future sessions. A brighter future will be created for Hoosiers once the Indiana General Assembly legalizes marijuana in 2022. Let’s get it done. \- Opportunities - \- Spring Interns 2022 - The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates. Benefits Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials Enhanced communication and organizational skills Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field. We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school. Intern Duties Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include: campaign research voter outreach data entry assistance with local campaign events special projects Qualifications Applicants must be: passionate about Democratic politics trustworthy and responsible able to communicate effectively with others flexible and willing to help when needed able to work on multiple tasks at once Start/End Dates and Schedule Applications for the Spring of 2022 are now being accepted until December 10, 2021. We are not currently accepting applications for the Summer of 2022. Fall interns must commit to working a minimum of 20 – 30 hours per week. Schedule flexibility is a possibility. This position has a monthly stipend but does not include travel reimbursement. Hybrid virtual/in-person opportunities also are a possibility. How to Apply Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at mailto:lauren@indems.org. \- Party Leader Trainings - -County Party Delegates Tracker Training with Megan McCullough- Tuesday, January 11 | 7pm EDT -Candidate Training Series with Rust Belt Rising- Using Values in your Language with Paul at Rust Belt Rising Thursday, December 16 | 7pm EDT HOLIDAY BREAK -Data Micro Training Series: Call Lists & VPBs with Megan McCullough- Thursday, January 13 | 7pm EDT -Midwest Issues and How to Talk About Them with Paul at Rust Belt Rising- Tuesday, January 18 | 7pm EDT -Data Micro Training Series: Walk Lists & MiniVAN with Megan McCullough- Thursday, January 20 | 7pm EDT -Persuasion Messaging with Paul at Rust Belt Rising- Tuesday, January 27 | 7pm EDT -Lists & MiniVAN with Megan McCullough- Thursday, January 20 | 7pm EDT \- Save the Date! National Democratic Training Committee (NDTC) Training - Saturday, January 29 (all day event in Indianapolis, IN) | ---|--- | | = | Connect With Us | | Indiana Democratic Party** 101 W. Washington St. Indianapolis, IN 46202 (317) 231-7100 | ---|--- | | Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party. www.indems.org Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

---
Peter,

Here's something Washington won't want you to hear: even the scientist who discovered the omicron variant has called the Biden/Fauci travel ban a "hysterical overreach."

**_The doctor who discovered the new variant wrote an op-ed this week that said that so far, no one's been hospitalized in South Africa. So far, no one's died from this disease. _**

_That 's what I just talked about on Fox News. [**WATCH NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58983123:JsiED8ElN:m:1:3253819041:98FFC27783ED2F13EA0153741C6D2DC5:r)_[** _ >>_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58983123:JsiED8ElN:m:1:3253819041:98FFC27783ED2F13EA0153741C6D2DC5:r)
__
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58983123:JsiED8ElN:m:1:3253819041:98FFC27783ED2F13EA0153741C6D2DC5:r)
The truth is that the hysterical power-hungry bureaucrats in charge of public health - like Dr. Fauci - don't want you to know what's really happening. They want you scared. They want you to be compliant. And apparently, they want you skipping Christmas unless you line up for a booster.

They want to create fear. They want to indulge hysteria. They want to destroy the economy while they're doing it. These are the last people we need in charge. That's why I'm leading the effort to FIRE FAUCI and restore common sense. Will you join my fight by chipping in now?
__
[**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58983124:JsiED8ElN:m:1:3253819041:98FFC27783ED2F13EA0153741C6D2DC5:r)

[**STAND WITH RAND: $10**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58983126:JsiED8ElN:m:1:3253819041:98FFC27783ED2F13EA0153741C6D2DC5:r)

The so-called experts have proven too many times that they have no idea what they're doing.

They don't care about COVID - they care about power!

And it's about time we say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH.

It's time for Fauci TO GO before we lose any more time or freedom listening to his hysterical lies.

I have been fighting to dismiss Fauci for a while now, but I know more than ever I can't do it alone.

**I hope you'll chip in now to join the fight:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3357636/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58983123:JsiED8ElN:m:1:3253819041:98FFC27783ED2F13EA0153741C6D2DC5:r)**

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Victor Davis Hanson
subject: The decline of American Citizenship
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| |
Dear Friend, I wish to invite you to enroll in an eight-lecture course that I prepared with the help and under the auspices of Hillsdale College. It is called **“American Citizenship and Its Decline,”** and the online course is based on my latest book, the recently released _The Dying Citizen_.

**[Like the book, the course describes the current crises in America as symptoms of a far larger problem: the steady decline of the autonomy and political influence of the citizen.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**

The class describes the origins and history of citizenship in the West, reminding us that it is a rare phenomenon both in the past and the present—given the enormous responsibility placed on citizens to create and control their own government.

Citizenship then requires a large and self-reliant middle class—currently shrinking under enormous economic strains. Clearly defined and enforced borders are also essential to ensure a civic space in which citizens can nurture common customs, sustain traditions, and honor their own shared past.

Yet borders are now increasingly fluid as mere residence and citizenship seem often indistinguishable. Pre-civilizational tribalism—identifying by superficial appearance rather than through shared culture and values—is returning to America as so often the salad bowl replaces the melting pot.

These organic, bottom-up challenges are often matched by top-down stresses such as the growth of a permanent, but unelected, government of bureaucrats and administrators who combine judicial, executive, and legislative powers that overwhelm the citizen.

In addition, revisionists in law, the media, and politics seek to change the Constitution, long-held customs of governance, and political traditions for short-term partisan agendas, on the theory that a new changing and fluid Constitution must match an always evolving human nature.

Globalism is an ancient challenge to the sovereignty of the nation-state. But in the age of instant communications and unprecedented concentrations of globalized wealth, so often elites seek to supplant American laws and independence with international organizations and often without the consent of the legislative branch or the assent of the governed.

The course ends, however, on an optimistic note that citizens still have it within their power to restore our traditions of empowered citizenship and return government to the control of citizens.

**“American Citizenship and Its Decline”** is free to enroll in, and you can begin the course today by clicking on the secure link below.

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/american-citizenship-and-its-decline**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)

Best wishes,

Victor Davis Hanson
Wayne & Marcia Buske Distinguished Fellow in History
Hillsdale College
---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIxMzQ0LWZiZGM3ZWIwN2M0OTRlNTU4MzY0YjY5MmVmM2U4ZGE3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/F1J-srOGijxAwb1txETiZA) to unsubscribe.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Shawn=20Hyland?=
subject: Where did “defund the police” come from?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5d813a5c587c/where-did-defund-the-police-come-from-8645797?e=5167ed8367)
---
|
---
|
---
# Defunding the police is just bad policy
Peter,Safe communities are the bedrock of any successful state. Like anyone, we New Jerseyans want to live in neighborhoods where our children can walk to school, where we aren’t afraid of violent crime, and where our homes aren’t under threat of being vandalized or destroyed.
| [We need you as an ally with us today to restore New Jersey](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=bb19a35dca&e=5167ed8367)
---
**If everyone wants their communities to be safe, where did “defund the police” come from?** The protests following George Floyd’s death in 2020 sought to right a wrong, but in the process introduced a dangerous idea that garnered national attention. Turns out, defunding the police is just a cover up for failed progressive leadership.**Thankfully most voters know that defunding the police is just bad policy.** Minneapolis proposed this idea to its citizens on the ballot in 2021. If you recall, Minneapolis was center stage in a national debate about race and policing in light of George Floyd’s wrongful death, and violent protesting plagued its streets for weeks. Despite being front and center in a growing narrative about the organization Black Lives Matter Inc. and defunding the police, when it came down to a vote, residents of Minneapolis overwhelmingly voted against defunding the police. This proposition, like so many other votes on the ballots in 2021, was an opportunity for voters to strike back against dangerous Leftist plans—even in the hearts of Democratic strongholds.Take a look at the widespread theft happening in San Francisco. **There is mass outrage in California over the politicians who are bending to Leftist ideology and not taking property crime seriously.** But Americans are waking up to the threat of woke ideologies [because of the real damage it does to our communities](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=ccb374eebc&e=5167ed8367).
| [Donate today and join me in making New Jersey a safe place to live and work](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=3f56fd3548&e=5167ed8367)
---
**The Left has developed tactics to trick the conscientious voter and weaponize misinformation.** From indoctrination in our classrooms, to radicals in our universities, to bias on social media, in journalism, and in Hollywood, woke, Leftist ideology has developed the teeth to wage a full-scale culture war.That is why I am running for Congress to stand for the people of New Jersey. These ideas are genuine threats to our communities. **New Jersey is ground zero for this battle between our Founding principles and hateful ideology.** Like so many in our community, I was frustrated that our state wasn’t sending conservative champions to Washington who would stand up for New Jerseyeans.**We haven’t fought against Leftist ideas in New Jersey as much as we should have, but together, we will put New Jersey back on the right track.** New Jersey will be a safer, better place for us to live, raise our children, and feel safe in our communities. Join me in defending our first responders and investing resources in our police departments.For New Jersey,Shawn Hyland
|
---

---

name: Team Warner
subject: Here’s what we heard from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Here are some of the main things Virginians all across the Commonwealth shared with Mark last month.

|
---

| | Last month, after the Virginia elections, Mark emailed you asking you to share your thoughts on how we can best get the word out to the American people about how Democrats are working for them. We received a ton of messages, and your voices are loud and clear. There is so much work to be done to make sure people are energized and motivated to vote for Democrats in 2022, and we’re already thinking about ways we can take the thoughts of everyone who shared and turn them into action. But to do that, we need your help. [_**Chip in $5 right now to back the Democratic majority in the Senate in 2022, and help us get our message out to voters in crucial states across the country.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39552846/320343143/-1301519815?refcode=mw_em_211210_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2M5ZWRlNi0wNDVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KNk2tRyCXHhT18zTgbgiVD4kjIqWNDMfPBRMeg0SI88=) Here are some of the main things Virginians all across the Commonwealth shared with Mark last month in response:
* You believe Democrats need to match Republicans in getting their message out to the public, and we need to find ways to give people that information in a straight and simple way that is easy to understand.
* You want to see our accomplishments presented in more engaging ways, and with fewer political generalities.
* And you want to see more dialogue and respect within Washington D.C. among Democrats, because we are all working to achieve common goals.

name: Jessica Semachko, Tom Perez for Maryland
subject: Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, December 10th for Peter:
body:
Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39553042/320344226/-999108642?refcode=bpi-email-LaunchEmaillogo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDgwNWUzNi0wNjVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hVHdSR5jnrXuslXVfETbD5w4ZF2KP_9eGwMcVi-AJLA=)

**Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, December 10th, 2021**
Peter,
It was another busy week on the campaign trail!
Tom has been on the road listening to Marylanders and sharing his vision to create a Maryland where every person has the opportunity to succeed. Below, you will find a recap of Tom's time on the trail and an update on upcoming events and ways to get involved.
We are grateful for your continued investment in our grassroots movement and look forward to keeping in touch.
Best,
Jessica Semachko
Campaign Manager
Tom Perez for Maryland

* * *
**On the Campaign Trail**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39553043/320344227/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDgwNWUzNi0wNjVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hVHdSR5jnrXuslXVfETbD5w4ZF2KP_9eGwMcVi-AJLA=&emci=f5b80aa0-055a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=e4805e36-065a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)
On Saturday, **#TeamTom** volunteers and AFSCME members came out in force to our weekly canvass where they were able to knock on doors and talk with voters about how we can bring jobs and justice to all Marylanders.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39553044/320344228/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDgwNWUzNi0wNjVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hVHdSR5jnrXuslXVfETbD5w4ZF2KP_9eGwMcVi-AJLA=&emci=f5b80aa0-055a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=e4805e36-065a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)
Tom had the pleasure of sitting down with activists in Leisure World where he was able to discuss with them how we can create a Maryland that is a better place to live, and to retire. Thank you to these leaders for inviting Tom to join you and for their commitment to creating positive change in our community and throughout our state.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39553045/320344229/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDgwNWUzNi0wNjVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hVHdSR5jnrXuslXVfETbD5w4ZF2KP_9eGwMcVi-AJLA=&emci=f5b80aa0-055a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=e4805e36-065a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)
Tom had the great privilege of attending the MALDEF’s 2021 Awards Gala where he celebrated leaders who have made it their life’s work to protect and defend the rights of all people in the United States. Tom was honored to speak with National Education Association President Becky Pringle and Executive Committeemember Christine Sampson-Clark and thanked them for their tremendous work to empower students and educators across the country.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39553046/320344230/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDgwNWUzNi0wNjVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hVHdSR5jnrXuslXVfETbD5w4ZF2KP_9eGwMcVi-AJLA=&emci=f5b80aa0-055a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=e4805e36-065a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39553048/320344232/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDgwNWUzNi0wNjVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hVHdSR5jnrXuslXVfETbD5w4ZF2KP_9eGwMcVi-AJLA=&emci=f5b80aa0-055a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=e4805e36-065a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)
Tom rounded out the week at the Committee for Montgomery’s Annual Legislative Breakfast and Gubernatorial Forum, where he joined hundreds of nonprofit, business, and community leaders to discuss how to create a Montgomery County and state that works for everyone.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39553049/320344233/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDgwNWUzNi0wNjVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hVHdSR5jnrXuslXVfETbD5w4ZF2KP_9eGwMcVi-AJLA=&emci=f5b80aa0-055a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=e4805e36-065a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)
Tom was so grateful for the**#TeamTom** volunteers and AFSCME Council 3 workers who came out bright and early Friday morning for a sign wave ahead of the forum to show their support for Tom Perez for Governor!

clean_body: Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved. = Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, December 10th, 2021 Peter, It was another busy week on the campaign trail! Tom has been on the road listening to Marylanders and sharing his vision to create a Maryland where every person has the opportunity to succeed. Below, you will find a recap of Tom's time on the trail and an update on upcoming events and ways to get involved. We are grateful for your continued investment in our grassroots movement and look forward to keeping in touch. Best, Jessica Semachko Campaign Manager Tom Perez for Maryland On the Campaign Trail On Saturday, #TeamTom volunteers and AFSCME members came out in force to our weekly canvass where they were able to knock on doors and talk with voters about how we can bring jobs and justice to all Marylanders. Tom had the pleasure of sitting down with activists in Leisure World where he was able to discuss with them how we can create a Maryland that is a better place to live, and to retire. Thank you to these leaders for inviting Tom to join you and for their commitment to creating positive change in our community and throughout our state. Tom had the great privilege of attending the MALDEF’s 2021 Awards Gala where he celebrated leaders who have made it their life’s work to protect and defend the rights of all people in the United States. Tom was honored to speak with National Education Association President Becky Pringle and Executive Committeemember Christine Sampson-Clark and thanked them for their tremendous work to empower students and educators across the country. Tom later headed to Stevenson University’s campus to sit down for a live interview with former State Senator Bobby Zirkin, representing the Maryland State Bar Association. MSBA tirelessly advocates for and empowers legal professionals across the state, and Tom was grateful for the opportunity to join the important conversation. You can watch the interview . Tom rounded out the week at the Committee for Montgomery’s Annual Legislative Breakfast and Gubernatorial Forum, where he joined hundreds of nonprofit, business, and community leaders to discuss how to create a Montgomery County and state that works for everyone. Tom was so grateful for the#TeamTom volunteers and AFSCME Council 3 workers who came out bright and early Friday morning for a sign wave ahead of the forum to show their support for Tom Perez for Governor! Volunteer with us! Montgomery County Canvass Saturday, December 11, 2021 10AM-12PM Team Tom HQ 2930 Carroll Ave, Takoma Park, MD 20912 Endorsements ICYMI Tom joined Chris Hayes on MSNBC this week to talk about Republican gerrymandering in states like Texas and Georgia, and how critical it is for Congress to pass the For the People Act to abolish gerrymandering and make sure EVERY voice is heard in our democracy. You can watch the interview with Tom and Rep. Sheila Jackson Lee from Texas. Our webstore is now live! Visit to let everyone know you're on .
