| | Derek, This week the Virginia Supreme Court’s special masters released their proposed maps for Virginia’s Congressional and General Assembly districts. **And we’ll be honest, with these new maps, things don’t look great for Democrats.** Here’s what we know:
* Both Congresswoman Elaine Luria and Congresswoman Abigail Spanberger were drawn out of the districts they represent.
* Congresswoman Jennifer Wexton’s district was redrawn into a district Glenn Youngkin won by over 4 points.
* The maps have divided communities in the New River Valley and diluted the region's unified voice.
* And, with new districts for the House of Delegates, the entire House legislature might have to run again in 2022.

We have to start preparing for whatever comes our way in next year’s elections if we want a shot at holding onto our seats in Congress and quite possibly retaking the majority in the House of Delegates. **Can we count on you to help us start 2022 off strong? Steve has spent the past three years fighting to defend reproductive freedom.
**He signed the Trust Nevada Women Act** into law to get rid of harmful restrictions to reproductive rights -- and he’s continued to put women’s health first by investing in family planning services and reproductive health care.
Above all, Gov. Sisolak believes that such personal decisions should be left up to pregnant people and their healthcare providers. **He said it best:**
_“I don’t want to go back to where you have back-alley abortions and people traveling across state lines. These are decisions that should be made between a woman and their doctor, not the government.”_

name: Erica Smith
subject: Let me share my story of farm life with you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

It’s Erica
Smith. My roots run deep in rural North Carolina.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/29807?t=1001&akid=673%2E3698%2EdTbTnc ][IMG]

My five siblings and I were raised on a dirt road — the same dirt road
that our mother was raised on. My dad served in the Air Force. We lived on
a family farm in rural North Carolina. The rural way of life still runs
through my veins.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/29807?t=1002&akid=673%2E3698%2EdTbTnc ][IMG]

Even now, I spend my time doing what I’ve done since I was a little girl—
proudly harvesting corn and picking cucumbers on the family farm!

I understand the dignity of work. I know what it means to struggle, to
work all day to put food on the table for your family. And in fact, the
struggles my family faced are the same ones that North Carolina families
face today.

We’re fighting eviction, poverty, and crippling medical bills. We’re
fighting for climate justice as floods and storms claim our livelihoods.
I’m running for Congress in NC-02 because this is my family’s home, my
ancestors home, and my home.

NC-02 needs someone who understands the needs of our people, families and
communities. I know I’m that person for my district, but I can’t do this
alone. [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/29807?t=1004&akid=673%2E3698%2EdTbTnc ]Can you make
your first donation to our campaign for U.S. House right now? Our campaign
depends on folks like you reading and chipping into emails like this to
power our grassroots movement.

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
clean_body: [1]Erica Smith It’s Erica Smith. My roots run deep in rural North Carolina. [ ][IMG] My five siblings and I were raised on a dirt road — the same dirt road that our mother was raised on. My dad served in the Air Force. We lived on a family farm in rural North Carolina. The rural way of life still runs through my veins. [ ][IMG] Even now, I spend my time doing what I’ve done since I was a little girl— proudly harvesting corn and picking cucumbers on the family farm! I understand the dignity of work. I know what it means to struggle, to work all day to put food on the table for your family. And in fact, the struggles my family faced are the same ones that North Carolina families face today. We’re fighting eviction, poverty, and crippling medical bills. We’re fighting for climate justice as floods and storms claim our livelihoods. I’m running for Congress in NC-02 because this is my family’s home, my ancestors home, and my home. NC-02 needs someone who understands the needs of our people, families and communities. I know I’m that person for my district, but I can’t do this alone. [ ]Can you make your first donation to our campaign for U.S. House right now? Our campaign depends on folks like you reading and chipping into emails like this to power our grassroots movement. [ ]Donate $5 Thank you for hearing my story, Erica ❤️ Erica Smith for U.S. House Contribute to Erica's campaign:

Today, the Supreme Court released a decision on challenges to SB8, Texas’ extreme abortion ban. **As expected, the right-wing majority on the SCOTUS did less than the bare minimum to defend our reproductive rights.** Not only did they dismiss the Department of Justice’s challenge to the unconstitutional ban, but they also refused to even temporarily stop the most extreme abortion ban in the country. While they are allowing clinics to continue pursuing some of their federal challenges to the ban, it’s not enough. [**The SCOTUS has made clear, we cannot depend on right-wing extremists to protect our rights. It’s time for Congress to act. clean_body: Congress must act. | | | Another week, another refusal by the Supreme Court to protect our fundamental right to abortion care. Today, the Supreme Court released a decision on challenges to SB8, Texas’ extreme abortion ban. As expected, the right-wing majority on the SCOTUS did less than the bare minimum to defend our reproductive rights. Not only did they dismiss the Department of Justice’s challenge to the unconstitutional ban, but they also refused to even temporarily stop the most extreme abortion ban in the country. The Senate MUST pass the Women’s Health Protection Act to codify our constituional right to abortion into law, so that people in states like Texas, Missouri, and Arkansas won’t have to cross state lines to get the care they need. While they’re at it, Congress should expand the court too. The Trump-appointed majority on the highest court in the land is an all-out attack on our fundamental rights. We need louder voices in Congress, real reproductive justice champions to demand our Representatives and Senators fight tooth and nail for our reproductive rights. Anything less is insufficient. Friend,
The United States is one of just a handful of countries without any form of national paid family leave. No one should be forced to leave the workforce in order to be able to care for their loved ones.
Prioritizing Paid Family Leave is prioritizing public health, the development of children, and is critical to the financial security of millions of American families.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39553619/320346029/41694283?refcode=X_120921_PaidLeave&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTdkYWZiOC0wODVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hEPkKVrf0gY4ofPmftuNvXlbLi2WEakUTC0JPVREcpQ=)

subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6669%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=JvgzMyLmOT2KF8F7Y5rTcg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68709%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dd%2fP7rMA4663wv72lRXWPQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68700%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Evnln7ribjRYpNKyD7vLCg&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68701%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bOAt0cb1goEbyLzOIB51YA&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6669%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=JvgzMyLmOT2KF8F7Y5rTcg&sysid=1)_

Hi, it’s Marcus Flowers. I’m an Army veteran and candidate for Congress against Marjorie Taylor Greene in Georgia’s 14th District. The comments made by Marjorie Taylor Greene on Steve Bannon’s podcast this week are unbecoming of a U.S. Congresswoman. She claimed the GOP had moved too far to the left and had devolved into a “uniparty” intent on starting a war with Russia. **Let me underline that:__Marjorie Taylor Greene thinks the GOP has become too liberal.__** [**I’m running against her to offer an alternative to the people of northwest Georgia. But I need your help. Can you donate $25 or more to help me send her into political retirement?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39553665/320346188/-1217423743?refcode=20211210_mf_bannonmtgFWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmMzYTcyNC0wOTVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bVbF6RJNbexGp0fY0Yf-SrH3Qh4IopwEMqsSjooaRko=)

Thanks for your help,
Marcus Flowers **\-----Begin forwarded message-----**
From: Stop QAnon <info@marcusforgeorgia.com>
Subject: What Marjorie Taylor Greene said on Steve Bannon’s podcast
Sent on Thursday, December 9, 2021 at 10:00 a.m. Team, Marjorie Taylor Greene joined Steve Bannon’s conspiracy-obsessed podcast yesterday to attack mainstream Republican Senators over their alleged “support” for Joe Biden because they voted for the funding of roads and bridges with the infrastructure bill. _**She went on to attack the GOP as the “uniparty” and claimed they were trying to start a nuclear war with Russia. **_ Here’s the bottom line: Marjorie Taylor Greene is a radical right-wing reactionary whose only goal is to start fights with everyone so she can draw attention from the media. She is an opportunist, a bigot, and a liar. And she doesn’t represent Georgians. **In 2020, Marjorie Taylor Greene ran unopposed for her seat in Congress. That won’t be the case in 2022. Marcus Flowers is presenting an alternative -- a true public servant who wants to represent the interests of the people of northwest Georgia.** [**Defeating Marjorie Taylor Greene won’t be easy -- but Marcus is up to the challenge. Can you make a donation of any amount right now to help him defeat her in 2022?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39553666/320346189/-1217423743?refcode=20211210_mf_bannonmtgFWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmMzYTcyNC0wOTVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bVbF6RJNbexGp0fY0Yf-SrH3Qh4IopwEMqsSjooaRko=) | **[DONATE NOW>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39553667/320346190/-825069922?refcode=20211210_mf_bannonmtgFWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmMzYTcyNC0wOTVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bVbF6RJNbexGp0fY0Yf-SrH3Qh4IopwEMqsSjooaRko=)**

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Your 2021 Second Amendment Survey
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zs5kd3qpbnv2ibe0fnhl3pnncum5od6ddt3u0lo0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkpqj3cpiekor9d1jmoqjcd9jm5p78cdjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrmdc34mpj7cornc8q63c736pj64p72e4rmfd3i61ge1pj76lq38c5lcsq69odnmv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3im5j71cllmgrr4cj666ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933cpie8pr5c5h6aoh5u)
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zaklj05llik7ij5matt4slcha92639cqi3vamsn8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shjmaob2clh2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zqbpbf9lfivplcb43iommd4b49arr9oa5vj7r938_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shjmaob2clh2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zh0jmm00t623u72bbm2puggd2ioh47vhp3vst19o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shjmaob2clh2bs)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry—supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z5llfr5ok5mq95utdla6eqp1umh4m41ebefb97u0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shjmaob2clh2bs)**

| President Biden is pushing forward with his vaccine mandate that has been blocked repeatedly by the courts. That's why I'm fighting back.
The Senate passed a bill this week that would repeal Biden's vaccine mandate. But because Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the House, there's no chance that bill will get a vote.
How do I know this? Because I've introduced and supported multiple bills in the House to fight back against this unconstitutional mandate and Pelosi has blocked every one of them.
I introduced the Prevent Unconstitutional Vaccine Mandates for Interstate Commerce Act (H.R. 5418), which would prohibit the Department of Transportation and other federal agencies from requiring proof of vaccination or the use of a vaccine passport to engage in interstate commerce.
I helped introduce H.Res. 587, which would express that Congress disapproves of Department of Defense leadership pursuing adverse actions toward members of the Armed Forces of the United States who choose not to receive a COVID-19 vaccine.
I helped introduce H.J.Res. 65, which pushes back against the Department of Labor rule that establishes the Biden Administration's vaccine mandate. This bill makes clear the rule will have no force or effect.
And I helped lead a letter to Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) Director Chiquita Brooks-LaSure and an amicus brief in the case State of Texas et al v. Becerra et al opposing Biden's COVID-19 vaccine mandate for healthcare workers.
None of these actions have made progress under Speaker Pelosi, which is why we need to take back the House.
Unless we fire Speaker Pelosi, Biden will continue his authoritarian policies unchecked by Congress.
I'm putting all my effort into doing just that. Will you stand with me?

clean_body: This week: Soros-backed prosecutors and Biden's vaccine mandates | | | | | | | | == | Peter- Dan Crenshaw here. This week, I continued to call out leftist prosecutors - funded by George Soros - and local officials who are responsible for rising crime across America. I also am continuing to fight back against President Biden's unconstitutional vaccine mandate. As always, thank you for your support and please stay up to date with me on ==, ==, and ==. Now, here's your brief. | | | | | | SOROS PROSECUTORS RESPONSIBLE FOR RISING CRIME | == | == | America's most beautiful cities are indeed being ruined by liberal policies. There's a direct line between death and decay and liberal policies. Those liberal policies include defunding the police and bail reform. We are seeing crime rise across America as a result of these policies. == Criminals laugh in the back of a police car because they know they're going to be out of jail the next day back to committing crimes. This is exactly what we saw in Wisconsin after a violent criminal was released from jail and went on to murder 6 people in a vehicle attack. This is a problem for people who actually pay taxes and live in our cities. Their communities are being absolutely ruined by leftist prosecutors who are funded by George Soros, and we should be outraged about it. | | | == | | | | | | | | FIGHTING BACK AGAINST BIDEN'S VACCINE MANDATE | == | == | President Biden is pushing forward with his vaccine mandate that has been blocked repeatedly by the courts. That's why I'm fighting back. The Senate passed a bill this week that would repeal Biden's vaccine mandate. But because Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the House, there's no chance that bill will get a vote. How do I know this? Because I've introduced and supported multiple bills in the House to fight back against this unconstitutional mandate and Pelosi has blocked every one of them. I introduced the Prevent Unconstitutional Vaccine Mandates for Interstate Commerce Act (H.R. 5418), which would prohibit the Department of Transportation and other federal agencies from requiring proof of vaccination or the use of a vaccine passport to engage in interstate commerce. I helped introduce H.Res. 587, which would express that Congress disapproves of Department of Defense leadership pursuing adverse actions toward members of the Armed Forces of the United States who choose not to receive a COVID-19 vaccine. I helped introduce H.J.Res. 65, which pushes back against the Department of Labor rule that establishes the Biden Administration's vaccine mandate. This bill makes clear the rule will have no force or effect. And I helped lead a letter to Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) Director Chiquita Brooks-LaSure and an amicus brief in the case State of Texas et al v. Becerra et al opposing Biden's COVID-19 vaccine mandate for healthcare workers. None of these actions have made progress under Speaker Pelosi, which is why we need to take back the House. Unless we fire Speaker Pelosi, Biden will continue his authoritarian policies unchecked by Congress. I'm putting all my effort into doing just that. Will you stand with me? | | | == | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | | | | RECOMMENDED READS BREITBART: == FOX: == NATIONAL REVIEW: == Thank you for reading! name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Biggest FREEDOM PARTY of 2021!
body:
This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a brand new event:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvsadrjl7bdndfogdqkq8p34t7v6ned7dvt5u5ao_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfacdh6pqm1olgsmo7ep70c9qr4tb4chpj2ttjmlgm2d5nclj39ollckqnctjge1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eaomcs5immq3fchhcopb1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdj69p37clgm8p724no)
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z744ahg5771i6a3lr5b2m3nbq2tqvol3hu0b9jd8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shjmaob4cjh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbmf406a2qm8bp9t1o20cnhft8himtja6dlrh788_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shjmaob4cjh2bs) Hi Fellow American, This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a _brand new event:_**AmericaFest 2021!** This four-day event will be _the largest conservative movement event in the country_ —and an event like you’ve _never_ seen, featuring dozens of the best and brightest conservative speakers, special musical guests, and non-stop energy and excitement alongside _thousands of like-minded, freedom-loving individuals._ [**TPUSA wants to get thousands of young people to AmericaFest 2021—but we need your help to do it.******](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpepajq2lutt3vjvt4ms3711c2kve0gm0pjvuvvo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shjmaob4cjh2bs) You see, thousands of young conservatives are ready to come to AmericaFest, but, being full-time students with limited resources, they simply don’t have the means to afford the ticket. I’m hoping that as a fellow patriot who loves America and cares about the next generation, you’ll help us meet some of those needs. **Will you help us educate and encourage our future leaders to steer this country in the right direction by**[**making a generous gift right now to TPUSA’s AmericaFest Scholarship Fund**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjrlhrv1sm34a3c5lrusnot6a0rdt65s6bqb92b0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shjmaob4cjh2bs)**[?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmht2gs07rnp5er86bkrgmp6r1b8hr9m8636gs80_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shjmaob4cjh2bs) ** [**A contribution of $35 will provide a One-Day Pass to this massive event for a conservative student. A generous gift of $100 will pay for an entire Four-Day Experience for a young conservative.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs7k8nkfjs2mgrdmrm1mciv6c3v6m69gqk6o1voo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shjmaob4cjh2bs)
---
[**Give Gift!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztsds1eupu1pgavaj4lf15i96io9qnhap8787jqo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shjmaob4cjh2bs)
---
This four day celebration of America, of our constitutional rights, and of our freedom is happening this _**December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona**_** _._ **If you will be in the Southwest, I hope you’ll consider joining us! And if you’re not able to make it, [**please consider sponsoring a student today**.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z104em1e5neol176d1u1g8o8rtfuf4aj68ad8sho_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shjmaob4cjh2bs) **AmericaFest 2021** will be an event unlike any this movement has ever seen—by creating an experience that breaks the traditional norms of a political conference as we continue to****_bridge the gap between politics and entertainment to win America’s culture war._ Guest speakers include: Donald Trump Jr. Senator Ted Cruz Tucker Carlson Candace Owens **And Many More!** Plus, full live concerts by: Dustin Lynch Brantley Gilbert RaeLynn Russell Dickerson **And More Musical Guests!** Plus entertainment, food, and presentations from dozens of conservative organizations. This event will go down in the history books as one of the greatest conservative events in the USA! But to make sure we can execute it to its fullest potential, we need __YOUR__ help to get as many young conservatives in the door as possible. [**Will you please help us do that with a generous Scholarship Contribution of $35, or even $100 today?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zle9vincct4ilvn9v66ahejk1h1gb9gir17q4sl0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shjmaob4cjh2bs)
---
[**Give One-Day Pass**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z502jn3hjdrlcak3enu1q29q8k76cuc71lhn8nno_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shjmaob4cjh2bs)
---
[**Give Four-Day Experience**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zov3q33dd43u0rhr36lidsunpbk9b44ets3jjvq8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shjmaob4cjh2bs)
---
[**Give Another Amount**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc8qmvujb266odtmi55ffm4brag7fvfth7gkopdg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shjmaob4cjh2bs)
---
I personally know many of our great guest speakers and musical guests very well. Each of them have personally told me they cannot wait to attend this incredible event! All have been working tirelessly to prepare for **AmericaFest 2021** and have promised not to disappoint! _It’s going to be awesome._ Building up this nation and empowering students through education is my life’s work. This event is a culmination of everything I have spent the last decade focusing on— _and so much more._ If you’re able, I hope you’ll join us **December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona** —[**and please consider sponsoring one or more students so they can attend this mind-opening, liberty-loving, informing and entertaining experience!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3ioc4jmlep4krd6t3qmi3ufatq498u8c89k4160_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shjmaob4cjh2bs)
---
With unbridled excitement, Charlie Kirk Founder, President Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zlr3lf2u8p243336n6nh3vvv71vl3d0g7adnkeno).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp7dts57br9n0en5qp99hctq0u8bv1rfrodoqmg0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cji6epb1chie49fg)

body:
The Supreme Court has allowed challenges to SB 8 — Texas' unconstitutional abortion ban — to proceed. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSeVtQfDWNLS6IBFr9NtQcwPKowHhfTQon9dmxH5eHFtAuUQjzz5ZTu35l2MMFvWcasr4_rWsaYu4PEOp1RV89Be7T-Qh0C_-24nVmBqgPmZ3sa5mBtvMFVj_zVEf7x2p0c039dFIcBMakf2qCDvPgJ5anO5FBDXwOxkA2EUflur252QxDvITidM5MIzvtOvE6aL7iFKErtEQAstQcccHnqfaji_s4CXDGm9Oj8Es6NCbY0iRY7BUZ2w2z7b16Sxtir/3hq/hbCTKIj5Qr6XsaL-Pcy_ow/h0/pU55PJMYZYzrLR9F8MPQdF97kzmRkgxqxQiDMysf8tU)
Peter, this just in: **The Supreme Court has allowed challenges to SB 8 — Texas' unconstitutional abortion ban — to proceed.** But we can't wait for the courts to act. Reproductive freedom and the right to an abortion _must_ be protected; the only way we can do this is to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law. Unfortunately, that requires abolishing the filibuster, which Senator Kyrsten Sinema has said she is against. **[It's outrageous that the future of abortion rights hinges on this one decision — but unfortunately, it's what we're facing. But it doesn't have to be this way, Peter, and we need to send a message to Sinema that if she continues to fail to act, we will replace her with someone who can actually do the job. Will you chip in $3 to support on-the-ground organizations who are doing the work to oust Sinema?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeShunsNnfYymQgqJyKX9HZ0Q2J-pcaag7LkjA2_hA5pfYsIUjH_WpAOy-Lu9HeltAqsmU9l76ubF2_7GrYAHdEAxP_o90dDeB3jsvABeaj56DlyvVGcvfBU2Z4rluPTqEchmXEnty1Re8cqqEQTPk-m5vvL0PEyeGBlWcyN_ujQ30DdOGwDf3qNT7foi7muQDqNStrx1BdTZ0SFsRhW2IVZ_hjEbQYxdMSbhSb70qkywMfcIaGO3veG8ToRmmqel3mbpaK32SCey-jziY-coctSE_qhONc_rAqjk3XCxzfOrE6btMNkj7yzB2_PoqfQjw4/3hq/hbCTKIj5Qr6XsaL-Pcy_ow/h1/7euiDG-IHCK3n_rREgpUD_uI7NMvdJmezR05C2Q08_E)** **[Contribute $3](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeShunsNnfYymQgqJyKX9HZ0Q2J-pcaag7LkjA2_hA5pfazrIqsEKPJxSYMRoWBVpmOEWRKTX6qzKOzZTGVFlcN0Pg1dWQcKptiMH0WbduYhXi68_eIKwbCiFDZGJCjeZf8wkbouC-OJQepS50jBR53Qx1RiHDNOuxcbGZIzlHNlUtf1iN21HHFKInsxp7VLY8Qpj0HfjNP4TIi5Cn5YQqJZEQ_zw1XAsL_bciMRGJtumWUObg1T7rAXnVH0gaXLzWAGMmoBNoY-UYuvFIayQMv9Ztr2YKYJPGYiJYuv-LFlUwiNLsznVKTNkuy8EV-Naoq/3hq/hbCTKIj5Qr6XsaL-Pcy_ow/h2/Jgo_SEHzRE05r9UPvYok4lmfoVS3rFcJJu-MVeofGiM)** It couldn't be clearer, Peter: **you either protect abortion rights, or you can protect the filibuster, but you can't do both.** And because of Sinema's unwillingness to let go of the filibuster, millions of lives — in Texas and beyond — will be put in danger. Kyrsten Sinema is not only doing a poor job of representing Arizonans, but she's also making dangerous, life-threatening choices — all to benefit herself and her big industry donors. **[That's why we're holding her accountable and doing the work now to build a strong base that will oust her in the primary. clean_body: The Supreme Court has allowed challenges to SB 8 — Texas' unconstitutional abortion ban — to proceed. | | | Peter, this just in: The Supreme Court has allowed challenges to SB 8 — Texas' unconstitutional abortion ban — to proceed. But we can't wait for the courts to act. Reproductive freedom and the right to an abortion must be protected; the only way we can do this is to codify Roe v. Wade into law. Unfortunately, that requires abolishing the filibuster, which Senator Kyrsten Sinema has said she is against. It couldn't be clearer, Peter: you either protect abortion rights, or you can protect the filibuster, but you can't do both. And because of Sinema's unwillingness to let go of the filibuster, millions of lives — in Texas and beyond — will be put in danger. Kyrsten Sinema is not only doing a poor job of representing Arizonans, but she's also making dangerous, life-threatening choices — all to benefit herself and her big industry donors. name: Pfaff for Congress
subject: Another blow to Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
And our opponent Derrick Van Orden is against abortion access.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39554035/320348484/-1995343361?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2021.12.10_b1_abortion_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjA0OGNlYS0wYzVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EJLV4n4UWInhQKmOxIgyJXUJ3d29Zy6e3vQ8a2cFx3Q=)
---
Friends,

Today, the Supreme Court just ruled to leave Texas' six-week abortion law in place -- all-but banning abortion in the state.

This ruling could have a rippling effect across the country and lead to a downfall of abortion access everywhere. There are already states considering similar bans!

The only way to protect this necessary and critical care is for Congress to pass a law guaranteeing abortion access.

But our opponent Derrick Van Orden is against abortion access. And if he is elected, he will try to take away those rights.

**Brad will always fight to protect and codify abortion access. So at a time so perilous for abortion rights, it’s more important than ever to send him to Congress. But he needs your help to get there.**

clean_body: And our opponent Derrick Van Orden is against abortion access. | = Friends, Today, the Supreme Court just ruled to leave Texas' six-week abortion law in place -- all-but banning abortion in the state. This ruling could have a rippling effect across the country and lead to a downfall of abortion access everywhere. There are already states considering similar bans! The only way to protect this necessary and critical care is for Congress to pass a law guaranteeing abortion access. But our opponent Derrick Van Orden is against abortion access. And if he is elected, he will try to take away those rights. Brad will always fight to protect and codify abortion access. So at a time so perilous for abortion rights, it’s more important than ever to send him to Congress. name: John Fetterman
subject: Governor Wolf and I will veto ANY bill that limits a person's reproductive freedom.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Reproductive freedom is sacred both in Pennsylvania and across America.
#
Breaking news, Derek: The Supreme Court just released a decision allowing Texas’ extreme abortion ban to stay in effect.
Let’s be absolutely clear about this. The Court’s refusal to block it is *utterly* devastating for people who need an abortion in Texas.
**I’ve said it before, and I will say it again: The right to an abortion is non-negotiable. Reproductive freedom is sacred, and people should have control over their own bodies. Period.**
With the Supreme Court leaving the future of _Roe v. Wade_ and pregnant people’s rights unprotected, **it’s urgent that Democrats in the Senate abolish the filibuster** — which is what stands between us and national legislation like the Women's Health Protection Act that would enshrine reproductive rights.
Derek, the future of _Roe_ is on the ballot next year. I need your help in this race because whoever becomes Pennsylvania’s next U.S. Senator will be able to cast a deciding vote to end the filibuster and clear the way to protect abortion access, not to mention confirm or deny future Supreme Court nominees.
**[Threats to reproductive freedom aren’t slowing down any time soon, and today’s Supreme Court news is an urgent call to action. Will you please chip in $5 or any amount today to help me become the 51st Democrat in the Senate voting YES on abolishing the filibuster, protecting abortion access, and so much more?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38176?refcode=em20211210-3777&amounts=5&t=1&akid=3777%2E434096%2E61YpfU)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38176?refcode=em20211210-3777&amounts=5&t=20&akid=3777%2E434096%2E61YpfU)**
Thank you for taking action today,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211210-3777-footer&t=21&refcode2=3777_434096_61YpfU&akid=3777%2E434096%2E61YpfU)**

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.
clean_body: Reproductive freedom is sacred both in Pennsylvania and across America. Breaking news, Derek: The Supreme Court just released a decision allowing Texas’ extreme abortion ban to stay in effect. Let’s be absolutely clear about this. The Court’s refusal to block it is utterly devastating for people who need an abortion in Texas. I’ve said it before, and I will say it again: The right to an abortion is non-negotiable. Reproductive freedom is sacred, and people should have control over their own bodies. Period. With the Supreme Court leaving the future of Roe v. Wade and pregnant people’s rights unprotected, it’s urgent that Democrats in the Senate abolish the filibuster — which is what stands between us and national legislation like the Women's Health Protection Act that would enshrine reproductive rights. Derek, the future of Roe is on the ballot next year. I need your help in this race because whoever becomes Pennsylvania’s next U.S. Senator will be able to cast a deciding vote to end the filibuster and clear the way to protect abortion access, not to mention confirm or deny future Supreme Court nominees. Thank you for taking action today, John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Supreme Court allows Texas abortion ban
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Congress must take immediate action.
#
Peter,
The Supreme Court just allowed Texas’ cruel abortion law to remain in effect. This is deeply serious: abortion is nearly illegal in Texas, and this dangerous precedent threatens reproductive freedom in every state across the country.
I will not stop fighting for immediate action to protect Roe v. Wade and abortion rights in America. This is personal to me — earlier in my life, I made the difficult choice to have an abortion. And I carry the message from Seattle to the Pro-Choice Caucus in Congress to rallies outside the Capitol — terminating my pregnancy was not an easy choice, but it was MY choice. Because of this restrictive abortion law and the other abortion bans currently being passed in other states, many people may not have the same choice as I did.
Senate Democrats can act _right now_ by ending the filibuster and passing the Women’s Health Protection Act — _so we can codify Roe v. Wade into law once and for all._ [**Can you chip in $3 to fuel my fight to end the filibuster and protect reproductive freedom nationwide? After this dangerous Supreme Court decision, growing our fight right now is critical.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9009?refcode=em20211210-866&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=866%2E420207%2EqtNyt5)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9009?refcode=em20211210-866&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=866%2E420207%2EqtNyt5)**
The decision to have an abortion is an intensely personal choice about control of our own bodies. And the consequences of that choice are ones that only WE will have to live with — federal judges and Republican state legislatures have no business restricting our choices about our bodies.
The Senate can protect abortion rights right now, but only if it ends the filibuster and passes the Women’s Health Protection Act. We can’t wait any longer.
[**Chip in $3 or anything you can to support my work to end the filibuster and protect abortion rights across the country. Time is running out to stop these cruel bans.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9009?refcode=em20211210-866&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=866%2E420207%2EqtNyt5)
Thank you for joining me, Peter. It really makes a difference.
In solidarity,
Pramila

subject: I have to be honest with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
I don’t know.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39554521/320350172/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGVlYTFhMC0wZDVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BEzaE6BmF8mKi38dTFVyQZuHq-BFARXJGFCIeaN5snw=)

_Peter, I know you don’t always have the time to read a longer email like this one. But this is really important to me so I hope you’ll read the whole thing._

When we won the White House and majorities in both bodies of Congress, Democrats were thrilled -- but I was a little apprehensive.

_**Would we be able to pass the critical reforms that the American people desperately needed?**_

Now, nearly a year later, the honest answer is: I don’t know.

The good news is alongside President Biden we HAVE passed incredible legislation like COVID-19 relief, environmental protections, and just recently the incredible $1.2 trillion infrastructure bill.

But to be honest, I was sorely disappointed that we weren’t able to include the rest of President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda -- paid family leave, free community college, a wealth tax, climate change action, and more.

And as Republicans continue to obstruct, filibuster, and cheat Americans out of these needed reforms, we’re realizing it will take more than two years to undo all of Trump’s damage and enact our own reforms.

_**That’s why it would be so tragic if Democrats lose the House in 2022.**_

Because the honest truth is, we’re on the precipice of instituting our progressive vision for America. We just need a few more years.

[**Peter, that’s why I’m humbly asking: Will you chip in $3 to help me keep CA-41 blue and save our House majority? name: Paul Gazelka
subject: I love our state
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Provided by
body:
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=3cf1dc2652b747c399164cbddc8af08e&_e=yDK7TRAlB8DyN640u5_spi8hRlOBTFP7Lvvl51uVEzcocsYO1Lp0lskw4oh4GHfbbpefv5ufy6SLFytzLhrsiAM5WYiTpw0XgdRLkTkSXdyGeZFxZxrTmCzVstPxJfLcIT7iDnHSyWbcJ8ecTSMS9DeEbpBC-dLy882gjfPsUYKMMqtQLzrszrjmFHX8g-d-Hvl6tDiPKuXIfzSi1VcyamojMmlfVdFzvbdLJgPnM5VeUPo_x8ZCzuIQHVOUVb3ijAa6yfIRusUYQqU5dxKYfrmqpng59nh-trWwMsDWdEDk_mhQFyMyIRnIpiVGAuWM32UbKNjEkmkQUtXd0-R60Q%3D%3D) My friend,
**I am running to be your next governor because I love our state.** Throughout my life, I have had the privilege of seeing and living all over our beautiful state. Whether it be from my time living in St. Paul, Virginia, Madison, Bemidji, Brainerd, or the Iron Range, I know all of the incredible opportunities our state has to offer and the untapped potential that we have!
Our state's beauty and potential are why Maralee and I have raised our family here and committed so much time to our community – from serving as the Chamber of Commerce president to Kiwanis president. This is precisely why I am running. **The state we love needs a change.** Tim Walz and the DFL are failing our communities by allowing crime to run rampant, police to be disrespected, our students and parents to be disregarded, and our economy to falter. [**Unleash Minnesota's Potential! >> Chip In!**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=3cf1dc2652b747c399164cbddc8af08e&_e=yDK7TRAlB8DyN640u5_spi8hRlOBTFP7Lvvl51uVEzcocsYO1Lp0lskw4oh4GHfbbpefv5ufy6SLFytzLhrsiAM5WYiTpw0XgdRLkTkSXdy0AkL6hltNblRoU-dmQicwZfuzjvIdqr7PaYPnWYGD5QYi7Yw9NhwJ3-a7we-y2V0qB55HtXKNTCI0r3xUm8TiHpGdY6gpjpg6LmklKPd_XFmCK1RPDhm0Av9ELk1Vg5nFFxcpWqZQh3hde1IEfAXTIPBDn1cEoADiLjmxdFD-mwDCVTKK82s-Qa7OFGmqSjyvBc-yKW4KK6DWjunh_bLCjGlNAyFUJ-kfml0mMBwZig%3D%3D) We have so much to be proud of here in Minnesota. We have the best natural resources, the most gorgeous lakes, and by far the best hockey! **This campaign is a movement.** A movement toward obtaining Minnesota's full potential. We must bring a strong focus toward public safety, education, and the economy. The people of Minnesota deserve a governor who works for them, not the other way around. As your governor, I will prop up our police, not berate them. I will encourage our students by fighting for school choice and rejecting far-left propaganda in the classroom. I will put an end to the DFL's tax-and-spend agenda that has stifled our economic prosperity for years. Victory is within reach, but we can't do it without your help. [_**Will you stand up for Minnesota's potential by donating $100, $50, $25, or even $10 today?**_](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=3cf1dc2652b747c399164cbddc8af08e&_e=yDK7TRAlB8DyN640u5_spi8hRlOBTFP7Lvvl51uVEzcocsYO1Lp0lskw4oh4GHfbbpefv5ufy6SLFytzLhrsiAM5WYiTpw0XgdRLkTkSXdz1FvG6yTxdZNvYHuLy_tY4c4ptoM4wXl00f_vzLGsrIIiGaFO-c7dIFxQCWkstWHwbWKE12RzQFQUYukKLKC9vPXjHEluKvMiKl0wJcdCPIOLs2pmDrSP8-xzkRCLU41GMLNS4c-GsdvFRLQkSHkIAq6Tw0kyPW7lR3VhFHKju9NfCPQQpsGoGMku-ZQKLw43mbkngsmilSQicy4GPA0egUkuAB8Qq5aymfw6EnrMkYA%3D%3D) Together, let's change the course of Minnesota. clean_body: My friend, I am running to be your next governor because I love our state. Throughout my life, I have had the privilege of seeing and living all over our beautiful state. Whether it be from my time living in St. Paul, Virginia, Madison, Bemidji, Brainerd, or the Iron Range, I know all of the incredible opportunities our state has to offer and the untapped potential that we have! Our state's beauty and potential are why Maralee and I have raised our family here and committed so much time to our community – from serving as the Chamber of Commerce president to Kiwanis president. This is precisely why I am running. The state we love needs a change. Tim Walz and the DFL are failing our communities by allowing crime to run rampant, police to be disrespected, our students and parents to be disregarded, and our economy to falter. We have so much to be proud of here in Minnesota. We have the best natural resources, the most gorgeous lakes, and by far the best hockey! This campaign is a movement. A movement toward obtaining Minnesota's full potential. We must bring a strong focus toward public safety, education, and the economy. The people of Minnesota deserve a governor who works for them, not the other way around. As your governor, I will prop up our police, not berate them. I will encourage our students by fighting for school choice and rejecting far-left propaganda in the classroom. I will put an end to the DFL's tax-and-spend agenda that has stifled our economic prosperity for years. Victory is within reach, but we can't do it without your help. Together, let's change the course of Minnesota. Thank you, Paul Gazelka | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for and Provided by Gazelka for Governor P.O. Box 175 Little Falls, MN 56345

Dinner, a photo with President Trump, roundtrip travel to Palm Beach, and lodging will all be 100% covered! | Our nation is on a path to complete and total disaster under Joe Biden and the Democrats – I’m proud to be leading the charge to END this Far-Left insanity in Washington. name: ICYMI News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za6vm9m3op43girif5hf75ct6elj1usm34cjoj40_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shjmeoj5cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn1rehm0gp2qvdol97v2276qdvtj91bf5o4491vg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shjmeoj5cdh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zila8asrrcl0deoeab7onoi7crrhbl9ucrbd7r58_rp22sh2s8i66pj4shjmeoj5cdh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

| | | **Voters who think Trump won are the most enthusiastic to vote in 2022**

_CNN, 12/10/21_
---
CNN just reported some interesting poll results, Peter. Let me break it down for you:

75% of Republican primary voters believe that Donald Trump won the 2020 presidential election — and they are the most enthusiastic about voting in the 2022 midterms, saying it will be an important factor in their vote.

This data indicates that Republican primary voters will be more likely to nominate candidates who do not believe Joe Biden is our legitimate president.

But here’s the good news: 61% of American voters do believe that Joe Biden’s win was legitimate.

**If Republican primary voters nominate candidates too extreme for mainstream voters, Democrats will have a better shot at defeating them and holding onto the House.**

We know it will be challenging for Democrats to hold the House next year, but these numbers give me reason to believe that with your support, we can defy the odds and keep the House blue.

clean_body: These numbers give me reason to believe that with your support, we can defy the odds and keep the House blue. | = | | | Voters who think Trump won are the most enthusiastic to vote in 2022 CNN, 12/10/21 CNN just reported some interesting poll results, Peter. Let me break it down for you: 75% of Republican primary voters believe that Donald Trump won the 2020 presidential election — and they are the most enthusiastic about voting in the 2022 midterms, saying it will be an important factor in their vote. This data indicates that Republican primary voters will be more likely to nominate candidates who do not believe Joe Biden is our legitimate president. But here’s the good news: 61% of American voters do believe that Joe Biden’s win was legitimate. If Republican primary voters nominate candidates too extreme for mainstream voters, Democrats will have a better shot at defeating them and holding onto the House. We know it will be challenging for Democrats to hold the House next year, but these numbers give me reason to believe that with your support, we can defy the odds and keep the House blue. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = It’s going to be a tough fight, but I believe in the power of this movement. Thank you always, Tedra * | | = Paid for by BACKROADS PAC, and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. Friend,

In a moment, I'm going to ask you to **[chip in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39554881/320351498/-209993060?refcode=em-121021&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTJiYzU2Yi0xMDVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y7SRZRXl-PcQIwV-6KfplRt3O4AH9vMwUcta4GqBPQo=)** to our grassroots campaign to flip CA-1 from red to blue. But first I want to share a quick update from the campaign trail.

**I have personally handed out over 8,000 palm cards to voters in the district.** When we launched this campaign six months ago, the advice I received repeatedly is talk to voters in-person. I took that advice to heart, and I made a goal of attending at least one event every day. I have attended dozens of farmers' markets and several county fairs. I've tabled in front of grocery stores and at Chico State. This upcoming weekend I will be participating in a Christmas parade in Fort Jones, attending a pancake breakfast hosted by their local fire department, shaking hands at an arts & crafts fair, and touring a tree nursery.

Rural communities like mine deserve someone who is willing to listen to their constituents. If we’re going to win, it starts by reaching more voters where they’re at and letting them know there’s a viable alternative to LaMalfa. Doing this takes time and money because I can't talk to everyone, which is why I'm asking:

**[Will you chip in $3 today so we can close the $9,119 gap on our mid-month fundraising goal? name: Ben Samuels
subject: Our virtual fundraising event is happening next Thursday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ben Samuels for Congress
body:
Have you signed up for our virtual fundraiser?

We’re hosting a virtual fundraiser on Thursday, December 16 at 5 p.m Central Time. **[I would love to see you there, so please click here to RSVP!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39554941/320351644/-50102959?refcode=EM_FR_211210virtual_ev_bs_90DO_4_NG_Na_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTk1ZjRmNy0xMDVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XXUM0LShnMBLj0ivqA8KswocLAzbT9Ny3j6GKkwsmNc=)**

I want to meet each of you and discuss my plans to bring jobs back to Missouri and fight for a brighter economic future for all of us. I’m grateful to take on the challenge of governing, and tackle our tough economic challenges, using my experience building bipartisan coalitions to solve problems.

We're entering our final push before the close of the year, and I need you on board. Maintaining our momentum this December is the key to a strong start at the beginning of next year.

**[Can you help us get a head start and join me at Thursday's virtual fundraiser?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39554942/320351645/-50102959?refcode=EM_FR_211210virtual_ev_bs_90DO_4_NG_Na_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTk1ZjRmNy0xMDVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XXUM0LShnMBLj0ivqA8KswocLAzbT9Ny3j6GKkwsmNc=)**

Best,

Ben Samuels

9621 Olive Blvd.

Saint Louis, MO 63132-9998

name: Paul Schimpf
subject: Schimpf from the Trail 12/10/21
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P
body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_10&n=1)
---
Friend, I've dealt with Iraq's "Ace of Spade"—Saddam Hussein—during my time in the Marines. I sat in the same room and breathed the same air as one of the world's most infamous terrorists. As the lead American attorney advisor to the Iraqi prosecutors, I was there when we induced a remarkable courtroom confession from Saddam where he admitted culpability in the massacre of hundreds of Iraqi civilians. This week, I launched a new video taking people inside the room prosecuting Saddam. [Click here or below to watch!](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRb3DdgLeWj8Lm7ojvcYD2F8&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_10&n=2) [](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRb3DdgLeWj8Lm7ojvcYD2F8&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_10&n=3) After standing up to Saddam Hussein, I will not be intimidated by Illinois politicians who are in the way of making our state a better and safer place for our families and businesses. I also wanted to make a quick reminder that tomorrow, December 11th, starting at 1:30pm, you're invited to our [Army vs. Navy watch party](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/army_navy_game_watch_party?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_10&n=4) at Bandito Barney's in East Dundee. [RSVP here to join us tomorrow!](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/army_navy_game_watch_party?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_10&n=5) S/F, Paul Schimpf
* * *
**Volunteer of the Week** This week we are highlighting the work of our Iroquois County Director, Mitchell Bence. Due to Mitchell's efforts, we have a sign presence in Iroquois County. Thank you, Mitchell, for your hard work, support, and—most importantly—your friendship! [****](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6pOa_jPCOozcMV6SuBWw6qPXRq5uafVMzOnOWDN0MG2MIrK37IT1osBb9r-OHjffbKhQSLRfjwYFW90ndPbmBv0&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_10&n=6)[If you'd like to volunteer on our campaign, click here.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/volunteer?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_10&n=7)
* * *
**In the News** [](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=v4cHwepctZ_HmTnYxcHT9sr5FncMCOHOlMrAdxIH_rkqJeAf5Wu0ubLsUixFtxbeOq4AdCq0YU_Rbip3oUXWW5qw7odiM6ZeHxG4qTV5pINzsfqWo-029M1gZe_ssL5SdLhatIq0SGGE7AQKh3yxfzc-JfqninHXx4XDWtVOO2KDioUM9E7uU7Ke4aJkFVP143B4SXrP-iHUhnSjkx6Hyg&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_10&n=8) This week, I got to join Tom Miller on WJPF to share why I'm running for Governor of Illinois on parent's rights, safe communities, and restoring trust in government. name: Team Harper
subject: Morgan’s newest endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
We have a real chance to change the face of Ohio politics.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211210-448-footer-ak&t=2&akid=448%2E90090%2EhnEvXY)
**BREAKING: The Collective PAC just endorsed Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio!**
[**_You can help us build Black political power in the state of Ohio right now by contributing $5 today. Together, we can defeat our far-right and corporate backed opponents and elect a Black woman to the U.S. Senate._**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18002?t=3&akid=448%2E90090%2EhnEvXY)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18003?refcode=em20211210-448&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=448%2E90090%2EhnEvXY)**
* * *
We’re so excited to share this news with you today — **Morgan Harper is the Collective PAC’s newest endorsement!**
_“The Collective PAC is proud to endorse Morgan Harper to represent Ohio in the United States Senate. Ms. Harper’s passion to empower the communities of Ohio enables her to push for accessible healthcare and childcare, ending the wealth gap, and continuing to dismantle corporate monopolies. From her work during the Obama administration, where Ms. Harper served as a Senior Advisor at the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, to her dedication to community organizing, she has the passion and experience to give power back to communities across Ohio. The Collective PAC is excited to support Morgan Harper, and looks forward to helping her make history in the Buckeye state.”_
---
The Collective PAC aims to challenge the under-representation of the Black community in elected seats of power throughout our nation. To reach political equity – a place where African American elected officials represent the community’s population statistically – **Black people should hold at least 13% of all elected offices in the U.S.**
**Black women are the backbone of our party, yet**** _there isn’t a single Black woman in the U.S. Senate_****.** Let’s change that and make history in the Buckeye state!
[**_We can’t do this alone_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18002?t=5&akid=448%2E90090%2EhnEvXY)**[. Now is the best time to contribute to our campaign so we can capitalize off the momentum of Morgan’s newest endorsement and enter election year strong. Can we count on your $5 donation today?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18002?t=6&akid=448%2E90090%2EhnEvXY) **
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18003?refcode=em20211210-448&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=25&akid=448%2E90090%2EhnEvXY)**
Onwards,
Team Morgan Harper
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18002?t=26&akid=448%2E90090%2EhnEvXY)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211210-448-footer&t=27&refcode2=448_90090_hnEvXY&akid=448%2E90090%2EhnEvXY)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=448%2E90090%2EhnEvXY)

name: Michael Bennet
subject: the Supreme Court’s decision today is a blow to abortion rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
The right to safe and legal abortion care should not depend on what state you live in. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39555196/320352598/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWZjOTFiNC0xMTVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8KmRIHAvCdFhpAEjBTBzKWibPB6gH1iHAdf8mW_QpKM=)
This morning, the Supreme Court refused to block Texas’s dangerous abortion ban. **Folks, this is a further blow to abortion rights.** I co-sponsored the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ , because the right to safe and legal abortion access should not depend on where you live. This bill would enshrine _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law and protect against attacks on abortion access. Reproductive freedom is at risk, with more than 20 states poised to institute abortion bans or extreme restrictions if _Roe v. Wade_ is overturned by the Supreme Court — so this bill is critical. I’m counting on folks like you to show your support for the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ today. Time is working against us here, team, so the more grassroots support I can show for this legislation, the better. **Will you add your name to my petition calling on the Senate to pass the _Women’s Health Protection Act_? The fight to defend safe, legal abortion access has never been more important, so I need you on my side.** | | __**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39555197/320352599/-2109611595?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_RES_AC_20211110_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWZjOTFiNC0xMTVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8KmRIHAvCdFhpAEjBTBzKWibPB6gH1iHAdf8mW_QpKM=&emci=96fc91b4-115a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=99fc91b4-115a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1295540)**__

__— Michael __

name: Team Eugene
subject: This problem won’t just go away
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEPASQUALE FOR PA-10 Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates:
body:
Scott Perry can’t ignore this. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39555212/320352779/-1035065861?refcode=EM_FR_211210rx_N_TE_TE_7_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmM3YjEzYy0xMjVhLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TcE1IoyCwYUZlOq5oywE_RDldVcE8ZwWE1EzQBdRlS8=)
---
Team, it’s plain and simple: **rising drug costs are pushing our budgets to their breaking points.** Big Pharma is free to jack up prices and rake in mountains of profits by squeezing every dime out of the people they're supposed to help. And their swarms of lobbyists have spent decades kneecapping our government and stopping us from taking action. But when he had the opportunity to cap costs, keep life-saving medication like insulin affordable and give us the power to negotiate lower prescription drug prices, Congressman **Scott Perry was all too happy to vote NO.** [**No one in America should be priced out of the medication they need to live. body:
| | | This year, nearly 6,000 children have been killed by gun violence.
Instead of dealing with the crisis, Republicans in Congress like Rep. Lauren Boebert are posting photos of their kids with assault weapons.
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC8bjqfm1q-7L5Ge5Ma2_uPXqE5Ddiyuyx8xS1Yz0p11kG41GvKiv4cJ_xDv9p139m5pXEarjgt4vdQq4vvKJKHOIZsiDuuqZLbME6KBoRexXGhRbzzU9YQojOk7-EQyfxkhAAo3O5oGwpjDLirAoBiGNEwOIzL7vzTGcihGeh0rPNqvrbdOSmdqDNKA4j0Q_c-Q3kcawJ8tNL0bX6pHKxfSTQwMBXhBKXO4b8Qvh10b7MdA2CIVHsUvtRkaoJQPW8Ioty9FveT2cK8O8XKvXQYnPMmfImN6qcxcKZUURfNW2KV_EpPl44Uit4cjp2q-5ik/3hq/FEeAQXbyQW6m5IMQ7Rd1pw/h0/vJq2y2VNo3K5X093SG0NhFI2OliRxdONunDTe0yi-gY)
I'm trying to keep our kids safe from guns, not put them in harm's way. I’m running for Congress to pass common sense gun safety laws to protect our families and communities.
****[**We can’t let extremists like Lauren Boebert take the majority in Congress. Can you donate to my grassroots campaign to hold a toss-up, open seat in the House today?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC8bjqfm1q-7L5Ge5Ma2_uPX7CwzjSNEdehKM6kmGcUg4MC6jEsXWnuCbnMlli9PQZAMYqxtgN3erv1cgGbhxxkLDU6AyPJVRwBjl1llG1_8lgpJTx_EQjkmftBNmQOT0MqwK0lv4UvsAImXOzZgkKoR9BybrUdsCH_DDOvtwKcb6OZjRuZJN2F4u4sS4zRHCAMMFh9mNGYv0zuLYS5Ag3JDqhSXfr1XB7Jp-ZkUrN_w4oszqYOzOlt4zD06mmTtZmlkEwM4_Dv5eA6QF0jHqqDe206CTq9RZqjMzImApO576EYWroLAL1omNH3tG0mHFJs/3hq/FEeAQXbyQW6m5IMQ7Rd1pw/h1/io25r3f4VlZMF773qPlRVeDcnuoj2uo6yhSOUxQXCbI)
[****](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC8bjqfm1q-7L5Ge5Ma2_uPX4Ci05Hu6IK59iWuwVOsSKgYwOln9AKS_5bAaPLNliK-Zfg92nZchUGs4ak8ooapPP8wKn8IsliqCpNmJtrvFaM-KZ6aN529i4nEXF9GLpeNPAbBQMQM4ccpr4_AffZGM9UpVH1TgCOVMpQ0D0UiaS-uMjkx78DaGWfWO6NlbQVy4JRfQ9_YaX2Dzz3jg7ZU1o0_blFaLuHTkKUImcK9xWVz9oPf-7ZydAEmDjrGy5pjGPHWvMOs0IpJ477WWWPIsxoALaDESaLmKNIhJkjrhjK0ueM1q49prY3uYu2L2p7I/3hq/FEeAQXbyQW6m5IMQ7Rd1pw/h2/Y7won983NAPPWvIPEt4qsoIrAPOiw4LJo2XMNJj85hI)My kids are forced to endure the trauma of lockdown drills and fear of school shootings. **
** **That’s why I’m a proud Moms Demand Action volunteer, running for Congress to pass 6 common sense solutions to our gun violence crisis:**
* **Universal Background Checks** would require all gun transfers and transactions to be recorded, and go through the National Instant Criminal Background Check System (NICS), closing what is sometimes referred to as the private sale exemption.
* **Federal Red Flag Laws** or “extreme risk protection orders” allow courts to temporarily remove firearms from a person who is a danger to themselves or others.
* **Banning Assault Weapons****and High Capacity Magazines** would get weapons of war off our streets.
* **Creating a National Licensing Program** for guns, like you need a license for a car.
* **Banning Ghost Guns** to stop homemade, untraceable weapons.
* **Ending Dark Money in Politics** , to stop the NRA from spending millions on lobbying and SuperPACs.

Thanks for standing up. \-- Melanie D’Arrigo | is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. If you’d rather contribute by check, feel free to make the check out to the following address: Friends of Melanie Darrigo P.O. Box 312 Port Washington, NY 11050 Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Melanie D'Arrigo, please .

Fellow American,

The same place where Christianity and Judaism came to life, is the same place where I was born, Israel. **As the only Israeli-American running for the U.S. Senate, I know where my allegiances lie, and that’s why I stand against radical liberals like Ilhan Omar who openly encourage anti-American and anti-Semitic policies.**

**Fellow American, we have a duty to this nation that has given us so much.** We are free in the greatest nation on earth, and we cannot take that for granted by ignoring our God-given obligation to protect our Judeo-Christian values from the radical liberals who want total control over our lives.

**We have to fight for the America we love, because they won’t stop eroding away at our values until they’re completely gone. It’s a doomsday of biblical portions and we cannot allow this to happen under our watch.** [**Can I count on your support?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2eff2183532a4d6b8fac73b787104d99&_e=QBMq8jJGYu15RNDAhwAyxV-AWBoW1lcyDrNCyLIsg3P1Uzzr47OobgMosK2scdaKg4YbzPolKCD7rHa4f-GrSzCncrJ0erJnheWSStOf8ZVgXtLcRZNZwyJHB0LFepLUiv684Xso9pU_cBfLFxMy-UkEDfDK_X8RjQjKC2gDjoI8GqqFHGpsQYRuYqw-g3Ts3TiTp1vgJP37xU-F9LUx6ciDfUBIpAfvgJEOLvla-KJ7C3GcUhbkt7MgELOSEbjpYOwkmkueYSfGcj-gz-sf8uf0rppY1KXYaxj9D7zT0cjIAtTljzu5Bif9anFRhUoYfh6dbsgIjiBbL-7hcCwh4WidNoUJ900WRZV2jv_kqLkd-46o14E11uQ_UaRWJwQB3GehGzQngZsi76VYiCRBc9lU9uQnO76S2P0Ag7b0Sh1_I_guoRhG0yDeXjKEOEQd8_z1kvY3nlqAu84zsYTyrQcXVbWlFrTLCYagheEBich5_uADBknAT-6bbtYceODYY4MGUDAfADyojRhFyV1lWA%3D%3D)

We’ve seen what happens when politicians use religion as a talking point instead of their core values. [**That’s why we have to take a stand and fight for America.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2eff2183532a4d6b8fac73b787104d99&_e=QBMq8jJGYu15RNDAhwAyxV-AWBoW1lcyDrNCyLIsg3P1Uzzr47OobgMosK2scdaKg4YbzPolKCD7rHa4f-GrSzCncrJ0erJnheWSStOf8ZVgXtLcRZNZwyJHB0LFepLUiv684Xso9pU_cBfLFxMy-UkEDfDK_X8RjQjKC2gDjoI8GqqFHGpsQYRuYqw-g3Ts3TiTp1vgJP37xU-F9LUx6ciDfUBIpAfvgJEOLvla-KJ7C3GcUhbkt7MgELOSEbjpYOwkmkueYSfGcj-gz-sf8uf0rppY1KXYaxj9D7zT0cjIAtTljzu5Bif9anFRhUoYo601VHU1q-kFxFLkkwJGQWpDfWVyLlFK9iGErNwr28leq-j2_SmAPf3HVzISJ7cq4BJ_1hcfbGPJamk_554sy1umZY3S6PuUtoMW_CJyrRrcXkj73zlTheQWMmxnyq6Sd0JIsJWUxjTuJYlBXxhYxWJQU03Sj7b2UC12WZ3b2LJDTxvwQEAvgberchRaEMYDWpUP1KuUaTyYRfuEB1ssvw%3D%3D)

_**There’s a reason Christ casted out the money merchants from the Temple.**_ **Shouldn’t we learn from that example and vote out these radical politicians who are telling us to abandon Jerusalem as the capital of Israel, while trying to IMPEACH our traditional values along with anyone who tries to defend those values.**

I don’t know about you, but I’m not going to stand by while these radical liberals and career politicians walk all over the values that made this nation great to begin with. **I’m running for the U.S. Senate because it’s time to return America to its glorious days, and winning a Republican Majority in the Senate can make that happen.**

**If you’re willing to support me then know this: I am pro-America, Pro-Israel, and I know full well that our nation was founded on Judeo-Christian values. I believe that God comes before government, and Christ comes before Congressmen.**

[**If you feel the same way I do, then please help me be the reason we win back the Senate, and together we can help restore the America we know and love.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2eff2183532a4d6b8fac73b787104d99&_e=QBMq8jJGYu15RNDAhwAyxV-AWBoW1lcyDrNCyLIsg3P1Uzzr47OobgMosK2scdaKg4YbzPolKCD7rHa4f-GrSzCncrJ0erJnheWSStOf8ZVgXtLcRZNZwyJHB0LFepLUiv684Xso9pU_cBfLFxMy-UkEDfDK_X8RjQjKC2gDjoI8GqqFHGpsQYRuYqw-g3Ts3TiTp1vgJP37xU-F9LUx6ciDfUBIpAfvgJEOLvla-KJ7C3GcUhbkt7MgELOSEbjpYOwkmkueYSfGcj-gz-sf8uf0rppY1KXYaxj9D7zT0cjIAtTljzu5Bif9anFRhUoYr1PRqASD72IQD8HGh0Y1xCk4M6F3EC3zwnxoNnKQADzVC0Edo_N-D1AVF76ZU8Wf4-XP3slnXi_QdMzOtOoJFMRnrgxrUpdgkHHH9ynJtrXqL9WZBhueF-l9Asdj36EpeRyJVqvBrRecB2Ri_F7D62et4sG0uuzzgdsDjc7L9NYwlE8EBQLRXjH7SkuSsvesi9VFe1UK7fz9G62UvS_T0A%3D%3D)

Thank you for your time Fellow American, and God bless.

Peter,

In August the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. **Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION!**

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 21 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f0b099e35dbf45afb1f8bad4346038e2&_e=vTaf8d1F0YOTqIv3DHAv_aCuuj6mmpUg_lQbGEpTdy0lVjnBGTEbRYP8l_9OmzACavycswhSVFAnm5gg62PT58iiG5jEjoNRLq2Iw5uk26TWfM3mZFdgxotj_rfZXuWkcSTbO4l2nnR3FoZ_cTVMEQ5zsMPHDrxa4YHdeYrP5wYVK1Dxzfe4CGlZE4uNFdPfrB4deLUWW2tW-EgECkOrjH2_WTzf9lTFm8T_oRRfLvq2tFBkqNjUrg5xKd4RSi4rOt6c8Z7k1T479Ihh0sU0b7hi7ySjSW5H0Xj4vCulHxNlAiJ8kAEtAwSuhwsDyV_6GsqRTjeUVss_QR7q_F8ZLXP22IhGEknk9lhm1eMNunTYk5OCmTgerWOoi73jSLAzQ9-uchF-NPt5-TdsCUOXlnBEr6p5tduezhXHEm4cApyFleFqcN-b9rdp05PWk3ON8Vd60VRRUnMMVloT5cSWMWDQkIAn--Djl2jScTCLOr6I5cPH8ykLPUj0tByaAUpHKFhKgzHB45hpB2jSTMpZ2Q%3D%3D)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f0b099e35dbf45afb1f8bad4346038e2&_e=vTaf8d1F0YOTqIv3DHAv_aCuuj6mmpUg_lQbGEpTdy0lVjnBGTEbRYP8l_9OmzACavycswhSVFAnm5gg62PT58iiG5jEjoNRLq2Iw5uk26TWfM3mZFdgxotj_rfZXuWkcSTbO4l2nnR3FoZ_cTVMEQ5zsMPHDrxa4YHdeYrP5wYVK1Dxzfe4CGlZE4uNFdPfrB4deLUWW2tW-EgECkOrjH2_WTzf9lTFm8T_oRRfLvq2tFBkqNjUrg5xKd4RSi4rOt6c8Z7k1T479Ihh0sU0b7hi7ySjSW5H0Xj4vCulHxNlAiJ8kAEtAwSuhwsDyV_6PGhNt6PqkNaktOcLj0ppfRsNbxIs8E1I8fNBrcEY4fRpEnVv0iVPI7ur5-D_rHZE_ewlRBhHL1ElStESOGQ4mGkuSk4b7MDoeS3StM5pXqNQ5bOBZ-oUbURhx1C_lla8hfMTD6OWC8S2FxJoqj-shdiTzprS4-fULKL2V_NXGC1hZncmUV0vqrHO0AIi7at-HiTA7hEbJ_0UyiFQZQcC2A%3D%3D)** _

Response Deadline: Midnight, December 10th

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f0b099e35dbf45afb1f8bad4346038e2&_e=vTaf8d1F0YOTqIv3DHAv_aCuuj6mmpUg_lQbGEpTdy0lVjnBGTEbRYP8l_9OmzACavycswhSVFAnm5gg62PT58iiG5jEjoNRLq2Iw5uk26TWfM3mZFdgxotj_rfZXuWkcSTbO4l2nnR3FoZ_cTVMEQ5zsMPHDrxa4YHdeYrP5wYVK1Dxzfe4CGlZE4uNFdPfrB4deLUWW2tW-EgECkOrjH2_WTzf9lTFm8T_oRRfLvq2tFBkqNjUrg5xKd4RSi4rOt6c8Z7k1T479Ihh0sU0b7hi7ySjSW5H0Xj4vCulHxNlAiJ8kAEtAwSuhwsDyV_6crTKflFYfoYwNyMoxYRSa1cGPM_Mj-5ASKbvuJYV6U85QwIKDZc45MbfpdfOYEaA28G1NQDnh9d0FAWaDKBo66RMktHKMbOhIyhtNXLeXcEEVYxw8kQCPEK_ZGxxmSVxLFiCEdSdGNoHuKFi7Ig31sLU3Cahmly1yE2iXKKttFMGITbcqPjms7TkgJaxIpoHtnXvbF0zUjA88nlDDo3LeQ%3D%3D)

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!** Now, if you work for a company with more than 100 employees, the government is going to try to force you to get vaccinated!

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**
