Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION! Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role. We’ve lived through 21 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations. | SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com Response Deadline: Midnight, December 10th Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us. How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status! Now, if you work for a company with more than 100 employees, the government is going to try to force you to get vaccinated! The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word. Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them. Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked. Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border. Will the hypocrisy ever end? Dear Friend,

With the leaves changing colors, the temperature beginning to drop, and Thanksgiving officially behind us, we’re heading into winter and our campaign for governor continues to heat up! This past month on the campaign trail was wonderful! I enjoyed traveling the state and seeing many old friends while making new ones, as I shared my positive vision for the future with Marylanders from all walks of life. What I can tell you, is that our message is certainly resonating - the momentum behind our campaign is building and I’m humbled by the support we are receiving. Whether I am talking with a small business owner in Easton or a working mom in Montgomery County, Marylanders are hopeful and optimistic about the future of this state. They want to build upon the successes that we’ve had over the last seven years, and that’s exactly what I will do as your governor. Our campaign is focused on ensuring that all Marylanders are afforded every possibility to succeed and pursue their own dreams. The issues that we’re talking about; growing the economy, making sure our children receive an excellent education, and keeping our communities safe, are the issues that most Marylanders I speak with are passionate about. Like you, I love this state and when I’m your governor, I’ll fight every day to continue to make Maryland more affordable and a better state for individuals to raise a family, start a business, and retire. I wanted to take a moment to fill you in on some exciting highlights from November. It was certainly a busy month on the trail, but I really enjoyed spending time out and about in our beautiful state. We kicked off the month with a visit to Baltimore to speak at the Baltimore City GOP’s inaugural Lincoln-Reagan-Douglass-Dinner. There was a great turnout at this event, and it was exciting to see so many people engaged, I wish the club much continued success.
---
---
---
---
We had a great time honoring the brave men and women who have served our country by partaking in the Brunswick Veterans Day parade, which is one of the oldest of its kind in America. I was also honored to speak at the Maryland Federation of Republican Women’s Fall Meeting, this is an organization that means so much to me, and really fueled a passion for public service within me. It’s great to see that the MFRW continues to inspire women to partake in the political process.
---
---
---
---
It’s always great to be able to spend some time on the Eastern Shore. And last month we attended the Talbot County Lincoln-Reagan Dinner and the iconic Waterfowl Festival. The festival is a great way to celebrate our state’s natural beauty and wildlife, and I enjoyed meeting so many Marylanders, visiting with local businesses, and exploring some really interesting exhibits.
---
---
---
---
I was thrilled to be in Howard County to join my friend, Alan Kittleman as he begins his campaign for county executive, I wish him the best of luck.
---
---
---
---
I love being surrounded by my family during this time of year and I really enjoyed spending time with my grandson, for his first Thanksgiving! After a busy and challenging year for all of us, I am humbled and thankful for so much. The holiday season has truly made its way to Maryland. I had the opportunity to join friends in Owings Mills and Baltimore City to celebrate Hanukkah and participate in a menorah lighting ceremony. It truly is the most festive time of the year, and I’m looking forward to continuing to celebrate the season and attending Christmas parties across the state.
---
---
---
---
I really appreciate that you took the time out to read our campaign update, we had a great month! In December we’ll continue to crisscross the state and work hard to earn the support of every Marylander - I hope to see you out on the campaign trail. Thank you for your continued support, I wish you and your family a Merry Christmas, and Happy Holidays!
---
---
Kelly Schulz
---
---

After a busy and challenging year for all of us, I am humbled and thankful for so much. The holiday season has truly made its way to Maryland. I had the opportunity to join friends in Owings Mills and Baltimore City to celebrate Hanukkah and participate in a menorah lighting ceremony. It truly is the most festive time of the year, and I’m looking forward to continuing to celebrate the season and attending Christmas parties across the state. I really appreciate that you took the time out to read our campaign update, we had a great month! In December we’ll continue to crisscross the state and work hard to earn the support of every Marylander - I hope to see you out on the campaign trail. Thank you for your continued support, I wish you and your family a Merry Christmas, and Happy Holidays! Kelly Schulz | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

name: James Tarantin
subject: Traditional Values
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate
body:
Bettering America and standing for our values needs to be a priority. If not, then we’re no better than ancient Rome. |
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a924d15432124cf9964b7d174bc07b15&_e=KLPwRK4Rr4qfimiPse_b86PQxuSODaw_n-ZLqUxMDORm2FZ8_JUgb_yEnCrTxmDlbTe8o3mLanCQhA6fy8U1fgrpuAsmCh7h9yLLCd1UbXgDehFJY5HXN4xykXsF5LK5X8hZAKE3gvgnfWCjDI_SB0Ql-q1-jk0Fdux3Pl5uz4KtuOQZOIKBJzwzKg7z6rAvOkUhTNmdS2ikhyWRcyANqKkxtjWsmtW39PQHgmJ2PEXwMvPE-nTxp2HPTM81UTYdsUzcMOj-_F4c-Md2ldHa9957CsTlPljnYiN9wMwXgMffamrHPmiIodYOmKQPZFSUUjzJUkcSnNNNHyYaIqPM34NtnCleJg2Gxahm74kKcYz4dBPt6gewIUPSIqPqae_c0v8CIiirI8fQw54nvDxaDs8jcg7VpcYYUoFuktTiAo2CgtZdVtDD3ldDxF2Rr0zaIQ6V73LOn5e0Cn-1Z0M13v6eja-258E7KslK9o1SLLNyFqCkI88Q55e2G4HMUig1LHaNODvwPY2Qq4KkSsG-jA%3D%3D)

Peter,

The same place where Christianity and Judaism came to life, is the same place where I was born, Israel. **As the only Israeli-American running for the U.S. Senate, I know where my allegiances lie, and that’s why I stand against radical liberals like Ilhan Omar who openly encourage anti-American and anti-Semitic policies.**

**Peter, we have a duty to this nation that has given us so much.** We are free in the greatest nation on earth, and we cannot take that for granted by ignoring our God-given obligation to protect our Judeo-Christian values from the radical liberals who want total control over our lives.

**We have to fight for the America we love, because they won’t stop eroding away at our values until they’re completely gone. It’s a doomsday of biblical portions and we cannot allow this to happen under our watch.** [**Can I count on your support?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a924d15432124cf9964b7d174bc07b15&_e=KLPwRK4Rr4qfimiPse_b86PQxuSODaw_n-ZLqUxMDORm2FZ8_JUgb_yEnCrTxmDlbTe8o3mLanCQhA6fy8U1fgrpuAsmCh7h9yLLCd1UbXgDehFJY5HXN4xykXsF5LK5X8hZAKE3gvgnfWCjDI_SB0Ql-q1-jk0Fdux3Pl5uz4KtuOQZOIKBJzwzKg7z6rAvOkUhTNmdS2ikhyWRcyANqKkxtjWsmtW39PQHgmJ2PEXwMvPE-nTxp2HPTM81UTYdsUzcMOj-_F4c-Md2ldHa9957CsTlPljnYiN9wMwXgMffamrHPmiIodYOmKQPZFSUDAClP8rgmlQsq-ZIOh51nmwUKO8hlGwwPJBV9IhuST6kAeCDs2DZzfWffbUZi5mEmfL7Gm1cOzwvKigOAUB4XzB2-Qz0RZMNT2VTOKH5j9vdwwvqYtPw0xi0VQLhhhCps3qH3gtrtXKQYqm1CpZ6Elc_1MwbkDlXaEU79YxiwYzj0OsVBFPyyzympLyfIOsn2aaSSZqHpjMsqgCeGzbXOw%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH JAMES TARANTIN >> FIGHT FOR AMERICA **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a924d15432124cf9964b7d174bc07b15&_e=KLPwRK4Rr4qfimiPse_b86PQxuSODaw_n-ZLqUxMDORm2FZ8_JUgb_yEnCrTxmDlbTe8o3mLanCQhA6fy8U1fgrpuAsmCh7h9yLLCd1UbXgDehFJY5HXN4xykXsF5LK5X8hZAKE3gvgnfWCjDI_SB0Ql-q1-jk0Fdux3Pl5uz4KtuOQZOIKBJzwzKg7z6rAvOkUhTNmdS2ikhyWRcyANqKkxtjWsmtW39PQHgmJ2PEXwMvPE-nTxp2HPTM81UTYdsUzcMOj-_F4c-Md2ldHa9957CsTlPljnYiN9wMwXgMffamrHPmiIodYOmKQPZFSUj1b-VIGxa0PIbgyKg7OcEqVd2_J5rt5-11W9Q074ftt3HupkGYQfoAFPPdFpWW03IOQYT-4ovowOAYmsAc2QHgvpvcyson8YqSRrrlXhbbYs8WcXr_BgwkPAU3d2rFZxezLrbnraSXtXeTeDHLVSMId1zQBf5Zw8yCJSLSKcEHJBwVqBpc0PpxArOq9ai55g0pHxcj8GXewRWuBN9kwPlQ%3D%3D)
We’ve seen what happens when politicians use religion as a talking point instead of their core values. [**That’s why we have to take a stand and fight for America.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a924d15432124cf9964b7d174bc07b15&_e=KLPwRK4Rr4qfimiPse_b86PQxuSODaw_n-ZLqUxMDORm2FZ8_JUgb_yEnCrTxmDlbTe8o3mLanCQhA6fy8U1fgrpuAsmCh7h9yLLCd1UbXgDehFJY5HXN4xykXsF5LK5X8hZAKE3gvgnfWCjDI_SB0Ql-q1-jk0Fdux3Pl5uz4KtuOQZOIKBJzwzKg7z6rAvOkUhTNmdS2ikhyWRcyANqKkxtjWsmtW39PQHgmJ2PEXwMvPE-nTxp2HPTM81UTYdsUzcMOj-_F4c-Md2ldHa9957CsTlPljnYiN9wMwXgMffamrHPmiIodYOmKQPZFSUYjoykTUC6uhDmjqvZlYDgTo9JtknIyRj6cxS7RBRx79R0KbQySBWnnBMnL1dVzoA7ib_bHcp9YuUZUN88mIqiz-0NIF4S7RsNwA9WhsQ6dRbvgalS_QKqoNF8e_liUvqGVnp0peVLSBuyayegztnc-tZOCKvcIycOas0w_dEWxW5SKKaLyrMIsUydLAs4tXeT4N0rvi_xGmmHQJQcg6BuA%3D%3D)

_**There’s a reason Christ casted out the money merchants from the Temple.**_ **Shouldn’t we learn from that example and vote out these radical politicians who are telling us to abandon Jerusalem as the capital of Israel, while trying to IMPEACH our traditional values along with anyone who tries to defend those values.**

I don’t know about you, but I’m not going to stand by while these radical liberals and career politicians walk all over the values that made this nation great to begin with. **I’m running for the U.S. Senate because it’s time to return America to its glorious days, and winning a Republican Majority in the Senate can make that happen.**

**If you’re willing to support me then know this: I am pro-America, Pro-Israel, and I know full well that our nation was founded on Judeo-Christian values. I believe that God comes before government, and Christ comes before Congressmen.**

[**If you feel the same way I do, then please help me be the reason we win back the Senate, and together we can help restore the America we know and love.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a924d15432124cf9964b7d174bc07b15&_e=KLPwRK4Rr4qfimiPse_b86PQxuSODaw_n-ZLqUxMDORm2FZ8_JUgb_yEnCrTxmDlbTe8o3mLanCQhA6fy8U1fgrpuAsmCh7h9yLLCd1UbXgDehFJY5HXN4xykXsF5LK5X8hZAKE3gvgnfWCjDI_SB0Ql-q1-jk0Fdux3Pl5uz4KtuOQZOIKBJzwzKg7z6rAvOkUhTNmdS2ikhyWRcyANqKkxtjWsmtW39PQHgmJ2PEXwMvPE-nTxp2HPTM81UTYdsUzcMOj-_F4c-Md2ldHa9957CsTlPljnYiN9wMwXgMffamrHPmiIodYOmKQPZFSUERpBUFkwsG9SlyWnMJ9_t0NXCjT6B8goi1gG071IQfKEJqi3u9GfRvel-8LkO6jT1CcZmlayoPRiAhHRWOtm6bR8WBiV3-5gyALFW38rSiMGwlFEheD4_oTDgoGxfiSi-s78pSi7V2vLGSBm04VBe4aJDfEFGpUmarfo6qoBAMk2zLtjcag7WrJ6ZGwl8nDeg27Z0PXuq-GRoxSE6PwrMg%3D%3D)

Thank you for your time Peter, and God bless.

\--

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a924d15432124cf9964b7d174bc07b15&_e=KLPwRK4Rr4qfimiPse_b86PQxuSODaw_n-ZLqUxMDORm2FZ8_JUgb_yEnCrTxmDlbTe8o3mLanCQhA6fy8U1fgrpuAsmCh7h9yLLCd1UbXgDehFJY5HXN4xykXsF5LK5X8hZAKE3gvgnfWCjDI_SB0Ql-q1-jk0Fdux3Pl5uz4KtuOQZOIKBJzwzKg7z6rAvOkUhTNmdS2ikhyWRcyANqKkxtjWsmtW39PQHgmJ2PEXwMvPE-nTxp2HPTM81UTYdsUzcMOj-_F4c-Md2ldHa9957CsTlPljnYiN9wMwXgMffamrHPmiIodYOmKQPZFSU9nAFj2NMS5N2ezM8gw0_bjQEpmVAv5P6EjSJtgNK6NfLxw4zvfiM1_lKJXRxduEKmOKIeFWo-LcGMT-bkd8YxO6t8FnWAqwpJ8E29ImJRLk0JupGAUPTHylUEIEU0UF26HQslREd2luudehJYMuB7ripsyncbnJw9WOnzk0Y3Kiw7vYRTVEdf6qnup3DcvrcGsPVzGdLoCkcqBjHzZNc-g%3D%3D)
**James Tarantin**
Candidate for U.S. Senate (MD)

[** STAND WITH JAMES TARANTIN >> FIGHT FOR AMERICA **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a924d15432124cf9964b7d174bc07b15&_e=KLPwRK4Rr4qfimiPse_b86PQxuSODaw_n-ZLqUxMDORm2FZ8_JUgb_yEnCrTxmDlbTe8o3mLanCQhA6fy8U1fgrpuAsmCh7h9yLLCd1UbXgDehFJY5HXN4xykXsF5LK5X8hZAKE3gvgnfWCjDI_SB0Ql-q1-jk0Fdux3Pl5uz4KtuOQZOIKBJzwzKg7z6rAvOkUhTNmdS2ikhyWRcyANqKkxtjWsmtW39PQHgmJ2PEXwMvPE-nTxp2HPTM81UTYdsUzcMOj-_F4c-Md2ldHa9957CsTlPljnYiN9wMwXgMffamrHPmiIodYOmKQPZFSUIWApMx0ff4n2IZ29v1K4jIhCU7D7lUY8g5VZIwi1Ii0uOTTAweg6OJX-Y_iMgJDwrvtezMZRITzM_ZHt8nL3ODNMPjCyMfxBNtlumCquJRpBJWVZKYFtWSrVhukuSDOn4KZmHFB-tJEw0cTp8kH7DaiELTxxtor3JlP_qL0KuW8o9YE1ZTBRsAvzeuNLoTZQUrHRiNcROt38yKG-0uc2kQ%3D%3D)

body:
Last chance to get signed books for Christmas and more | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/696efc015b71/jussie-smollett-guilty-president-trump-on-spicer-co?e=f6564bbe3b)

| | | | | | |

## Jussie Smollett found guilty of faking hate crime...
Last night a jury found Jussie Smollett guilty of faking a hate crime against himself in early 2019. The fake “attackers” that Smollett hired, allegedly yelled “This is MAGA Country” when they attacked him. Basically, the whole thing was a stunt for Smollett to gain attention, while making Trump supporters look racist and homophobic and wasting Chicago’s precious resources. Check out these tweets from Kamala Harris and Joe Biden at the time of the alleged attack that I’m still waiting for A. an apology for or B. the press to ask them about:
| | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | |
---
## #ICYMI: President Trump on Spicer & Co...
President Trump joined Lyndsay and me on _Spicer & Co_ on Monday night to react to news of Biden and Putin’s conversation amid conflict in Ukraine, Biden Administration’s diplomatic boycott of the Beijing Olympics, upcoming 2022 elections, his upcoming memoir and more. Check out some highlights below:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=40767f9438&e=f6564bbe3b)
President Trump discusses what he would have done about the US’s participation in the Beijing Olympics:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b2af28b9aa&e=f6564bbe3b)
President Trump reacts to Remain in Mexico policy being reinstated:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=30036516e0&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | | | | |
---
## Stories I’m reading...
[4.2 million Americans quit their jobs in October as workers continued to search for better opportunities](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3007e419c5&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Washington Post____[CNN fires Chris Cuomo](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c1a54af9a8&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Apple NewsI actually guessed they would have kept him.____[2nd Stacey Abrams governor bid in Georgia could bring new obstacles and intrigues](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f6acef48b8&e=f6564bbe3b). — via the APThis story by AP writer Jeff Amy on Stacey Abrams run for Georgia Governor fails to mention that she claims the last race was stolen from her and she still claims she won. Interesting omission from an outfit that notes that in every Trump story.____[Jake Tapper UNLEASHES on Hollywood, NBA and More for Doing Business With China: Can't Buy Enough Soap to Wash the 'Blood Off Their Hands](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=4f2b0ddccb&e=f6564bbe3b)' — via MediaiteCredit where credit it due. ____[Carlos Watson Has a Cold](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=39a422ba17&e=f6564bbe3b) \- via PuckGreat piece further exposing one of the greatest grifters.____[Top 10 Alec Baldwin Excuses](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=577e34f4d7&e=f6564bbe3b) \- via Emily Post NewsExcellent piece by Emily Miller breaking down the Alec Baldwin puff piece interview on ABC regarding the killing of a cinematographer on the set of Rust. ___[Twice-failed presidential candidate Hillary Clinton is pulling her would-be 2016 presidential victory speech out of the archives as part of a “MasterClass lesson,” which is what ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b74ab66d81&e=f6564bbe3b)_[TODAY](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=7244f2889d&e=f6564bbe3b)_[ described as “the power of resilience.”](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=28bf6abebd&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Breitbart

Five reasons you need to pay attention to my congressional race deep in the heart of South Texas: | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=063c8d4fd9fb4e1187e8e867b5187098&_e=kJgC2wt3GTgrcBB7VXzUQh8tOJ6AaO9DKfQBkltAiKuLr2DgOFu-Ka20_eVKyEVRTRexmkCStK4mNO7qRUy9AqmDpl9oB-9yrB7i0UtrBJ2svONuGi81WrcnYEHOrLSqLuJuG1Efn8gl056r_3sXz70q9y3b61oamGhRbUiJduocaYxRvIAqlMVgtU4S4vNtWdok5iGLtjtWZxTXZE7MMDIxhJylKeXWXdl3bnX0RqDD5tVFYXE8eIa_xjuQOG2-EZ_F2XoKM9zTBjs_CtkOI_jerok8qY4AcHO1OBj0HFi7aDfo9tQlIsefSbPrvLUXejaZhJbMYhXDZghgyBp2TnhBOnC87n5KRP06APM3ZKuMVa280MLQUkEMe1ZiPtmUXS_9x1iz_OY7Ap19nrCkcG07t1nydLffqW7lBkNBP2t3U_ngzmoC2myBWbQNa_zc20BWe91VB8yv3lSfKxdi7dcZWbIBK-bxk75uK-lglZc%3D)

Fellow patriot,

If you take a moment to listen to the mainstream media talking heads or read opinion pieces in left-leaning newspapers, there is a good chance that if they reference Texas in a story it’s likely they’re trying to get the reader to buy into the narrative that Texas is on the cusp of flipping Democrat in the near future and that Republicans are doing everything in their power to stop the inevitable.

**But that couldn’t be further from the truth.**

My name is Monica De La Cruz and I’m a conservative Hispanic Republican running for Congress. 2021 marks the second year in a row that I’m running to represent Texas 15th Congressional District in the U.S. House– **which since 1903 has only ever elected Democrats as federal representatives in Washington. **

Here are five reasons you need to pay attention to my congressional race deep in the heart of South Texas:
1. **Last year I ran against a Democrat incumbent no one thought I could beat; while I came up short, I only missed the mark by 6,588 votes – or 2.8%**
2. South Texas shifted more dramatically toward Trump than any other region in the United States in the 2020 election. The counties comprising the Rio Grande Valley are home to communities that are almost entirely Hispanic.
3. **Despite what national Democrats want people to believe, Hispanics in South Texas support border security, despite being labeled as “self-hating” by angry leftists.**
4. Democrats look at Hispanics through a single lens, whether they’re trying to court Mexicans in Los Angeles or Puerto Ricans in New York. South Texas is neither.
5. **Tejanos (as we call ourselves in South Texas) are culturally conservative; There is nothing conservative about today’s Democrat Party.**

Flipping the House Republican isn’t going to just happen by itself. The Republican Party has to invest in areas in which we’ve not traditionally had a presence. That’s why I’m asking you to chip in whatever you can right now. **[We’re making a splash here in South Texas and we cannot let up. Our momentum grows by the day- will you help ensure it doesn’t let up?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=063c8d4fd9fb4e1187e8e867b5187098&_e=kJgC2wt3GTgrcBB7VXzUQh8tOJ6AaO9DKfQBkltAiKuLr2DgOFu-Ka20_eVKyEVRTRexmkCStK4mNO7qRUy9AqmDpl9oB-9yrB7i0UtrBJ2svONuGi81WrcnYEHOrLSqLuJuG1Efn8gl056r_3sXz70q9y3b61oamGhRbUiJduocaYxRvIAqlMVgtU4S4vNtWdok5iGLtjtWZxTXZE7MMDIxhJylKeXWXdl3bnX0RqDD5tVFYXE8eIa_xjuQOG2-EZ_F2XoKM9zTBjs_CtkOI-xlpvcXaiz1IVgM8xJKfGgcGz0BvgjTkdBtJKWTWOz6F84WuEM3KwkHNlplwNaSrwvDAGAhHmZJOnBjd5j7xEWvID5MsJcvn69i0SeRwZ3nUR7070VIXFLh8tzX1aZWDopqTXz3O7Sy06kueK_hmH7Gswkky66nELE132_PiudfjyB7kdMVFKTxVVq60nBGsFBa6zqdIsJzzFZics1KnIc%3D)**

[**INVEST IN HISPANIC REPUBLICANS
CHIP IN $5 NOW -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=063c8d4fd9fb4e1187e8e867b5187098&_e=kJgC2wt3GTgrcBB7VXzUQh8tOJ6AaO9DKfQBkltAiKuLr2DgOFu-Ka20_eVKyEVRTRexmkCStK4mNO7qRUy9AqmDpl9oB-9yrB7i0UtrBJ2svONuGi81WrcnYEHOrLSqLuJuG1Efn8gl056r_3sXz70q9y3b61oamGhRbUiJduocaYxRvIAqlMVgtU4S4vNtWdok5iGLtjtWZxTXZE7MMDIxhJylKeXWXdl3bnX0RqDD5tVFYXE8eIa_xjuQOG2-EZ_F2XoKM9zTBjs_CtkOI8jfRPQJdi5dNG9lfxfVfL8MXcHE82qGL9oKPEq_UgYG7nyC7NPxdLNOikSKwCV8e6ttHlMBSqzg5ZWUGSiPzXPbBnXKFWYfNK4c0355PKbx5Ipmm2sd9Co5nyABnA-svZybXOCnlFavV7N_xxdL6LYvzKjW2k8OMaD3g5z1Y-zNzJ_BLfoj5Xr4wCl9bszODvx-TnH7JPRfJHLadUPMjNo%3D)
The fact of the matter is that Hispanics, which make up nearly 30% of eligible voters in Texas, are increasingly becoming a force to be reckoned with in Texas politics – presenting a big problem for Democrats as they look to 1.) drag Texas further to the left and 2.) Hold onto their razor-thin majority in the House.

_“**For decade after decade, part of being Hispanic in South Texas, just like wrapping tamales on Christmas Eve or listening to Selena at family reunions, meant voting Democratic, even as the party became less welcoming to those with conservative views**.”

_ Chances are if you’re reading this right now, you opened the email because of the subject line I chose. Texas is for Republicans what California is for Democrats: Our heartland and stronghold. **For Democrats in Texas and Republicans in California** , the hope that the party in power will overplay their hand is always front of mind.

**[With your immediate help, we can ensure that Democrats never succeed in their quest to turn Texas into the next California.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=063c8d4fd9fb4e1187e8e867b5187098&_e=kJgC2wt3GTgrcBB7VXzUQh8tOJ6AaO9DKfQBkltAiKuLr2DgOFu-Ka20_eVKyEVRTRexmkCStK4mNO7qRUy9AqmDpl9oB-9yrB7i0UtrBJ2svONuGi81WrcnYEHOrLSqLuJuG1Efn8gl056r_3sXz70q9y3b61oamGhRbUiJduocaYxRvIAqlMVgtU4S4vNtWdok5iGLtjtWZxTXZE7MMDIxhJylKeXWXdl3bnX0RqDD5tVFYXE8eIa_xjuQOG2-EZ_F2XoKM9zTBjs_CtkOI2wnrbOfysoMuLHa2e_sCYFgKbMTX-wEPJsa_rkrRkRploNzeresv5JpX6zCSxeoEgbxIDV7DJMNIAWe6qyasOjLwiy_VNUnKMhcHbPgBUAV03Q7P5hXC8XaUrC-15piNYW6haaCtPgEcxjA-4wlSXBMbqR0uO-ojBqRd_iHycWgku4tJX9zRGmckpQMKAAXFbljx_PN1RtILFcK2wBZzZg%3D)**

Thank you for your time,

Monica De La Cruz

[**INVEST IN HISPANIC REPUBLICANS
CHIP IN $5 NOW ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=063c8d4fd9fb4e1187e8e867b5187098&_e=kJgC2wt3GTgrcBB7VXzUQh8tOJ6AaO9DKfQBkltAiKuLr2DgOFu-Ka20_eVKyEVRTRexmkCStK4mNO7qRUy9AqmDpl9oB-9yrB7i0UtrBJ2svONuGi81WrcnYEHOrLSqLuJuG1Efn8gl056r_3sXz70q9y3b61oamGhRbUiJduocaYxRvIAqlMVgtU4S4vNtWdok5iGLtjtWZxTXZE7MMDIxhJylKeXWXdl3bnX0RqDD5tVFYXE8eIa_xjuQOG2-EZ_F2XoKM9zTBjs_CtkOIxteSZc16ife0C6Bke5sqXxdEYcIANJXo2PmB7Fgmq75P1PH5X6gvJ8caMpgAkqfEu18LEB7RPCn7juCuhCHRGkBIHcz8RQKvVoEfvuKRCWc2jFOSk3YNDjkePgpnf7cYmNYYAoL2eHYbUKLXh7D2CyyJb2Rk9m6Z1RAJzw0guj6bbwULfnyjaHz14rL_CS7Rz0IaiJrtH5PTK_sPF8vq9o%3D)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: This is what I know: ➡️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Just want to check in with you on this.
|
---
| | | Peter, I hope you're doing well since the last time I emailed you.

First, I just wanted to thank you. Thank you for being a Day 1 supporter and standing with me when I most needed it. You understood the stakes and you didn't shy away from taking a stand when we most needed to. Now, 2022 is approaching and it's already shaping up to be one of our toughest battles yet. My opponent already raised $14 Million and while I'm not sure how much more she'll raise this quarter...I know this: Democrats are laser-focused on Florida because they know Senate control depends on it.

_**[That's why I wanted to check in with you. Your Membership status for 2021 has officially expired. So I'm humbly asking - would you consider renewing your Take Back the Senate membership for 2022? I'll be checking the responses that come in for the next 10 minutes. I hope I can count on seeing your name there!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58983870:6UWFc8EyN:m:1:3253819041:1A53D86A9D243E1451F1E24DEF39523A:r "That’s why I wanted to check in
with you. Your Membership status for 2021 has officially expired. So I’m humbly asking - would you consider renewing your Take Back the Senate
membership for 2022? I’ll be checking the responses that come in for the next 10 minutes. I hope I can count on seeing your name
there!")**_

body:
We’re coming to you today to ask for your thoughts on what messages, strategies, and tactics will give us the best chance of passing the Build Back Better Act.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211210-2682-header&t=1&akid=2682%2E2526796%2EVyU9Lp)
We have some good news and some bad news.
**The good news** is that the House officially passed the Build Back Better Act, which includes the largest investment to combat climate change in U.S. history, lower prescription drug prices, universal Pre-K, the Civilian Climate Corps, and funding for high-speed rail — plus so much more.
**The bad news** is that with a razor-thin majority in the Senate, just one Democrat opposing BBB would stop it from becoming law.
**So, we’re coming to you today to ask for your thoughts on what messages, strategies, and tactics will give us the best chance of passing this bill in the Senate.**
[Will you take a minute to answer a few questions as part of our Build Back Better Survey?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/bbb-survey-nov-2021/?source=em20211210-2682-P&t=2&akid=2682%2E2526796%2EVyU9Lp) Your input will be a huge help as we figure out our strategy to pass this bill.
**[Start the survey →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/bbb-survey-nov-2021/?source=em20211210-2682-P&t=3&akid=2682%2E2526796%2EVyU9Lp)**
**If we’ve learned anything from this process, it’s just how vital it is that we expand our majority in the 2022 midterm elections** and elect people who are dedicated to helping working people and support policies that will directly impact their lives.
But so many of the policies in this bill – from climate action to lower drug prices – simply can’t wait another year. Working people need relief now, and they need to see that Democrats are able to deliver on our promises.
[So, will you please take a few minutes (or less!!) of your time to participate in our Build Back Better Survey?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/bbb-survey-nov-2021/?source=em20211210-2682-P&t=4&akid=2682%2E2526796%2EVyU9Lp)
The more input we get, the more insight we’ll have from the ground about how we can best pressure the Senate to pass this bill once and for all.
Thank you for taking the time.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20211210-2682-P_ENG_SUR_LEG&t=5&refcode2=2682_2526796_VyU9Lp&akid=2682%2E2526796%2EVyU9Lp)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211210-2682-P_ENG_SUR_LEG&t=6&akid=2682%2E2526796%2EVyU9Lp)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=2682%2E2526796%2EVyU9Lp) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=2682%2E2526796%2EVyU9Lp) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=2682%2E2526796%2EVyU9Lp)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=10&akid=2682%2E2526796%2EVyU9Lp)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=2682%2E2526796%2EVyU9Lp)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

subject: See you tomorrow!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
body:
It's not too late to RSVP for our event in Somerset

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/ad6fd510b7f9/i-am-running-for-congress-8602750?e=356c0699dd)
https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=27a70e5ddd&e=356c0699dd
Hey there,

I wanted to take a moment and say thank you.

Our campaign has received so much support, and I’m overcome with gratitude. Without the help of friends like you, none of this would be possible.

I am running for Congress to do the hard work of governing. I am running to listen to the voices of those who support me — as well as those who do not. I am running to advocate for policies and programs that will actually bring real, physical benefits to this community, our state, our country, and the people who live here.

And your support helps me spread my message and continue to build a winning coalition behind our campaign. If you’re able, making another donation of just $50, $25, or even $10 today will go a long way in compounding the support we’ve received so far (https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=e25c246973&e=356c0699dd) .

Some of you on this email list are from western Wisconsin, or live there now. Many others are in or around the 5th district in southeastern Wisconsin, or in other places around the state and around the country

But wherever you are, I want to let you know about our next campaign event and personally invite you to join us this Saturday, December 11th from 2-5:00 PM at the Bristol Ridge Golf Club in my hometown of Somerset.

I’m proud to be from a working-class background and to have a chance to celebrate and discuss the issues with friends and family in my hometown. More information about the event can be found in the invite below and you can RSVP to join us by clicking here (https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=7da388cd14&e=356c0699dd) .
https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=98c4b68d2d&e=356c0699dd
Join Mike Van Someren in Somerset!
Host Committee in formation

Saturday, December 11
2:00 PM - 5:00PM
Bristol Ridge Golf Club 1978 County Hwy C, Somerset, WI 54025 (https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=c1372a8b6c&e=356c0699dd)

Levels of Support:
Champion: $1,000 | Host: $500 | Advocate: $250
Supporter: $100 | Friend: $50
Contributions of any amount are greatly appreciated!

RSVP (https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=4938342b25&e=356c0699dd)

I know we’re going to have a good time with plenty of food and refreshments and I‘m looking forward discussing ideas on how we can get Washington back to work for regular people.

If you’re in the area, don’t forget to RSVP today (https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=aea61dfb0f&e=356c0699dd) . You won’t want to miss it.

I hope to see many of you on Saturday,

Mike Van Someren

============================================================

Friend,

This week, the tyrannical Biden Administration announced more extreme and illegal mandates against American citizens. As if these illegal vaccine mandates weren’t enough, they are now imposing draconian restrictions on Americans who are trying to return home from abroad.
What makes all of this worse? These rules do not apply to the millions of illegal aliens flooding across the southern border. Only in Joe Biden’s America are the “rights” of illegals protected, while the rights of American citizens are trampled under the heavy boot of our public health bureaucrats.

**THIS IS UNACCEPTABLE.**
To put an end to this madness, we need to elect politicians that will always put AMERICA FIRST.

clean_body: | | | | Guess who it doesn't apply to... Friend, This week, the tyrannical Biden Administration announced more extreme and illegal mandates against American citizens. As if these illegal vaccine mandates weren’t enough, they are now imposing draconian restrictions on Americans who are trying to return home from abroad. What makes all of this worse? These rules do not apply to the millions of illegal aliens flooding across the southern border. Only in Joe Biden’s America are the “rights” of illegals protected, while the rights of American citizens are trampled under the heavy boot of our public health bureaucrats. THIS IS UNACCEPTABLE. To put an end to this madness, we need to elect politicians that will always put AMERICA FIRST. To put an end to this madness, we need to elect politicians that will always put AMERICA FIRST. Together we can take our country back. Thank you, Team Hageman | | | |

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Newsom is Caving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Newsom Is Caving](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziopbQncHwS1TDYXZKPGqPNbgXhqGqgeGY_JLkGVxRo21rA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dec_10_final&n=1) Newsom is starting to walk back his student mandate, stressing the personal belief exemption allows “plenty of latitude for families to make decisions.” It's a clear sign he’s looking for a way out, as parents fight back like never before. It also means any attempt by the Legislature to remove the personal belief exemption might be dead on arrival. Still, it’s crucial that we keep up the pressure. In another good sign, this morning LA Unified [appeared to call off](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=61mddDDZskoFL6qpUa1GRI3DRrqE4n7NpiEKP9vO3p2KUERF8WZIw4t0Wn8XcH8IKrTrM8XG5rJ_ndSZ0kQYSLujQGuWx1ZDQwGatTpNO2lk6-0YoWt50ry4RB3GEkirfUMG9WQd-ImdTZqDZYqG63llM1ASS7525dfWnRDlrVw19JwxGtIrRsufJASFpUj2eL2vBs00jw2I-IHe-R2uNmWoY7VjsaaMKV-0c8Xo3lg&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dec_10_final&n=2) its student mandate for the coming semester. Though sadly, it already fired 500 staff, displaying the kind of leadership that’s made the district one of the worst-performing in America. Meanwhile, Newsom is back from NYC, where he took a break from our “State of Emergency” to promote his book and hit the talk show circuit. He went on the View, the Daily Show, and the Late Late Show in what might have been called a Tour de Lies. For instance, Newsom claimed “Florida’s death rate is 53% higher than California’s” and “California did better economically than Florida.” In reality, age-adjusted mortality in the two states is similar and California’s unemployment rate is 59% higher. This comes as the Surgeon General has acknowledged a youth mental health crisis related to COVID shutdowns. No one saw this coming, except literally everyone who cared in the slightest. [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAwAghx598bk4kUc88kk8gMcoP_XvRhwxCTAQd-46oGTog&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dec_10_final&n=3) Kevin Kiley
[](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dec_10_final&n=4)California Legislator p.s. I should soon be able to announce [my plans](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziop9mzIcV7R6JucTeZaHBppeFUsdafi8FduC9XfFJus1SQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dec_10_final&n=5) for 2022. Thank you for all your feedback. It’s been the most important factor guiding my decision.

clean_body: | Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: Newsom is starting to walk back his student mandate, stressing the personal belief exemption allows “plenty of latitude for families to make decisions.” It's a clear sign he’s looking for a way out, as parents fight back like never before. It also means any attempt by the Legislature to remove the personal belief exemption might be dead on arrival. Still, it’s crucial that we keep up the pressure. In another good sign, this morning LA Unified its student mandate for the coming semester. Though sadly, it already fired 500 staff, displaying the kind of leadership that’s made the district one of the worst-performing in America. Meanwhile, Newsom is back from NYC, where he took a break from our “State of Emergency” to promote his book and hit the talk show circuit. He went on the View, the Daily Show, and the Late Late Show in what might have been called a Tour de Lies. For instance, Newsom claimed “Florida’s death rate is 53% higher than California’s” and “California did better economically than Florida.” In reality, age-adjusted mortality in the two states is similar and California’s unemployment rate is 59% higher. This comes as the Surgeon General has acknowledged a youth mental health crisis related to COVID shutdowns. No one saw this coming, except literally everyone who cared in the slightest. Kevin Kiley Legislator p.s. I should soon be able to announce for 2022. Thank you for all your feedback. It’s been the most important factor guiding my decision. Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States

Marcy has fought for our progress for decades: let’s defend her seat and our future. |
Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux4SPVPykJX_z_EX8irhwN3rOo6pGBuCoUTs_kecNJEDYlZQUbZ8ZSsNqWj0O0OLLw3-2A9cB46AnDNNmOR5YFHBfprzNLSGbR9Rit0ssJEmo-HhqM63YLZY3MEnywz--emIF6dlEQwVcu2IBHPvEDySaeZ1IK3lF-J3tU1bufM58bBLHIfAoV3rATCdTdMt58OVOLQ1uSrm0FOHdOI5aJs1SuwAE7_M1hfk2yxXsgUoSjPf4ZvaUFZdlVsE_MpOfYmud06aWLtFkNq3u_BagSXH1DKrmHKzlwc88Ivzc_Wy8G085mxj6nq-p14JP8fA7-KnOF167qIlaL6IzdnaN1_eRutOF0mhlxC72YZJEE3Fs/3hq/pPF_jtKaTnaQEz01HDVXVg/h0/hnq_TThSPViGO3kofFcGlX8NZQqRSSv5499Qb-B1Qu0)

| | Team,

**I am truly amazed.** My team launched the Defend Kaptur Fund last Saturday to help me combat Republican schemes in both Washington and Columbus. **Since then, your support has been monumental.**

I have spent every waking hour of my time in Congress fighting for the people of the Heartland. Because of my advocacy for good jobs, a clean environment, safe and affordable housing, and health and retirement security, we will start 2022 with a big target on our back. **But, over the past week especially, I’ve been blown away by the outpouring of support.**

**** **So many of you have contributed to our Defend Kaptur Fund. We are now just a few steps away from our goal. We need to raise $5000 by tomorrow to stay ahead of our 2022 fundraising.**
**[Republicans will stop at nothing to steal this seat, but I still have a lot of fight left in me. I know that we can win this together. Can you pitch in $25 to help us reach our $5,000 goal by tomorrow?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux4SPVPykJX_z_EX8irhwN3rOo6pGBuCoUTs_kecNJEDYlZQUbZ8ZSsNqWj0O0OLLw1Gv86eNAsxmFoItI57I9yTOh8lDTr9JFFw4S6iHC8Xh5_JJlD_NYV3pkjvMJQLgE7Ffl8-RM3pDiuOqPNAW88AhVDx1SNkY_VpeI8-pfaaqqSxkq7QFwwyL7Abwc840UXnqN7HPe-qYI_dtKLT5bOsSd2lKsMpbPOfks8uj6Rui39ZVp_isWxPpIIXQlPF_Re3RzHGxBGyc74XFqzLGahcoBDLaV4vpjnDwvIvxkVYyANvXjWcJDr66pH2ymv1aezT8Ti30vG0WuS-ioWgBan682KK_e6VmE1EuAvELdhj-zrxueqxSos0oHkLzct1dog/3hq/pPF_jtKaTnaQEz01HDVXVg/h1/NDcMDgOyByA2aYrxGjP19_MkpdcqJrpTuiBvhOPISGU)**

I’ll give it to you straight: we have an uphill battle ahead of us. The GOP is trying everything to wrangle away another seat in their quest for one-party rule. **But I know that we are the team that can defeat them. Together, we can overcome their attacks, and secure a more hopeful future.**

**[With 2022 around the corner, we need to hit our fundraising goal tomorrow to stay on track to keep this seat in YOUR hands and keep up the fight for good jobs with good wages, protecting seniors and our veterans, and preserving the health of our Great Lakes. Can you pitch in $25 tonight?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux4SPVPykJX_z_EX8irhwN3rOo6pGBuCoUTs_kecNJEDYlZQUbZ8ZSsNqWj0O0OLLw1nhb1vK2PaQek0cmDOKaqIp0nwMjsSN14OQRGfNCGV2M8JcLThAELL7vYWxm2eElEWwtC9l0mMNyiADzqgiSytJ_DBhf6i_lLkDpKVXGYNzB3jP63F8ruIs92KaG_rNvDLEbAwRq5QH4cvyoje4IgfLLEuxaT95omJgiFIk0Zm0nDJVO9LWO16QZnGUp3QJtT4WC50qbabbx6yuvwtknoMCmMpMT6rzZK-Br32RRddUoEM8USWi0raLU-Gigl_HBZGtwKGvQQlaE7J3uXP5wElLFN1iWtLqkMWM4uP77sbQrn8Wl_tOKn148he4oLm_oQ/3hq/pPF_jtKaTnaQEz01HDVXVg/h3/r34nTA0qEqXW7GJwY08AokPo3n0cykwVqEotaCV1bik)**

clean_body: Marcy has fought for our progress for decades: let’s defend her seat and our future. | Marcy Kaptur | | | | Team, I am truly amazed. My team launched the Defend Kaptur Fund last Saturday to help me combat Republican schemes in both Washington and Columbus. Since then, your support has been monumental. I have spent every waking hour of my time in Congress fighting for the people of the Heartland. Because of my advocacy for good jobs, a clean environment, safe and affordable housing, and health and retirement security, we will start 2022 with a big target on our back. But, over the past week especially, I’ve been blown away by the outpouring of support. ** So many of you have contributed to our Defend Kaptur Fund. We are now just a few steps away from our goal. We need to raise $5000 by tomorrow to stay ahead of our 2022 fundraising. https?linkid=2&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-she-always-fights-for-us-3&emailreferrer=email1380696_subject1819326&emailsubject=im-amazed | I’ll give it to you straight: we have an uphill battle ahead of us. The GOP is trying everything to wrangle away another seat in their quest for one-party rule. But I know that we are the team that can defeat them. Together, we can overcome their attacks, and secure a more hopeful future. https?linkid=5&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-she-always-fights-for-us-3&emailreferrer=email1380696subject1819326&emailsubject=im-amazed Thank you for your support, \-- Marcy Kaptur Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. I am doing EVERYTHING I can to stop Pelosi & Biden. My 8.5 hour speech is the longest speech ever given on the House floor.

But it wasn’t enough. Pelosi holds too much power.
[**FIRE PELOSI**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31r1q-1oufk-4qqlpo7/)
If you’re frustrated with our current circumstances, believe me, Fellow Conservative, I am too. I’m livid.

The only way our situation gets better is to Fire Pelosi & take back the House! I will do whatever it takes to accomplish this goal. And %%First Name%%, I can’t do this without you.
[**FIRE PELOSI**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31r1q-1oufl-4qqlpo8/)
So I am coming to you, hat in hand, and humbly asking, no I am PLEADING WITH YOU: [**will you chip in $8.32 and help me Fire Pelosi & take back the House?**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31r1q-1oufm-4qqlpo9/) I will personally match every dollar you give. We CANNOT let them keep getting away with this.

Thank you for your support,
[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31r1q-1oufn-4qqlpo0/)
Kevin McCarthy

| Peter,

Every day I am fighting the radical left in Washington. Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi's socialist wishlist is nothing but bad news for our country. Unlimited government spending, skyrocketing inflation, open borders, stripping the United States of its energy independence, teaching our children un-American critical race theory, giving Washington control over our elections and your healthcare... the list goes on and on.

Their agenda has devastating effects on our country and I am pushing back at every turn. **Because of my commitment to our conservative cause, I am proud to be one of only six members of the House of Representatives with a perfect 100% score the last two terms from trusted conservative watchdog Heritage Action for America.** [Click here to learn more.](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=1a39171734&e=9920087750)

Peter,
Under Joe Biden, America has seen a supply chain crisis impacting every aspect of our economy. Combine that with record inflation, also due to Joe Biden’s failed policies, and it is no surprise that _**Americans are fed up.**_

And the dirty little secret that China committing human rights violations is being ignored by the mainstream media and the Biden Administration. Why? _**Because human rights violations are making woke corporations RICH**_!! There is strong evidence that Beijing is behind the atrocities in Xinjiang.

We have the opportunity for an All-American win-win. We can reduce strain on our supply chain, caused by being so reliant on China for essential goods, and _**we can keep woke corporations from profiting off of the blood and sweat of human rights violations**_.
[**HOLD CHINA ACCOUNTABLE >>>**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=fceca671060f4f4fbbbf93aa13e2070d&_e=BtiU1s3CA0gYGp-AnZqO8t9IngVPOX3y537hh6JAkEajwsiSzdOzBkcnLqsQJ4sTNHtyHvAAcQEBW5t89HDtVL4uX2IDnC8rgAZmb-7eROMjw0Ku38mBk9xA-F5qtlhlP5ju86bdtOdKDAiir4ZltGzh_2h-CflrnufL_tGE6WM1ahaXCQKSXQUwtJIZ7-pOeEG8UPvCs4YSgdLSiCQi-9wDMk9PNZHK7OdajJN-zW1Ae9LVbT-Wy9Yj6SbSKuRIeO70nqJlmgVBME3UGwjLe4Lso2lbM2QM_haigezAssZ3Ckptfoo7jKbdeahomiHHqFYQMuZqxU-ZwzOpd_PEHUBl8qVpCvc5QLNx62-r0cyo7T04dguvAs00-6wn4mxib7k8HoQFrfXbZHFxwMTwDFSgqyscQofyq9qq_VK47n8%3D)
_**It shouldn’t be a controversial position that goods made with forced labor should be rooted out of American supply chains**_. We should ensure that the nations that permit it are subject to new penalties, starting with the gravest offender — China. We must recover what was once a foundational principle of our economic policy: that free labor should never have to “compete” with slave labor. It perpetuates global slavery and degrades the wages and opportunities of our free workers.

Here’s what’s going on: slave-labor-loving corporations AND the White House are trying to kill legislation to ban products made with Uyghur slave labor. Democrats are helping them. _**Joe Biden’s Administration should be fighting global slavery, not protecting and enabling it!**_

**OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER** **Katie Launches Farmers For Katie Britt Coalition** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0cdfba6a6c644516bb211e137c15675e&_e=Q1AFwOKVYs9pxuHH4Nh6TpKU6e_dbPrBSWUzLb94vItbe-meRn7_YLkSek2JsOF4CcI-Ekuq2OGpIZEKm_WZAHdBeGJQ1rBQEA-YH-4CWbPFhiK8m1iyQxwSNCsqHp2_JYG5y7QtcNvZSBD4aOMLdTyXUHATUXWibatP3xy0fypiB6HqduPCOloLhyhkmOLuAp0ijL5AJvYK9_sC2v5uJ6iDs-HVh0CLuFAUiqZTGnybYvXtVR_rxuaaKFZyd7vx06lvWxapResHvu2jCcl6ONj5a4Ey2mNwaGShpGInS2o%3D) Excited to announce the launch of [#FarmersForKatieBritt](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0cdfba6a6c644516bb211e137c15675e&_e=Q1AFwOKVYs9pxuHH4Nh6TpKU6e_dbPrBSWUzLb94vIuriCiC7Kbh113CxFRrOH6IWunX7B-XdW_twmPx19WqwCb-bf2-fVZIjbkli9La4IGyPzl62MkzMtnJklGfMkgUEOl993V3Nn-uMfbt3xDJshrZlyUmJdKlSjzqK_3GTQHsqRINeXzmTINulVX74gsPV1bPtUeeLoHPkmjn5NS3Ea9dC8F9VDHnhDXR1tvRBlUCuaPS2Vt1gnWcCswkrGomgL6EAGGC2jjPvA8iDz7R6uo5zY_kYxPJnAytuv9tiNK_GGeqrAiNcRBZPQFiD9tQV_wVGHmFPaO-4YEtl2m1_A%3D%3D), a grassroots coalition made of family farmers from each of our state’s 67 counties! Farmers feed and clothe our nation and the world, and they’re the backbones of local communities across Alabama. [**LIKE AND SHARE POST**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0cdfba6a6c644516bb211e137c15675e&_e=Q1AFwOKVYs9pxuHH4Nh6TpKU6e_dbPrBSWUzLb94vItbe-meRn7_YLkSek2JsOF4CcI-Ekuq2OGpIZEKm_WZACka1ZATh27xCMfWiesr_-imzRVL1cbXFQCVdm27OWLusMeATM17IPcoMFKAdPDJJpCTMa-K-85Pxhr7eX80RawK1eU7QhYtJ3Io1zDCQNGtdCYDfaNlOYjStwVkXF51-GZMy2ibZo8X0ytrCNj8pzb6B2hjv46624IWLBpW9FBn-Ht7Fxm2G1KhHpi_N0GW_caA_X8bpYed9Cm2gKm7NWY%3D) **Alabama Farmers Federation’s 100th Anniversary Celebration** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0cdfba6a6c644516bb211e137c15675e&_e=Q1AFwOKVYs9pxuHH4Nh6TpKU6e_dbPrBSWUzLb94vIvTww_F4vSjBRnym4b7cLp02vD-ta2wT8uH3ieBOpWXfx0MG8STmIlJCz4RXQpNKOZKlTTsC7WnK3sxKO5cnB7N8ukl883AplY_AFvnH0Rpv8G0cTeK59Hyr6yRGCtWfp7_-VlCDununwaQgdBw3cefuuDRGxFaiECe81OtFowUILopheaaf8AzuL5HXT5s53ZuOCphlzjhBBNVfGWj3SoiXfQlWlDTfkfSma9GwVtnJl83KOAzN6BADlIAkBo5CWcd1FDfsBdVBq_6oENSOtZx) I was honored to deliver the invocation to open the [Alabama Farmers Federation](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0cdfba6a6c644516bb211e137c15675e&_e=Q1AFwOKVYs9pxuHH4Nh6TpKU6e_dbPrBSWUzLb94vIu61uItpz6Oqdiql4fGUAHwdQlXxb24JuI5mvyNi1uRQOCE12mB_9UG0VbOsuYq8wNsTasGMNkB-31Bn7DLiwa0NUcDFUQLbB9UzWuqt9-qyn3jubqZ1G4-JilEed-_BGLdYDyTVCfK0ueOq0_btQh2UCNGD9PHn8evyVQGqkTMjWf8nWr5y3F_4MGNqU-1WQgA0HKyyEfwQsl5CARk6uQ0YuqAvTNOK3icoB0W9mHqqCs-kJNJZYq2JYfaGfcQ_K6IHKrPV9zt7qOpXLJJdlvDercC9or1DbkeftLuiwllxci9rz2qAyXrFd-9zhuMYzzHPwQn6fpiPrVVIgp2p4njAw4P7xXvyOrGvRiAlGrpKAy0n6i0-eF4kgxuMgI2inklYFxwunnNv0ZEzbk3ecjO1dFYdz_wO5UveJPLkmvam6GXBPM6j6T5_4j5cL-vKFyJ8mBlTlnKkWbV189_0vm0ETA972DNi03UfSMwXmLZWA%3D%3D)’s 100th Anniversary Celebration this week. We had a great evening visiting with farmers and supporters of agriculture from across our state. I am proud to strongly support Alabama’s incredible family farmers and will always fight to ensure they have the opportunity to thrive without Big Government getting in their way. Our state’s farmers exemplify the American Dream, showing that the dignity of an honest day’s work is what this country is built on. [**LIKE AND SHARE POST**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0cdfba6a6c644516bb211e137c15675e&_e=Q1AFwOKVYs9pxuHH4Nh6TpKU6e_dbPrBSWUzLb94vIvTww_F4vSjBRnym4b7cLp02vD-ta2wT8uH3ieBOpWXfx0MG8STmIlJCz4RXQpNKObAffX_cO4lrLbt64tg8oDPtye4Nydtw3z4ft-EbqNNSQfe1x9t6SoPWObf9RoP1zPAHqsbEmLDtC0V_2l1iYb3mlol_SLC3CYXufd6QXcvrApbEhEW80vueLuDan_Be7TFSgY7mnirgjJH-yyTQgVX1LhdlAe4e1zbsj0QRBKRszDyuktQbvFVaCmPzsVSR75hnyfm_CVr_hb8J9LcckLa) ****Katie Britt On School Board Decision**** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0cdfba6a6c644516bb211e137c15675e&_e=Q1AFwOKVYs9pxuHH4Nh6TpKU6e_dbPrBSWUzLb94vIvTww_F4vSjBRnym4b7cLp0nsPaNyXszzWhxo-vvcDUJd4CZdXGhvuVcO1Ica7mAZKQc8JuZZnt7GwGVnAEBCQgiNzE5IXO2Ey7rsSK7J2jRIM9oOdu6SflGE8-SeqK4UXFuLHXCMACZP681fVsJY2DEQFgIcE6RM586OPK2KSermryACD0rgWiobH5fY7VHVNNjJ_PPqEN6gn-JSaBvn1PQB6p0EnOjulewEP5OfS6wl8w6NhjMf04DSd9Wi5tZCPmsq2o2zf_U9BjYkkwyeDx) The Alabama Association of School Boards made the correct decision in withdrawing from the National School Boards Association. clean_body: OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER Katie Launches Farmers For Katie Britt Coalition Excited to announce the launch of , a grassroots coalition made of family farmers from each of our state’s 67 counties! Farmers feed and clothe our nation and the world, and they’re the backbones of local communities across Alabama. Alabama Farmers Federation’s 100th Anniversary Celebration I was honored to deliver the invocation to open the ’s 100th Anniversary Celebration this week. We had a great evening visiting with farmers and supporters of agriculture from across our state. I am proud to strongly support Alabama’s incredible family farmers and will always fight to ensure they have the opportunity to thrive without Big Government getting in their way. Our state’s farmers exemplify the American Dream, showing that the dignity of an honest day’s work is what this country is built on. **Katie Britt On School Board Decision The Alabama Association of School Boards made the correct decision in withdrawing from the National School Boards Association. NSBA has clearly lost its way, and Alabama funds shouldn’t support its radical political agenda. I stand with parents and students. Please SHARE if you agree. Read my full thoughts here: Now Accepting Crypto Currency Excited that our campaign now accepts contributions via ! name: Dan Goldman
subject: An Update on Our Campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for Attorney General
body:
Peter,

I wanted to reach out directly to you with news about our campaign. I have
been overwhelmed by your support, and the support of those that have
signed on to our people-powered campaign for New York Attorney General —
to defend our democracy, protect the rule of law, and enforce one standard
of justice for all.

I’ve really enjoyed traveling around New York and hearing from so many who
are worried about the direction we’re headed, and excited to fight for a
better future. I’m both honored and humbled that so many saw me as an
answer to their desire for an independent, honest, and experienced
candidate for high office.

In just three weeks, we raised more than $1.5 million from more than 2,000
supporters who recognize the pivotal role that the Office of Attorney
General plays in preserving our democratic values and bringing systemic
change to both New York and the country.

It is therefore with sadness that I announce that today I am withdrawing
from the race, in light of Attorney General Letitia James’s announcement
yesterday that she will seek reelection.

Tish has been a hardworking and effective advocate for justice for New
Yorkers and others around the country. I spoke to Tish earlier today and
relayed my full support for her reelection and continued efforts to
protect and defend New Yorkers and our democracy.

Although I am withdrawing from this race, I will continue to pursue my
lifelong quest to ensure there is one standard of justice for all. I
cannot thank you enough for all your support, both in terms of financial
contributions and words of encouragement. The groundswell of enthusiasm
for our message has truly been an inspiration for me, and I pledge to
continue to fight for our shared values, one standard of justice, and
equal rights for all. I’ll certainly be in touch with whatever comes next.

All my best,
Dan

PO Box 3306 New York, NY 10008

subject: Protecting women's sports from the woke left
body:
A college swimmer for the University of Pennsylvania has been CRUSHING opponents and breaking records along the way.But the kicker? |
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=486a6692c8&e=c2296cffff)
---
| | Dear Friend, A college swimmer for the University of Pennsylvania has been CRUSHING opponents and breaking records along the way. But the kicker? The swimmer is a biological male who competed on the men’s team for three years before identifying as female and switching to the women’s team! **As the Daily Wire reported:** _“A swimmer from the University of Pennsylvania who swam competitively for the men’s team for three years before switching to the women’s team, destroyed the biological women in the competition, winning the 1650 free by a gargantuan 38 seconds ahead of the young woman finishing second, winning the 500 free by a whopping twelve seconds ahead of the woman finishing second, and winning the 200 free by a still-huge seven seconds.”_ It’s sad to see female swimmers who have worked so hard to reach such a high level being left in the dust by this biological male athlete who has an undeniable physical advantage over the other competitors. **Thankfully, here in Florida, Governor DeSantis supports women’s sports and protected female athletes from competing against biological males, saying “In Florida, girls are going to play girls’ sports, and boys are going to play boys’ sports.”** ****
---
| [SUPPORT WOMEN'S SPORTS](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=c1b6ac09ac&e=c2296cffff "SUPPORT WOMEN'S SPORTS")
---
| **I joined Newsmax to talk about why I support Gov. DeSantis' efforts to protect girls' sports, click below to watch!**

---
| I stand squarely with Governor DeSantis on this issue and applaud his commitment to women’s sports**.** **America's young women should not be forced to compete with biological males on the field of play! ** If you agree, sign my petition today standing with Gov. DeSantis to protect women’s sports! Thank you for joining us, _Amanda Makki_
---

name: Rand Paul
subject: I'm very afraid...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate
body:
| | | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/r5THh2AIVotQm5x9DvpTXQ~~/AASl5QA~/RgRjlkkFP0RcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucmFuZHBhdWwuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9fa3g9UGRNWmY1TnRmQXpiN0RLUzZjZ0FGTDZ0SXNqYzNUM0M3bEN4WmptYTVqUSUzRC5KelJjVUtXA3NwY0IKYbMFxLNhrwHL2lIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAADY_c~)
---
| Dear Patriot, I'm not proud to admit this, but I have to be honest with you. When I first started seeing headlines about the new "Omicron variant," I had a moment of panic. I thought, "maybe Fauci was right? Maybe this is the apocalyptic 'monster variant' that he has been warning about?" But then I remembered that Fauci and the media have been wrong about virtually everything since the pandemic began. And sure enough, here we are. Omicron appears to be the mildest variant of COVID yet. In spite of all that, I am still very afraid. No, I'm not afraid of Omicron, which has produced mild symptoms in nearly everyone that it has infected. I'm afraid of the repressive measures that Anthony Fauci and Joe Biden might put in place in response to this new variant. After all, they've been relentlessly spreading fear about Omicron. And just looking at my daily news feed, I see headlines like: _"Omicron Four Times More Transmissible Than Delta in New Study"_ _"U.K. Imposes New Covid-19 Restrictions as Omicron Cases Double Every Few Days"_ _"Should Omicron change your holiday party plans? An expert weighs in"_ The media is working in tandem with Fauci and Biden to make Americans terrified of a variant that is probably the mildest COVID variant of them all. I'm making this commitment to you right now: I will double my efforts in the U.S. Senate to block any COVID restrictions resulting from this new variant. But here's what I need from you: I need you to stand with me against the Democrats. They are pumping money into my opponent's Senate campaign. They've identified me as a top target to eliminate in the upcoming elections. I need you to stand with me so I can continue standing for you. [Will you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 right away so the Left cannot take me out?](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/r5THh2AIVotQm5x9DvpTXQ~~/AASl5QA~/RgRjlkkFP0RcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucmFuZHBhdWwuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9fa3g9UGRNWmY1TnRmQXpiN0RLUzZjZ0FGTDZ0SXNqYzNUM0M3bEN4WmptYTVqUSUzRC5KelJjVUtXA3NwY0IKYbMFxLNhrwHL2lIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAADY_c~) The pandemic has to end. We cannot live the rest of our lives this way. Fortunately, as viruses tend to do over time, COVID appears to be getting milder in its severity. But as COVID weakens, Anthony Fauci and Joe Biden's lust for repressive "public health" restrictions gets even stronger. In fact, just a few weeks ago, Fauci refused to rule out new lockdowns. I am using my public platform, as well as my full power as a U.S. Senator, to block any new lockdowns, mandates, or restrictions. But I need your help, because the Democratic Party is aggressively targeting my seat. My advisors have warned that I need to keep up with their Left-wing money machine or I'll be in trouble. That's why I have to rely on patriots like you. [Can you make a generous contribution of $100, $50, $25, or $10 right away so the Democrats do not take control of the Senate?](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/r5THh2AIVotQm5x9DvpTXQ~~/AASl5QA~/RgRjlkkFP0RcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucmFuZHBhdWwuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9fa3g9UGRNWmY1TnRmQXpiN0RLUzZjZ0FGTDZ0SXNqYzNUM0M3bEN4WmptYTVqUSUzRC5KelJjVUtXA3NwY0IKYbMFxLNhrwHL2lIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAADY_c~) In Liberty, Rand Paul

clean_body: | | | | | | ~ | Dear Patriot, I'm not proud to admit this, but I have to be honest with you. When I first started seeing headlines about the new "Omicron variant," I had a moment of panic. I thought, "maybe Fauci was right? Maybe this is the apocalyptic 'monster variant' that he has been warning about?" But then I remembered that Fauci and the media have been wrong about virtually everything since the pandemic began. And sure enough, here we are. Omicron appears to be the mildest variant of COVID yet. In spite of all that, I am still very afraid. No, I'm not afraid of Omicron, which has produced mild symptoms in nearly everyone that it has infected. I'm afraid of the repressive measures that Anthony Fauci and Joe Biden might put in place in response to this new variant. After all, they've been relentlessly spreading fear about Omicron. And just looking at my daily news feed, I see headlines like: "Omicron Four Times More Transmissible Than Delta in New Study" "U.K. Imposes New Covid-19 Restrictions as Omicron Cases Double Every Few Days" "Should Omicron change your holiday party plans? An expert weighs in" The media is working in tandem with Fauci and Biden to make Americans terrified of a variant that is probably the mildest COVID variant of them all. I'm making this commitment to you right now: I will double my efforts in the U.S. Senate to block any COVID restrictions resulting from this new variant. But here's what I need from you: I need you to stand with me against the Democrats. They are pumping money into my opponent's Senate campaign. They've identified me as a top target to eliminate in the upcoming elections. I need you to stand with me so I can continue standing for you. ~ The pandemic has to end. We cannot live the rest of our lives this way. Fortunately, as viruses tend to do over time, COVID appears to be getting milder in its severity. But as COVID weakens, Anthony Fauci and Joe Biden's lust for repressive "public health" restrictions gets even stronger. In fact, just a few weeks ago, Fauci refused to rule out new lockdowns. I am using my public platform, as well as my full power as a U.S. Senator, to block any new lockdowns, mandates, or restrictions. But I need your help, because the Democratic Party is aggressively targeting my seat. My advisors have warned that I need to keep up with their Left-wing money machine or I'll be in trouble. body:
The mother of a 13-year-old student at Barack Obama Global Prep Academy says that her son came home from school with a brand new vaccine card |
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ded232756cb9406096889e5443058a0c&_e=v7fa4FIVUGkvaKqtDqoviKOHSkcIZE7uGNS0dIw__bqma2pGpl9IqkcbOWJ6BZHFaSKBuYEVMBeczCFGwJkU4GLoZ7mYWTGNEYsePP_SzWw9DbtCvf9Xys6CS7lWebA2dTyPLxACIBI38a_eUZztl17GBLm70czpc0jGIE0Bl9kPfVqeaXOjmZP_Tatcx4u4zoeaynTXVgA7DbwK5asPoQSiOdbpf7w1WSsxjBPspowj2cHKYgApx9KVlFmH8mztrp4LLUFKKX00y0zW6k-H7oF2LOUkFyp3jRa3sXX8d_slmwqToQLnfUT5YVGANIXJ9OypHbdE3aYWey6_KgVroFG6ACuIfo-ahRB4ze7pVHZRd4gYXOu24l2UnFNLQxCnoc3-BhqsDBsfQzEJYSpdizj7q5O0Qb7LhQDNOBSwcEE%3D)

---
Fellow American-

Free pizza has gone from being a Student Body President's campaign promise to a lure used by the Los Angeles Unified School District to get students vaccinated without their parents' permission.

[ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ded232756cb9406096889e5443058a0c&_e=v7fa4FIVUGkvaKqtDqoviKOHSkcIZE7uGNS0dIw__bqma2pGpl9IqkcbOWJ6BZHFaSKBuYEVMBeczCFGwJkU4GLoZ7mYWTGNEYsePP_SzWw9DbtCvf9Xys6CS7lWebA2dTyPLxACIBI38a_eUZztl17GBLm70czpc0jGIE0Bl9kPfVqeaXOjmZP_Tatcx4u4zoeaynTXVgA7DbwK5asPoZtmE9Gmqy7G0JWT_9g4eI5Ykvx-X-2nGu4jo8sxKY84rDgUAFqUkhux8psbDsU3tvdenM1eHIxzp9UzaU0Yh8k-wGFWno4Rsg_hBKkt_skj7hXY8ik9_awaf1WUXIYa6kz0hP_kO7LXEXZjgq27NYCjt9FSFlV6SIKgv4BkfiNomopqyqixE5fAiQy7_mZLCMpqMG-0xhpijac3hE-sjf0%3D)
The mother of a 13-year-old student at Barack Obama Global Prep Academy says that her son came home from school with a brand-new vaccine card. **The _minor child_ said he agreed to get the vaccine when a school employee offered him free pizza if he let her vaccinate him.**

_**The school employee then told the student not to tell his mom, or they would both get in trouble.******_

In California, a 13-year-old cannot consent to a medical procedure; the parent must authorize the treatment. **In this case, not only did the parent not consent, she was adamant that her son not get the vaccine because of his asthma and his allergy issues.**

School employees are preying on students' vulnerabilities and silencing them with snacks. They have entirely undermined the rights of parents.

**This has become more than just a mandate; this is the government forcing its way into your life.**

As I travel around the state of California, I see so many Californians fighting to restore their parental rights. It is becoming evident that 2022 will be the year of the Parent Party.

[** SUPPORT MARK TODAY**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ded232756cb9406096889e5443058a0c&_e=v7fa4FIVUGkvaKqtDqoviKOHSkcIZE7uGNS0dIw__bqma2pGpl9IqkcbOWJ6BZHFaSKBuYEVMBeczCFGwJkU4GLoZ7mYWTGNEYsePP_SzWw9DbtCvf9Xys6CS7lWebA2dTyPLxACIBI38a_eUZztl17GBLm70czpc0jGIE0Bl9kPfVqeaXOjmZP_Tatcx4u4zoeaynTXVgA7DbwK5asPoTF3t87HlETAy1njiUElpqdSDY9Opv7dEJDHB4kACLaxtmn2zh7CnXOxVlC17e6ZEAnh8nWqnCO-Nn7mgmYMTCQy8dmMOUBnxaxXVyQCq0fQmCgH3TdY4qXypS8EQBx-01MYqmftf8anKI-a8WRrpZQux9dMaKH1E-D0sg_6b19TlUD-EpfOLe5hBzZiU2okS_49V4tCeQAEam_qpEFLkjE%3D)
Parents are fed up with politicians putting special interests ahead of their children. They are done with politicians playing politics with their children's education. They are over their children being pawns in the Left's political agenda.

2022 will be the year that Parents step up and hold their elected officials accountable for ensuring that their children receive a proper education and are protected from the political whims of the Left.

**I believe that parents are the only people that should make health and education decisions for their children, and I will take that belief to Washington D.C. with me.**

[**I have been fighting to protect your rights every day of my career. That won't stop when I'm elected to the Senate. Can you make a contribution to my campaign to help me defeat Senator Alex Padilla?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ded232756cb9406096889e5443058a0c&_e=v7fa4FIVUGkvaKqtDqoviKOHSkcIZE7uGNS0dIw__bqma2pGpl9IqkcbOWJ6BZHFaSKBuYEVMBeczCFGwJkU4GLoZ7mYWTGNEYsePP_SzWw9DbtCvf9Xys6CS7lWebA2dTyPLxACIBI38a_eUZztl17GBLm70czpc0jGIE0Bl9kPfVqeaXOjmZP_Tatcx4u4zoeaynTXVgA7DbwK5asPoXJSsIFdPVMIGsDbGBmTLZxg-YbvvhysFD2LBx10d2VWvuRVOpq5qCOgVEfThMciQ66dd9CjXtmCYs2LaI2yUre-Y7rfm2_1jGOje0Md3-fJ4K_O5Mh8KSC7GaHQXl0y5xlyTjpd4ZibnBIoE-k5ugiEdLzQwayqZeRPskBIKX9e05DigA3GWnUYvwgDkVaNXbjiT9E0KFWwWdmjoJifZPw%3D)

Thank you,

Mark Meuser
Republican for U.S. Senate, California

[**P.S. As you know, my team has set a very ambitious goal to find 500 patriots who will make a contribution to this campaign of at least $100 by the end of this year. We are off to a great start but we still have a long ways to go to reach 500 contributors. Can I count on your support to make a contribution today and help me reach the goal of 500 contributors this month?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ded232756cb9406096889e5443058a0c&_e=v7fa4FIVUGkvaKqtDqoviKOHSkcIZE7uGNS0dIw__bqma2pGpl9IqkcbOWJ6BZHFaSKBuYEVMBeczCFGwJkU4GLoZ7mYWTGNEYsePP_SzWw9DbtCvf9Xys6CS7lWebA2dTyPLxACIBI38a_eUZztl17GBLm70czpc0jGIE0Bl9kPfVqeaXOjmZP_Tatcx4u4zoeaynTXVgA7DbwK5asPoVwqFIvWMXBP3Li7192b2vEatm2U9MPOBXHlvwhQHgw131BX72WwKeu0LBHOiZBmpBee_tjOTBgJedpp8vhPwYOdo6KGe9UPqVr7a-bXUcLQ3_nhCah4OIZ7uINWFJSkihpUQxoQ9Z4MSkYohLFNCw6KHbXnjSNEA3qGFKz1hKxC97kKvfg441rA-rFQhxGXCOV8BkDT3eqhWpyP3psAnag%3D)

[** SUPPORT MARK TODAY**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ded232756cb9406096889e5443058a0c&_e=v7fa4FIVUGkvaKqtDqoviKOHSkcIZE7uGNS0dIw__bqma2pGpl9IqkcbOWJ6BZHFaSKBuYEVMBeczCFGwJkU4GLoZ7mYWTGNEYsePP_SzWw9DbtCvf9Xys6CS7lWebA2dTyPLxACIBI38a_eUZztl17GBLm70czpc0jGIE0Bl9kPfVqeaXOjmZP_Tatcx4u4zoeaynTXVgA7DbwK5asPodl1T97DNzimP18OIRt_pzicT9ok22Jv7AMs3uo0PE2GD9LH66_wJXCVNSVp0ewvJhcs0Gao4FY_9k6fPc2PUAlOFe3T0lDsR2NC8MEg2nF8csoMNCOdQ-nidN1RvFpytEUOMfgqbzXKxRlklM4xr7wCdsBatAHsas0ivqCFHEdcbovwVlwR8f1Pyh57-OY1sKawWKswApnF5ZnLMMoRw-k%3D)

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, As Jane continues to pick up momentum based on her recent surge in the polls, she continues to prove how she will work hard, every day for the people of Ohio in the U.S. Senate. Jane remains focused on the issues most important to Ohioans. This week, she toured a trucking company to learn how Joe Biden’s disastrous policies are affecting them and their employees (and to drive a truck!) and continued pushing a Parents First agenda by releasing her Parents First Curriculum. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Momentum Continues to Grow** [ | | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=c2ef0cc9ff1541fba73fc455dab64618&_e=bCwDxnMb5c3RFkk5fEe5g0faEm_MlcfFYaXABZFaOgJ4Yql5u7ddpanh-upZlCn02jZC1yxdzx9AW6CX2httwhyaV8-4ColC-vSbb6ga9Jw9_YC9nXCpgZn_C3n1Pl2_nepEC3X08vkRzJKNR-zfmV_NXz2IuNIvJNPDqV2aONlUEDzpw9J58A0n_XeoLMWa-r7uzdVMRxoEnKc65ss0Em97zJ-VSYrkZ07MVxHu4YHoJkr94-dacYYPaTi_WRrsxmhuISCj4uKkjStmjscghJdEfiEkrnkqUEyGD3J6cL8%3D)
Jane was thrilled to join Real America’s Voice to talk about the enthusiasm and energy building behind Jane’s campaign for U.S. Senate. We saw it last week through [new survey results](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=c2ef0cc9ff1541fba73fc455dab64618&_e=bCwDxnMb5c3RFkk5fEe5g6WzYRj6pzwIJb-YMMjzIsWADjL9XVAGlR0MXffP-jf78gO66Pe_5shA2UGzwmho1-AjGHdvrgxZ8HpcwsI8BB2CxCKHXUtmV_zGUm0tGrswKgt730ebuiuqxQfqHp_R4ehvoGPkKnK-fbbDhfSRQekL9AYBKQb2-pl1F2phUjqpvFGiNScipdrUEhQP2w_thL02eQhGBhLPhMIgwh5DIkXU8EdbJ868-afoWgwJcnRvBqlP4wyYly4d4ixksb-_93aUvhfR44i9vYSAG3gmHr4E0P8YqdwDVtBlsA-wZ6QjL6ZwaGKdixiH_PN1gKmdm-cHEKILYuMm-Q0YjVHh1WAbzm7MYwut3jSiklWfFYj1), but we also see it on the ground every day as Jane travels the state.

Jane’s grassroots campaign is organized in all 88 Counties, has contacted over 900,000 voters to date, and continues to build up strength and momentum as we end this year and move toward Primary Day.
**From the Trail**
On Monday, Jane spent some time in Findlay with Garner Trucking, a female-owned family business serving Ohio. Jane talked about workforce shortages, regulations, and mandates and how they are affecting Ohio’s vital trucking industry. Plus, she got to drive a truck!
[ | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=c2ef0cc9ff1541fba73fc455dab64618&_e=bCwDxnMb5c3RFkk5fEe5g0faEm_MlcfFYaXABZFaOgITPW9YylquQyT9xU_-hy3iBQ85UFoeKHzprLevOMALt6H8Rkn_OUow9QVathmpnPSgWnt215cbn3t71vX7B4xAUVI1mcKPljF1EPH7vXSlV2nXEVAXDNry5jOHsE-bPMh9ZrSH-zGI5ahpkuZIZx3YcE3NklBFui9EQXqiQnZ8mo-kMCSuGms_JhA3KiEKTZCmDYIJ1mYrS8PxV7PhmrqezFbNuTEwYDhDxgYdRCGifksf49XZa4FTLWOiGS6vLVw%3D)
On Tuesday morning, Jane joined the Brandon Boxer Show on 610 WTVN in Columbus to unveil her Parents First Agenda and talk about her surging momentum in the polls. Parents deserve a say in their children's education and Jane will make absolutely sure your voice is heard in Washington. Listen by clicking below.
[](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=c2ef0cc9ff1541fba73fc455dab64618&_e=bCwDxnMb5c3RFkk5fEe5g2OVf3wa6X2TZbxUIprgBqk8-CJnQ1rCLw8DXpsQm7I87N93Y4efy5qpZDQRnK9uLCpADJzkJKZGhI8AZbnqwKMgMSNE4eeEJULUrxtYmblLs4dgmZTiVwzZcSuCxqpmMT2VpGX0suHhz3iUJIjWDGfTtJdwAC37aJtuEL2K0CgdbgOM8FIHnO_TjGDdApKODxtUg9bq0oPqG10uxwv8tfQ13FMR3s3R4r88CSH3qiC-5Nrc12eYSS-xhjqJ8NvIZA%3D%3D)
On Friday morning, Jane toured Pregnancy Choices in Canton. Pregnancy Choices serves Stark County as a crisis pregnancy support center, providing support for thousands of moms and dads in Stark County since 1986.
This afternoon, Jane continued her Parents First Tour on the heels of releasing her Parents First Curriculum. For months, Jane has been listening to the concerns and issues parents have with their children’s education and every issue affecting Ohio families.
**Latest Endorsements**
As Jane continues to pick up steam in the polls, she continues to rack up conservative, grassroots endorsements from across the state. With over 165 endorsements from Republican leaders, Jane far surpasses the field and we were absolutely thrilled to add these conservatives this week.

_Full list of endorsements_
State Senator Bob Hackett, Senate District 10
Auditor Nancy Milliken, Columbiana County
Triffon Callos, Green Township Trustee, Hamilton County
David Bethel, Union Township Trustee, Ross County
[ | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=c2ef0cc9ff1541fba73fc455dab64618&_e=bCwDxnMb5c3RFkk5fEe5g0faEm_MlcfFYaXABZFaOgIieLKQiMn1J8ufLXMpIpBp5Tl1p1Zc5Tzgmg51tP0_SQv28CKtNYIBwOHCtDINOsEMZsMR52J6Y-ytVer3-KSNFK2RfeGyakd6Y_sO4YHEtA4X5rP1RpSbt0oxP1HdzuDYGPiu_L7RIvmHUXToM6m3aJtNbwkQVR1um4axy24EGFMZX1MhNoinRkRGqNXl0MXci9eJDk6jlTKKXr_RzkTBlzjg-Kn0W0sXMzrhLDjXN45fV1OtASo0GI3VCiSnxzc%3D)
**The Parents First Curriculum**
As part of her focus on education and ensuring parents have a voice in their children’s educations, Jane released her Parents First Curriculum this week.
Jane believes that education is the key to the American Dream, but that dream is being robbed from children as teachers’ unions, leftists, and liberal school board members turn our schools into indoctrination centers that erode their standards of excellence. Jane’s plan empowers parents and families, not politicians and bureaucrats.

I hope everyone has a great weekend.
Sincerely,

Rob Secaur
Campaign Manager
Jane Timken for Ohio
Don't want to receive our emails anymore? clean_body: Will you sign the card, Peter? | | | Peter, Christmas will be here soon, and this year we’re thinking especially about President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump. In this first Christmas since they’ve left the White House, we want to be sure they know how much they mean to Americans everywhere and to Republican Patriots in particular. Will you take a moment and sign their Official Elect Republicans Christmas Card? | Thank you. Trump Christmas Alerts Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=fb2045e814a3484ab22da76caa03d486&_e=vEwZr6OZYHi9uhl1ANw1vcMr6bXMQSdmfs8sAZ74AKaoosvQjYgbIXk4iiMpJn4Vjs4iSSQh-jxw0WgAyStIQpZqWs82X0OwWjnqcPCAW-t0GdL-E-UvonBYw2S6ZQZryZQtcwFeMpCAn2PcrQwMIdB2ZrjphJ_Ea7qn4z8_C_XFZtyntVP3UdpHTINPFc8bQexNbE6H14979bpGLbD1NsfVdODPewk3S6BoALBaQzWjDmteT7lfiH3nnBCwSV-x48nDPRO28UtpcIA9i7dVoBTV4vR40SORw2fiDsw47xcryPxy1CgI0m8ii7PLKFlMkY0ic5xK7Zz2qSyaLJLMcOpJmzDrnC7JMCWKDegFJwZ1x9-iXi5Vw0RcCSepSjJ0gnIYXUSe71-2LFjWK92KhA%3D%3D) | |
