**Biden: The Real Russian Stooge 🤦**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=fb2045e814a3484ab22da76caa03d486&_e=vEwZr6OZYHi9uhl1ANw1vcMr6bXMQSdmfs8sAZ74AKaoosvQjYgbIXk4iiMpJn4VM40cpJSoynWrsA8knU9RdnL2XwgPoC4CtLnPfzeDPn3xv6bIGxQ4T29Uf_Wk-KS4qc8kxWahSl0MkiT6trwp2rfEYu4-zaVn5s0Qq4fIvMb4eVZG7yT8ZHPu7XgUKB9dqH7ejduMldR7sjRsfs0KsTMq05QaR8waTW81I3PjGd45SG8MLyDPY7KMje3ncxDT_zDZsCCfjB8quiwv0-rsgKpRvppZAaz5pAK2TzJvg3NYBIXsaFLd1rrzFFqlADAUqm7-ia76L7_feQrZtkzkIA9yrzJ9I1YqSub34-kWfxThnsWPZewD1eQN-05tLEzJupMqUxjQPBqy6CpNccafgUGNenmoHs8YW-IEj-MyekM%3D)
For four straight years, Democrats attacked former President Trump for not being tough enough on Russia. Now, we have a Democrat president who is all too eager to lie down and be a doormat for Putin.

Frankly, it’s an embarrassment.

At every turn, Joe Biden has kowtowed to the world’s thugs and dictators. From coddling Iran to the disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan to dismissing China’s genocide to pandering to Putin, Biden has turned the United States into a laughingstock on the world stage.

We have no fear from our enemies, and no respect from our friends.

With the anniversary of Pearl Harbor this week, I often think about my mom, my dad, my uncle Roy, and their friends who served our nation. My dad was a Marine who fought in the Battle of Okinawa, my mom flew airplanes for the war effort, and my uncle Roy was killed in Normandy shortly after D-Day. The greatest generation fought proudly for a strong, confident America that didn’t bow to anyone.

That’s the kind of America we need to be right now.
|
---
**Everyone Looks Good In Orange 👏**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=fb2045e814a3484ab22da76caa03d486&_e=vEwZr6OZYHi9uhl1ANw1vUNATxLIZZQ4pbbxNNXJtkJGmhLWj4y8fuI536lYI4kqkm_WEbhEpiK_E8s8pXUNhLx3Ki1j-hPKoB9CE-nCpsDsoc9rGwQy27POekO7zk6yz5KuA27xZ99yOUgLvA4IA1Et_PYktWUtM08iAzVnYrYtTK6wC7xLxXDv8Czz3VtL5ENcAKPZE-djxa92YmYI1Xv2E520ZvwtO8buVa5D3ZN-wkwx8Vjo2aTj62DmxtchLjZSn4r9I1WmMMDKXH21KIB6yqmqE4uzdwDvesnBNv31hK3HVfFD9t1y98hQfLZ_V-7FF_XosPUscAmbxEq9MsKB8tzi5j36ZMQ8RCKAaWYd2MVehFmoHS1xWeVpNB8AXqG5IANA6phNYMA7fpVqfg%3D%3D)
_Image courtesy of Knoxnews_
This week, several students from Austin-East Magnet High got some [good news](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=fb2045e814a3484ab22da76caa03d486&_e=vEwZr6OZYHi9uhl1ANw1vUNATxLIZZQ4pbbxNNXJtkJGmhLWj4y8fuI536lYI4kqkm_WEbhEpiK_E8s8pXUNhLx3Ki1j-hPKoB9CE-nCpsDsoc9rGwQy27POekO7zk6yz5KuA27xZ99yOUgLvA4IA1Et_PYktWUtM08iAzVnYrYtTK6wC7xLxXDv8Czz3VtLcygvXPpOaIgLyt_wZcHXHPEWNxpe8-4Bc2JT__gD4-CbzWc5Tp0qS9l7Hm3sZC3Y8KMCKmDfbpme8vCdnsbAdHR3ebPBj4ymNP_JlJyCTIVmr8u3CFaIEnqRr0Kn6U4G6K2vKI0_QXSDLYkXYQuQE8CHY83edx8rocG91lxyzKPI7_t3jrWGAsPutrqMeiOoYxUYjgwtF9ERVaebQ_-S4Q%3D%3D): They were accepted into the University of Tennessee at Knoxville and offered the prestigious Flagship Scholarship. I hope they look good in orange!

I want to congratulate these students on their amazing accomplishments. As a Vol for Life myself, I also like to commend them on their impeccable taste. Personally, I think everyone looks good in orange. 😉
|

My dad was a Marine who fought in the Battle of Okinawa, my mom flew airplanes for the war effort, and my uncle Roy was killed in Normandy shortly after D-Day. The greatest generation fought proudly for a strong, confident America that didn’t bow to anyone. That’s the kind of America we need to be right now. | Everyone Looks Good In Orange 👏 Image courtesy of Knoxnews This week, several students from Austin-East Magnet High got some : They were accepted into the University of Tennessee at Knoxville and offered the prestigious Flagship Scholarship. I hope they look good in orange! I want to congratulate these students on their amazing accomplishments. As a Vol for Life myself, I also like to commend them on their impeccable taste. Personally, I think everyone looks good in orange. 😉 | Product Of The Month 🛍 | Just For Fun 🥳 → You can always count on dad 💪 () → Which one’s the real one? 🎅 () → Dogs are the best 🐶 () | | Our campaign to take back the House in 2022 is already in the works. Please chip in today to help us oust Nancy Pelosi and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. Stay in Touch 👇 | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

name: Rabine for Governor
subject: 12/9 Newsletter
body:
This week, I had the privilege of joining my opponents at a forum in Mt. Vernon to discuss our ideas for how to turn Illinois around.

| [ ](http://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_9_newsletter&n=1) | |
---|---|---
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoACmWpbFVl5yir_lA0uM2Gq9g9n79yo2HHshKvg7nExCdQZseeTdqQcxnA0-13oGA&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_9_newsletter&n=2) Dear Peter -- This week, I had the privilege of joining my opponents at a forum in Mt. Vernon to discuss our ideas for how to turn Illinois around. While there are certainly differences between me and my opponents, we are all united in defeating JB Pritzker in 2022. Illinois residents cannot afford more of Pritzker’s failed leadership. Illinois needs new leadership if we have any hope of kick-starting Illinois’ comeback. People are tired of the failed policies of the past. They are tired of their political leaders ignoring their concerns. They want a leader who will prioritize working families over the whims of political insiders. I am the political outsider best equipped to defeat JB Pritzker in 2022 but I need your help. I need you to share my content on social media. Put a sign in your yard. Talk to your friends, co-workers, and family members about my campaign. I am asking you to get involved in whatever capacity you can to help me become our Party’s nominee for Governor. The future of Illinois starts right now. Best Regards, Gary Rabine **Will you join our growing movement to defeat JB Pritzker?****** Join Team Rabine to learn how you can be a part of the winning team to defeat JB Pritzker and help turn our state around! | [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_9_newsletter&n=3 "Join Team Rabine") [Join Team Rabine](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_9_newsletter&n=3)
---
* * *
### Marengo Meet & Greet (12/11)
Come out and meet Gary at Wholesome Petz on Saturday, December 11th from 1:00-2:30PM
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=BbZD9kwGhy9l8fXrAK06so7wADBv9NBB-jg1bPWufoLpO78-PuBQVA0Vg3_Yc7w0YQuxVATCKPZ4Ttxlmh1E2A&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_9_newsletter&n=4 "Event Details Here") [Event Details Here](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=BbZD9kwGhy9l8fXrAK06so7wADBv9NBB-jg1bPWufoLpO78-PuBQVA0Vg3_Yc7w0YQuxVATCKPZ4Ttxlmh1E2A&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_9_newsletter&n=4)
---
### **Curbing Violence will be a top priority for a Rabine Administration**
Every day it seems we see more victims of tragic violence in the City of Chicago. We must make public safety a high priority. I intend to use the platform I would have as Governor of the State of Illinois to highlight the problem of violence to build support for real solutions.
Some of my solutions include:
* Repealing the police reform legislation recently signed into law
* Directing state resources to the City of Chicago to hire more police officers contingent on the City repealing bad policies such as the ban on foot pursuits and anti-policing measures
* Creating more enterprise zones in low-income areas to spur economic growth
* Putting public pressure on the Cook County State’s Attorney to prosecute criminals

If I were Governor, I would look to use executive powers to help solve the problem. As the CEO of the state, I would find the causes, stay on it, and keep working until the problem is solved.
I would be doing everything I could to keep the residents of Chicago safe. But what is Gov. Pritzker doing? Nothing. Except making the problem worse. Illinois deserves better than JB Pritzker.
### Illinois has Fewer Job Seekers
There are more than 180,000 fewer Illinoisans looking for work than the state had two years ago.
According to data from the Bureau of Labor Statistics, Illinois had 6.4 million eligible workers in October of 2019 for a labor participation rate of 64.1 percent. In October 2021, there were 6.2 million eligible workers for a labor participation rate of 62.8%.
From March 2020 to April of 2020 about 320,000 workers dropped out of the workforce and the labor participation rate went from 63.6% to 60.4% in just one month.
The labor shortage is real, and it is hurting virtually every industry. We need workers to return to the job force. We need Governor Pritzker and the leaders in the House and the Senate to stop ignoring what is happening and become part of the solution – not part of the problem.
### Illinois Must Avoid New York Style Vaccine Mandates
New York Mayor Bill de Blasio’s parting gift to New Yorkers is a vaccine mandate on private employers.
The mayor’s mandate is just latest the example of government overreach from the far left. We must fight these mandates. It is not the role of government to play doctor. We must preserve the right of conscience for working employers and employees.
The Rabine Group of Companies joined the Job Creator’s Network’s lawsuit against the Biden Administration’s vaccine mandates on employers because the mandates are a major step toward the kind of authoritarian society, we as Americans abhor. These mandates are catastrophic job killers and are an offensive and financially devastating violation of our liberty.
Our rights and liberties are important, and they must be protected and preserved. We must not bring Bill de Blasio’s vaccine mandates to Illinois.
* * *
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_9_newsletter&n=5)
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoACmWpbFVl5yir_lA0uM2Gq9g9n79yo2HHshKvg7nExCdQZseeTdqQcxnA0-13oGA&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_9_newsletter&n=6)
---
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_9_newsletter&n=7)
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/join?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_9_newsletter&n=8)
* * *
|
Paid for by Rabine for Governor | PO Box 59183, Schaumburg, IL 60159 A copy of our report filed with the State Board of Elections is (or will be) available on the Board’s official website (www.elections.il.gov) or for purchase from the State Board of Elections, Springfield, Illinois.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_9_newsletter&n=9).
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6t84VcLDAztZ7gNMCtVnC4HtpWQk6Xt7pTvj7avz1DYf&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_9_newsletter&n=10) [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y3owDXItF8Fxepzm0P3FcLQliFyUmYOOEoz3DQt6cVpu&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_9_newsletter&n=11) [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TpvcEbp0GzIdVh11H7oShmM&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=12_9_newsletter&n=12)
Thank you and God bless.

name: STUNNING SUPREME COURT UPDATE (via DCCC)
subject: RE: Texas GOP’s abortion ban
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Will you add your name to CONDEMN Republican attacks on the right to choose?
| | | **_BREAKING NEWS:_
Supreme Court REFUSES to block Texas abortion law**
---

We're absolutely disgusted.

**This morning, the Supreme Court allowed the Texas GOP 's six-week abortion ban to remain in place -- _AGAIN. _**

Let us be clear: This is an all-out assault on the right to choose.

This moment requires grassroots Democrats to stand with women everywhere -- _so we 're calling on 20,000 grassroots Democrats to rise up against Republican attacks on reproductive rights._

[**************Quickly: Will you add your name to CONDEMN Republican attacks on the right to choose?**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_)

NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Petition Signature: [MISSING >>](https://links.e.dccc.)
| [Sign Your Name >> ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-YTZP~)
---

We're absolutely appalled.

**This morning, the Supreme Court refused to block the Texas GOP's vicious six-week abortion ban -- _before many people even know they 're pregnant._**

Republicans in Texas and across the country have been attacking the right to choose for DECADES -- and have shown they will stop at nothing to undermine reproductive rights.

Even worse, Trump's hand-picked Supreme Court justices have shown that they're prepared to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ if we give them the chance.

And as Democrats, we refuse to sit idly by and let them get away with it.

But we can't stop them alone. This moment requires grassroots Democrats _\-- including YOU \--_ to stand with women everywhere.

That's why we're calling on 20,000 grassroots Democrats to RISE UP and CONDEMN Republican attacks on the right to choose.

**Will you take one minute to add your name and CONDEMN Republican attacks on reproductive rights?**

---
[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Add your name and CONDEMN Republican attacks on reproductive rights >>](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority \-- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Rules for thee, not for me.
body:
Nancy Pelosi has been on a fining spree -- slapping Republican lawmakers hundreds of thousands of dollars in fines for not wearing masks in the Capitol.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/YEgC0LQNtC6Gh3K5FFUrrg/PrWOsOCzDsjfqmkTWn9tPQ)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/YEgC0LQNtC6Gh3K5FFUrrg/PrWOsOCzDsjfqmkTWn9tPQ) Nancy Pelosi has been on a fining spree -- slapping Republican lawmakers with hundreds of thousands of dollars in fines for not wearing masks in the Capitol.

But as her office is issuing fines, Pelosi and her entourage are strutting around Congress MASKLESS!

I can't make this stuff up.

And this is all possible because of a vote by Congress to create ridiculous rules for the cameras - **and you know who didn 't even bother to vote against them?**

My opponent, Do-Nothing Daniel Webster.

[**Help me defeat Do-Nothing Dan in the Republican Primary by backing my campaign today.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/YEgC0LQNtC6Gh3K5FFUrrg/PrWOsOCzDsjfqmkTWn9tPQ)

Congress is no longer about legislating - it's about getting likes on Twitter and cheers from the rabid, communist base.

While the rest of the nation is all-but maskless, Democrats in Washington are holding to their phony narrative to deepen the political divide around the nation, **while RINOs like Webster sit on the sideline and do absolutely NOTHING**.

As a member of Congress, Webster's sole responsibility is to show up and vote.

Not only is Webster failing his constituents by missing 15% of the votes this year alone, he's not even showing up to fight for his Republican colleagues and against Pelosi's "rules for thee, but not for me."

[**Help me get into Congress by defeating Do-Nothing Daniel Webster.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/YEgC0LQNtC6Gh3K5FFUrrg/PrWOsOCzDsjfqmkTWn9tPQ)

Time is short and my primary will be coming up before we know it.

[**Any donation you can provide will be greatly appreciated.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/YEgC0LQNtC6Gh3K5FFUrrg/PrWOsOCzDsjfqmkTWn9tPQ)

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

body:
The latest news from the Republican Party of Wisconsin

| | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_12_10_2021_v3&n=1)
---
### December 10, 2021
Friend -- Happy December! We hope you are enjoying the holiday season. As we round out the holidays at the Republican Party of Wisconsin, we are grateful to all of our dedicated grassroots activists and the hard work you do to spread the conservative message in communities across the state. Here at the WisGOP, we are not slowing down as we continue to demand election integrity safeguards from our election officials and hold Democrats accountable by calling them out for their failures. You can read more about what we’re working on at the WisGOP below, and as always, we would love for you to get involved. You can sign up to volunteer on our website [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09sgeSL97IY298LwvRVw_nnoiXOCvXzs3WMPphGbvcHNF&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_12_10_2021_v3&n=2). \- Team WisGOP | **Indefinitely Confined Voters:** The WisGOP sent letters to all Wisconsin clerks (over 1900) reminding them of their statutory duty to send notices to individuals who have marked themselves as indefinitely confined, yet did not vote. Those individuals must respond or they must be removed from the list. Many clerks across the state have responded, and we continue to fight to ensure that indefinite confinement rolls are updated in accordance with the law. **Madison Vaccine Mandate:** The WisGOP sent a demand letter and issued a [statement](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0R72aAQRdpUWAFwuxNARiAWA0WnHxOYcn6d3zsAL2JR-zYfXX_Cm1-uJyonOuHDpTMSgHo-ZaZfvMdnuq3IFRetj5Ae7XHFvAuVowxt_Nr5L&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_12_10_2021_v3&n=3) in opposition to the city of Madison’s vaccine mandates for election inspectors. We pointed out that their requirements were illegal, and the city scaled back their requirements. **Racine Election Scam Van:** Over the summer, the city of Racine [announced](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=DK7mUohFpa1-M6QNY7MlqJ2AESWX99lI7nsVviHbKs75oGk-ZDvWKoAZ_QBT6BZ6BFZ1yh0u-Kjh2f1u1gHz5jJn2rrC2BX3pLlDKoqWdGs5AWzp9cNEO8mcIEGwZPXZRFfCnfDKJ6Jk2zgpXtUqIPhm0JJCZGrb8MtWI-yvEz2JL0omFBeRObbUf5W7IIfNqCZcaOEcVQF5xd5UkQv5TlbR3qKAgAEaCHPJyTpm9M5TOXOh04a0GsRArbFhdYBWc0l1jTvIPPzN-mo99iqOoA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_12_10_2021_v3&n=4) a new van, paid for with Zuckerberg money, that would serve as an early vote location and mobile ballot drop box across the city. The WisGOP continues to oppose the ballot drop boxes, and the use of the van as an early vote location is impermissible under law. We sent a demand letter to the city of Racine and will continue to fight to ensure the law is upheld. **Ballot Harvesting:** The WisGOP is urging that ballot harvesting be considered unlawful in Wisconsin and is seeking clarification and a favorable answer from the Elections Commission. We remain resolute in our opposition because of the massive risk of fraud associated with allowing additional individuals to handle ballots. However, if election authorities make the decision that ballot harvesting is allowed, we will mobilize and do as much of it as is permissible, and beat Democrats at their own game. And when Republicans win next November, we’ll pass laws to end this practice for good. The media continues to discredit investigators and sweep election integrity issues under the rug. After each irregularity or unlawful practice is exposed, reporters join Democrats in screaming that particular practice alone would not have been enough to cost Biden the election. It’s as if compliance with the law were only important when it can also be proven that the practice gave the Democrats enough votes to win the state. Election laws must be followed, no matter how many votes Democrats net when they are broken. Many state and local races each cycle are only determined by a handful of votes. Only legal votes must count in our state where elections are consistently a game of inches. The Republican Party of Wisconsin will always fight for free, fair, and secure elections. For more information on what the Republican Party of Wisconsin, along with President Trump’s campaign and the RNC have done in recent years to fight for ballot integrity, visit our [**website**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3d1AlaEsXyAcUsZX0a6I0PJkeR9G6MlHM0zdl6W8VBkd&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_12_10_2021_v3&n=5). | |
This year, Republicans across Wisconsin submitted the largest number of Republican election inspectors in state history at around 5,000! Thank you to our hardworking grassroots activists for your work in this effort to ensure that communities across Wisconsin have poll workers delivering fair and secure elections. In light of the horrific tragedy in Waukesha, public safety is top of mind for Wisconsinites – yet Tony Evers and Mandela Barnes owe Wisconsinites answers on where they stand on keeping Wisconsinites safe. While Tony Evers [refused](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0WEVRdYdDbtID5KveBTfsIkpf4lvJi3i1XFzMFODRp2qr-yjHl0VcY6euBq8iDm4TbRFCtxP9y7bBktKo8gHBCE&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_12_10_2021_v3&n=6) to answer questions on whether he plans to fire Milwaukee County District Attorney John Chisholm, whose office’s low bail allowed a violent repeat offender back on the streets, the Washington Free Beacon revealed that Mandela Barnes tried to [eliminate](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0QoC7rgm5XDC2WUpuTddVCBttfcJxmWoUSLOY2hVwcKy5TrBMY5ClOcuxqjnbqhU0S8B7LpemyRPnjM_iIt2AUg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_12_10_2021_v3&n=7) cash bail while serving in the Wisconsin State Assembly. Evers and Barnes owe Wisconsinites answers on where they stand. Last week, Tony Evers [confirmed](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=KVYzWTFUuJ0SsyVZLAg-7KhgymeBWCJ5z6VS6DGe2fJ8q-RYCzsCYTMCC9FshFBlvpt7XZZcib5Xhp30vDoap-4UPS25fCzB9ZhIJCO1uqtApw9urdwdVdAc_upkQPl1t9a1oPGUEEfe-eMtlkddyEbMoYdE5cP69El6JhL56yAIt87CLSNjLD2fUiNR0Pgi&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_12_10_2021_v3&n=8) his allegiance to national Democrats and their anti-abortion radicalism. Evers vetoed several pro-life bills, including one which would have prohibited abortion based on discriminatory factors like race, sex, or disability. Meanwhile, national Democrats have also embraced radical abortion policies that are completely detached from the American mainstream. They’ve [refused to back](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TiV2ExMvy-B9xlTsmD5RGJqhla2mJT2kUxXWM9eS6hTHyV7lB8QjoZR-asQOUz0sgw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_12_10_2021_v3&n=9) any limitations on abortion, including up to the moment of birth and [after](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TqcKWz2hUWZFMern87kI4UK7AZ4ruKyCeip8yB7pycRolgL49zKQi_m4p9TIJxfxgQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_12_10_2021_v3&n=10), and even [blocked legislation](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=AhFr39Kxe0zyYMvwPfgp0jhDYLj6ZA4mgD2sQqlHCDHnLQiUTEItLQFnHt9lGMChOwYVfEevXV0AseQTerS3F6jPGYH1kIuNYABT3UtVIF4q4taC3w-d1Xt-Cy1XM7Z1bn2c_sbDVYN6G03dRPdEwa-A1xpG1wV0AqD_OzfbZhE&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_12_10_2021_v3&n=11) on infanticide. Life is precious and worth defending. Human life is on the ballot next year – and while Democrats are fighting to force their radical abortion agenda on all Americans – Republicans are fighting to stop them.
---|---|---
* * *
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0ahw3PTL6JsP8slQyv_Z45W1tpC4bxcjwcY7pLDfF8cTNlZrezZB2oVgQgpQzhDJdQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_12_10_2021_v3&n=12) | | Want to help stand up for conservative principles in your community? Submit a Letter to the Editor! You can send a letter directly to your local paper by filling out the form on our **[website](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0ahw3PTL6JsP8slQyv_Z45W1tpC4bxcjwcY7pLDfF8cTNlZrezZB2oVgQgpQzhDJdQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_12_10_2021_v3&n=13)**.
---|---|---
* * *
### **In Case You Missed It...**
### [_Teachers Union Tony Evers’ Education Problem_](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0RNxilU3l3lzNwGsxbUXu0rcmTxqDqzd41TxyheuTA2RXAnleflzPDLUmyLvJi-eSg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_12_10_2021_v3&n=14)
While Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi lead the charge for their bloated wasteful spending plan in Washington, Tony Evers dipped back into his taxpayer-funded reelection slush fund to designate more ARPA dollars to education, while continuing to ignore the vast learning loss that has hurt students under his leadership. Despite over $5 billion in federal and state support added to Wisconsin’s education system in recent years, more funding is the only talking point that Evers can muster due to his abysmal record as self-proclaimed “education governor.”
### [_What They’re Saying: Holiday Season Brings Democrat-Fueled Supply Chain Struggles_](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0UUT5kNHhproYMsZ99i1s_oPerLj65dzmdm7mOdI9ohSpdh3vC1IBTEAugozNf-A2mC5AxTOcZCw2dMg-aXY6J63zL5PwcLYVScShrYL3sNSA6XrGXVsr0W5JwpJuzdIlA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_12_10_2021_v3&n=15)
Under Democrats, the American supply chain is under attack on all fronts — from vaccine mandates that are disrupting the transportation system to productivity-crushing workforce shortages. This holiday season, Wisconsinites are reminded of Democrats’ failed leadership as they confront rising prices at the pump, empty shelves at small businesses, and declining real wages — yet Democrats continue to push wasteful spending that will only exacerbate our country’s financial woes.
* * *

It’s as if compliance with the law were only important when it can also be proven that the practice gave the Democrats enough votes to win the state. Election laws must be followed, no matter how many votes Democrats net when they are broken. Many state and local races each cycle are only determined by a handful of votes. Only legal votes must count in our state where elections are consistently a game of inches. The Republican Party of Wisconsin will always fight for free, fair, and secure elections. For more information on what the Republican Party of Wisconsin, along with President Trump’s campaign and the RNC have done in recent years to fight for ballot integrity, visit our . | | This year, Republicans across Wisconsin submitted the largest number of Republican election inspectors in state history at around 5,000! Thank you to our hardworking grassroots activists for your work in this effort to ensure that communities across Wisconsin have poll workers delivering fair and secure elections. In light of the horrific tragedy in Waukesha, public safety is top of mind for Wisconsinites – yet Tony Evers and Mandela Barnes owe Wisconsinites answers on where they stand on keeping Wisconsinites safe. While Tony Evers to answer questions on whether he plans to fire Milwaukee County District Attorney John Chisholm, whose office’s low bail allowed a violent repeat offender back on the streets, the Washington Free Beacon revealed that Mandela Barnes tried to cash bail while serving in the Wisconsin State Assembly. Evers and Barnes owe Wisconsinites answers on where they stand. Last week, Tony Evers his allegiance to national Democrats and their anti-abortion radicalism. Evers vetoed several pro-life bills, including one which would have prohibited abortion based on discriminatory factors like race, sex, or disability. Meanwhile, national Democrats have also embraced radical abortion policies that are completely detached from the American mainstream. They’ve any limitations on abortion, including up to the moment of birth and , and even on infanticide. Life is precious and worth defending. Human life is on the ballot next year – and while Democrats are fighting to force their radical abortion agenda on all Americans – Republicans are fighting to stop them. ---|---|--- | | Want to help stand up for conservative principles in your community? Submit a Letter to the Editor! You can send a letter directly to your local paper by filling out the form on our . ---|---|--- In Case You Missed It... While Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi lead the charge for their bloated wasteful spending plan in Washington, Tony Evers dipped back into his taxpayer-funded reelection slush fund to designate more ARPA dollars to education, while continuing to ignore the vast learning loss that has hurt students under his leadership. Despite over $5 billion in federal and state support added to Wisconsin’s education system in recent years, more funding is the only talking point that Evers can muster due to his abysmal record as self-proclaimed “education governor.” Under Democrats, the American supply chain is under attack on all fronts — from vaccine mandates that are disrupting the transportation system to productivity-crushing workforce shortages. This holiday season, Wisconsinites are reminded of Democrats’ failed leadership as they confront rising prices at the pump, empty shelves at small businesses, and declining real wages — yet Democrats continue to push wasteful spending that will only exacerbate our country’s financial woes. Worth the Read | | ---|---|--- Top Sharable Content ****

clean_body: Don’t sit on the sidelines of this MUST-WIN race. | Friend, In just two months, we’ve built a remarkable grassroots coalition to defeat radical liberal Tony Evers and FLIP the battleground state of Wisconsin. But as the year draws to a close, I’ve been looking through our donor files and was surprised you never accepted your Founding Membership with our campaign... With Tony Evers already running lying attack ads against us, I’ve had to set an ambitious new goal to raise another $500,000 before we close the books on 2021. Now more than ever, I’m counting on grassroots conservatives like YOU to step up and accept your Founding Membership to ensure we have the resources to WIN this TOSS-UP race. We can’t afford for strong conservatives like yourself to be on the sidelines in this race. We need YOU. Plain and simple. An amazing opportunity lies in front of us to undo four years of devastation and failure at the hands of Tony Evers -- but I can’t seize this opportunity without you. I can promise you, Friend, your dollar will not be wasted in this race. In fact, we already have the advantage among registered Wisconsin voters... Our state’s most conservative congressional district has nearly 100,000 more registered voters than its liberal counterpart. But this all means nothing if we don’t have the resources to fight back against Evers’ attacks and press our advantage -- and that starts by growing our coalition of Founding Members right now. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

clean_body: NO vaccine mandates in Arizona Friend, This week, the U.S. Senate voted to throw out Joe Biden’s unconstitutional vaccine mandate on private businesses that employ over 100 people. This follows several victories in court declaring Biden’s mandate a violation of civil liberties. We are on the right track, but we know the Biden administration will continue fighting us tooth and nail. We cannot let up now. The Attorney General of Arizona must be on the frontlines of this fight against Biden and Fauci’s unconstitutional overreach. We need a proven, strong conservative leader in the AG’s office to sue Biden and never let up against these illegal violations of Arizonans’ rights. That’s why I’m running, Friend. As a small business owner, I know how detrimental these regulations are to businesses across Arizona. Prohibiting businesses from hiring unvaccinated people will do irreparable harm to an economy already damaged by lockdowns and other COVID-related restrictions. But Radical Democrats want to spend MILLIONS to elect politicians that will ignore the law and keep unconstitutional vaccine mandates in place. Can you chip in to help me fight back against Joe Biden’s unconstitutional mandates? Thank you for your support, Tiffany Shedd Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General. Authorized by Shedd for Attorney General.

clean_body: lockdowns and mandates are on the way in Democrat-led states around the country, Peter. Just this week, Dr. Fauci confirmed what I have been saying for months: it's a matter of WHEN not IF the definition of "fully vaccinated" will change to require booster shots. Fortunately, I signed legislation in Florida to protect people's jobs from vax mandates, but in lockdown states the "unboosted" could lose their jobs because of this change in definition. Joe Biden has spent the better part of his entire presidency fighting to put the American worker out of a job instead of fighting the pandemic like he promised. He thinks the cure to his nosediving economy is to push Americans to the unemployment line and stifle economic participation with mask and vaccine mandates. Fortunately, Florida is an oasis of freedom in America. No amount of smearing or whining from Fauci or Biden is going to cause me to sell out to their pursuit of medical authoritarianism. Indeed, Fauci lied to Congress about his involvement in funding gain of function research and should be prosecuted. "Faucism" has been terribly destructive to our country, and we will continue to reject it here in Florida. Biden will do everything he can to turn Florida into a Faucian dystopia in which our freedoms are curtailed and our livelihoods are destroyed. Ron DeSantis "FIGHT BACK!"
